authors_text: Jianpeng Cao
title: Edge-weighted pFISTA-Net for MRI Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于 MRI 重建的边缘加权 pFISTA-Net
abstract: Deep learning based on unrolled algorithm has served as an effective method for accelerated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). However, many methods ignore the direct use of edge information to assist MRI reconstruction. In this work, we present the edge-weighted pFISTA-Net that directly applies the detected edge map to the soft-thresholding part of pFISTA-Net. The soft-thresholding value of different regions will be adjusted according to the edge map. Experimental results of a public brain dataset show that the proposed yields reconstructions with lower error and better artifact suppression compared with the state-of-the-art deep learning-based methods. The edge-weighted pFISTA-Net also shows robustness for different undersampling masks and edge detection operators. In addition, we extend the edge weighted structure to joint reconstruction and segmentation network and obtain improved reconstruction performance and more accurate segmentation results.
summary: Deep learning based on unrolled algorithm has served as an effective method for accelerated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). However, many methods ignore the direct use of edge information to assist MRI reconstruction. In this work, we present the edge-weighted pFISTA-Net that directly applies the detected edge map to the soft-thresholding part of pFISTA-Net. The soft-thresholding value of different regions will be adjusted according to the edge map. Experimental results of a public brain dataset show that the proposed yields reconstructions with lower error and better artifact suppression compared with the state-of-the-art deep learning-based methods. The edge-weighted pFISTA-Net also shows robustness for different undersampling masks and edge detection operators. In addition, we extend the edge weighted structure to joint reconstruction and segmentation network and obtain improved reconstruction performance and more accurate segmentation results.
abstract_zh: 基于展开算法的深度学习已成为加速磁共振成像（MRI）的有效方法。然而，许多方法忽略了直接使用边缘信息来辅助MRI重建。在这项工作中，我们提出了边缘加权 pFISTA-Net，它将检测到的边缘图直接应用于 pFISTA-Net 的软阈值部分。不同区域的软阈值将根据边缘图进行调整。公共大脑数据集的实验结果表明，与最先进的基于深度学习的方法相比，所提出的重建方法具有更低的误差和更好的伪影抑制。边缘加权 pFISTA-Net 还显示出对不同欠采样掩模和边缘检测算子的鲁棒性。此外，我们将边缘加权结构扩展到联合重建和分割网络，并获得改进的重建性能和更准确的分割结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于边缘加权的pFISTA-Net网络，用于改进磁共振成像（MRI）的重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在加速MRI重建时未充分利用边缘信息，导致重建质量受限。
AI.method: 将检测到的边缘图直接应用于pFISTA-Net的软阈值部分，根据边缘图动态调整不同区域的软阈值，并扩展至联合重建与分割网络。
AI.result: 在公开脑部数据集上，该方法在重建误差和伪影抑制方面优于现有方法，且对不同欠采样掩码和边缘检测算子具有鲁棒性，同时提升了分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 边缘加权策略有效提升了MRI重建质量，且方法具有良好的通用性和扩展性。

authors_text: Siliang Zeng,Chenliang Li,Alfredo Garcia,Mingyi Hong
title: When Demonstrations Meet Generative World Models: A Maximum Likelihood Framework for Offline Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 当演示遇到生成世界模型：离线逆强化学习的最大似然框架
abstract: Offline inverse reinforcement learning (Offline IRL) aims to recover the structure of rewards and environment dynamics that underlie observed actions in a fixed, finite set of demonstrations from an expert agent. Accurate models of expertise in executing a task has applications in safety-sensitive applications such as clinical decision making and autonomous driving. However, the structure of an expert's preferences implicit in observed actions is closely linked to the expert's model of the environment dynamics (i.e. the ``world'' model). Thus, inaccurate models of the world obtained from finite data with limited coverage could compound inaccuracy in estimated rewards. To address this issue, we propose a bi-level optimization formulation of the estimation task wherein the upper level is likelihood maximization based upon a conservative model of the expert's policy (lower level). The policy model is conservative in that it maximizes reward subject to a penalty that is increasing in the uncertainty of the estimated model of the world. We propose a new algorithmic framework to solve the bi-level optimization problem formulation and provide statistical and computational guarantees of performance for the associated optimal reward estimator. Finally, we demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art offline IRL and imitation learning benchmarks by a large margin, over the continuous control tasks in MuJoCo and different datasets in the D4RL benchmark.
summary: Offline inverse reinforcement learning (Offline IRL) aims to recover the structure of rewards and environment dynamics that underlie observed actions in a fixed, finite set of demonstrations from an expert agent. Accurate models of expertise in executing a task has applications in safety-sensitive applications such as clinical decision making and autonomous driving. However, the structure of an expert's preferences implicit in observed actions is closely linked to the expert's model of the environment dynamics (i.e. the ``world'' model). Thus, inaccurate models of the world obtained from finite data with limited coverage could compound inaccuracy in estimated rewards. To address this issue, we propose a bi-level optimization formulation of the estimation task wherein the upper level is likelihood maximization based upon a conservative model of the expert's policy (lower level). The policy model is conservative in that it maximizes reward subject to a penalty that is increasing in the uncertainty of the estimated model of the world. We propose a new algorithmic framework to solve the bi-level optimization problem formulation and provide statistical and computational guarantees of performance for the associated optimal reward estimator. Finally, we demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art offline IRL and imitation learning benchmarks by a large margin, over the continuous control tasks in MuJoCo and different datasets in the D4RL benchmark.
abstract_zh: 离线逆强化学习（Offline IRL）旨在恢复奖励和环境动态的结构，这些结构是专家代理在一组固定的、有限的演示中观察到的行为的基础。执行任务的准确专业知识模型可应用于临床决策和自动驾驶等安全敏感应用。然而，观察到的行为中隐含的专家偏好结构与专家的环境动态模型（即“世界”模型）密切相关。因此，从覆盖范围有限的有限数据中获得的不准确的世界模型可能会加剧估计奖励的不准确性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了估计任务的双层优化公式，其中上层是基于专家策略的保守模型（下层）的似然最大化。政策模型是保守的，因为它最大化奖励，但会受到惩罚，而惩罚会随着世界估计模型的不确定性而增加。我们提出了一种新的算法框架来解决双层优化问题公式，并为相关的最佳奖励估计器提供性能的统计和计算保证。最后，我们证明，在 MuJoCo 中的连续控制任务和 D4RL 基准中的不同数据集上，所提出的算法大幅优于最先进的离线 IRL 和模仿学习基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最大似然框架的离线逆强化学习方法，通过双层优化联合建模专家策略与环境动力学模型，以提高奖励函数估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有离线逆强化学习方法在有限数据下容易因环境模型不准确导致奖励估计偏差，而专家策略与环境模型存在紧密耦合关系，需联合优化以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计双层优化框架：上层以保守策略模型（含环境不确定性惩罚项）进行似然最大化，下层优化策略模型参数；提出算法框架并提供统计与计算性能保证。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo连续控制任务和D4RL基准数据集上显著优于现有离线逆强化学习与模仿学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模环境动力学与策略的不确定性，该方法在理论保证下实现了更准确的奖励估计，适用于医疗决策等安全敏感场景。

authors_text: Jiajun Lv,Xiaolei Lang,Jinhong Xu,Mengmeng Wang,Yong Liu,Xingxing Zuo
title: Continuous-Time Fixed-Lag Smoothing for LiDAR-Inertial-Camera SLAM
title_zh: LiDAR 惯性相机 SLAM 的连续时间固定滞后平滑
abstract: Localization and mapping with heterogeneous multi-sensor fusion have been prevalent in recent years. To adequately fuse multi-modal sensor measurements received at different time instants and different frequencies, we estimate the continuous-time trajectory by fixed-lag smoothing within a factor-graph optimization framework. With the continuous-time formulation, we can query poses at any time instants corresponding to the sensor measurements. To bound the computation complexity of the continuous-time fixed-lag smoother, we maintain temporal and keyframe sliding windows with constant size, and probabilistically marginalize out control points of the trajectory and other states, which allows preserving prior information for future sliding-window optimization. Based on continuous-time fixed-lag smoothing, we design tightly-coupled multi-modal SLAM algorithms with a variety of sensor combinations, like the LiDAR-inertial and LiDAR-inertial-camera SLAM systems, in which online timeoffset calibration is also naturally supported. More importantly, benefiting from the marginalization and our derived analytical Jacobians for optimization, the proposed continuous-time SLAM systems can achieve real-time performance regardless of the high complexity of continuous-time formulation. The proposed multi-modal SLAM systems have been widely evaluated on three public datasets and self-collect datasets. The results demonstrate that the proposed continuous-time SLAM systems can achieve high-accuracy pose estimations and outperform existing state-of-the-art methods. To benefit the research community, we will open source our code at ~\url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/clic}.
summary: Localization and mapping with heterogeneous multi-sensor fusion have been prevalent in recent years. To adequately fuse multi-modal sensor measurements received at different time instants and different frequencies, we estimate the continuous-time trajectory by fixed-lag smoothing within a factor-graph optimization framework. With the continuous-time formulation, we can query poses at any time instants corresponding to the sensor measurements. To bound the computation complexity of the continuous-time fixed-lag smoother, we maintain temporal and keyframe sliding windows with constant size, and probabilistically marginalize out control points of the trajectory and other states, which allows preserving prior information for future sliding-window optimization. Based on continuous-time fixed-lag smoothing, we design tightly-coupled multi-modal SLAM algorithms with a variety of sensor combinations, like the LiDAR-inertial and LiDAR-inertial-camera SLAM systems, in which online timeoffset calibration is also naturally supported. More importantly, benefiting from the marginalization and our derived analytical Jacobians for optimization, the proposed continuous-time SLAM systems can achieve real-time performance regardless of the high complexity of continuous-time formulation. The proposed multi-modal SLAM systems have been widely evaluated on three public datasets and self-collect datasets. The results demonstrate that the proposed continuous-time SLAM systems can achieve high-accuracy pose estimations and outperform existing state-of-the-art methods. To benefit the research community, we will open source our code at ~\url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/clic}.
abstract_zh: 近年来，异构多传感器融合的定位和测绘已经很流行。为了充分融合在不同时刻和不同频率接收到的多模态传感器测量结果，我们通过因子图优化框架内的固定滞后平滑来估计连续时间轨迹。通过连续时间公式，我们可以查询与传感器测量相对应的任意时刻的姿态。为了限制连续时间固定滞后平滑器的计算复杂性，我们维持时间和关键帧滑动窗口的大小恒定，并概率性地边缘化轨迹和其他状态的控制点，这允许为未来的滑动窗口优化保留先验信息。基于连续时间固定滞后平滑，我们设计了具有多种传感器组合的紧耦合多模态 SLAM 算法，例如激光雷达惯性和激光雷达惯性相机 SLAM 系统，其中也自然支持在线时间偏移校准。更重要的是，受益于边缘化和我们导出的用于优化的分析雅克比行列式，所提出的连续时间 SLAM 系统可以实现实时性能，无论连续时间公式的复杂性如何。所提出的多模态 SLAM 系统已在三个公共数据集和自收集数据集上进行了广泛评估。结果表明，所提出的连续时间 SLAM 系统可以实现高精度位姿估计，并且优于现有的最先进方法。为了让研究社区受益，我们将在 ~\url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/clic} 开源我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于连续时间固定滞后平滑的多模态SLAM方法，融合LiDAR、惯性测量单元和相机数据，实现高精度定位与建图。
AI.motivation: 多传感器数据在不同时间点和频率下采集，传统离散时间方法难以高效融合，且计算复杂度高，需解决实时性与精度的矛盾。
AI.method: 采用连续时间轨迹估计框架，在因子图优化中引入固定滞后平滑，结合滑动时间窗与关键帧管理，通过概率边缘化减少计算量，并推导解析雅可比矩阵以支持在线时间偏移校准。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集和自建数据集上验证，系统实现高精度位姿估计，优于现有先进方法，且保持实时性。
AI.conclusion: 连续时间固定滞后平滑有效解决了多模态传感器融合的计算复杂度问题，为实时高精度SLAM提供了可行方案。

search_text: Continuous-Time Fixed-Lag Smoothing for LiDAR-Inertial-Camera SLAM LiDAR 惯性相机 SLAM 的连续时间固定滞后平滑 Localization and mapping with heterogeneous multi-sensor fusion have been prevalent in recent years. To adequately fuse multi-modal sensor measurements received at different time instants and different frequencies, we estimate the continuous-time trajectory by fixed-lag smoothing within a factor-graph optimization framework. With the continuous-time formulation, we can query poses at any time instants corresponding to the sensor measurements. To bound the computation complexity of the continuous-time fixed-lag smoother, we maintain temporal and keyframe sliding windows with constant size, and probabilistically marginalize out control points of the trajectory and other states, which allows preserving prior information for future sliding-window optimization. Based on continuous-time fixed-lag smoothing, we design tightly-coupled multi-modal SLAM algorithms with a variety of sensor combinations, like the LiDAR-inertial and LiDAR-inertial-camera SLAM systems, in which online timeoffset calibration is also naturally supported. More importantly, benefiting from the marginalization and our derived analytical Jacobians for optimization, the proposed continuous-time SLAM systems can achieve real-time performance regardless of the high complexity of continuous-time formulation. The proposed multi-modal SLAM systems have been widely evaluated on three public datasets and self-collect datasets. The results demonstrate that the proposed continuous-time SLAM systems can achieve high-accuracy pose estimations and outperform existing state-of-the-art methods. To benefit the research community, we will open source our code at ~\url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/clic}. 近年来，异构多传感器融合的定位和测绘已经很流行。为了充分融合在不同时刻和不同频率接收到的多模态传感器测量结果，我们通过因子图优化框架内的固定滞后平滑来估计连续时间轨迹。通过连续时间公式，我们可以查询与传感器测量相对应的任意时刻的姿态。为了限制连续时间固定滞后平滑器的计算复杂性，我们维持时间和关键帧滑动窗口的大小恒定，并概率性地边缘化轨迹和其他状态的控制点，这允许为未来的滑动窗口优化保留先验信息。基于连续时间固定滞后平滑，我们设计了具有多种传感器组合的紧耦合多模态 SLAM 算法，例如激光雷达惯性和激光雷达惯性相机 SLAM 系统，其中也自然支持在线时间偏移校准。更重要的是，受益于边缘化和我们导出的用于优化的分析雅克比行列式，所提出的连续时间 SLAM 系统可以实现实时性能，无论连续时间公式的复杂性如何。所提出的多模态 SLAM 系统已在三个公共数据集和自收集数据集上进行了广泛评估。结果表明，所提出的连续时间 SLAM 系统可以实现高精度位姿估计，并且优于现有的最先进方法。为了让研究社区受益，我们将在 ~\url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/clic} 开源我们的代码。 本文提出了一种基于连续时间固定滞后平滑的多模态SLAM方法，融合LiDAR、惯性测量单元和相机数据，实现高精度定位与建图。 Jiajun Lv,Xiaolei Lang,Jinhong Xu,Mengmeng Wang,Yong Liu,Xingxing Zuo cs.RO

authors_text: Jinxia Zhang,Xinyi Chen,Haikun Wei,Kanjian Zhang
title: A lightweight network for photovoltaic cell defect detection in electroluminescence images based on neural architecture search and knowledge distillation
title_zh: 基于神经架构搜索和知识蒸馏的轻量级电致发光图像光伏电池缺陷检测网络
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures
comments: 12 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Nowadays, the rapid development of photovoltaic(PV) power stations requires increasingly reliable maintenance and fault diagnosis of PV modules in the field. Due to the effectiveness, convolutional neural network (CNN) has been widely used in the existing automatic defect detection of PV cells. However, the parameters of these CNN-based models are very large, which require stringent hardware resources and it is difficult to be applied in actual industrial projects. To solve these problems, we propose a novel lightweight high-performance model for automatic defect detection of PV cells in electroluminescence(EL) images based on neural architecture search and knowledge distillation. To auto-design an effective lightweight model, we introduce neural architecture search to the field of PV cell defect classification for the first time. Since the defect can be any size, we design a proper search structure of network to better exploit the multi-scale characteristic. To improve the overall performance of the searched lightweight model, we further transfer the knowledge learned by the existing pre-trained large-scale model based on knowledge distillation. Different kinds of knowledge are exploited and transferred, including attention information, feature information, logit information and task-oriented information. Experiments have demonstrated that the proposed model achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the public PV cell dataset of EL images under online data augmentation with accuracy of 91.74% and the parameters of 1.85M. The proposed lightweight high-performance model can be easily deployed to the end devices of the actual industrial projects and retain the accuracy.
summary: Nowadays, the rapid development of photovoltaic(PV) power stations requires increasingly reliable maintenance and fault diagnosis of PV modules in the field. Due to the effectiveness, convolutional neural network (CNN) has been widely used in the existing automatic defect detection of PV cells. However, the parameters of these CNN-based models are very large, which require stringent hardware resources and it is difficult to be applied in actual industrial projects. To solve these problems, we propose a novel lightweight high-performance model for automatic defect detection of PV cells in electroluminescence(EL) images based on neural architecture search and knowledge distillation. To auto-design an effective lightweight model, we introduce neural architecture search to the field of PV cell defect classification for the first time. Since the defect can be any size, we design a proper search structure of network to better exploit the multi-scale characteristic. To improve the overall performance of the searched lightweight model, we further transfer the knowledge learned by the existing pre-trained large-scale model based on knowledge distillation. Different kinds of knowledge are exploited and transferred, including attention information, feature information, logit information and task-oriented information. Experiments have demonstrated that the proposed model achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the public PV cell dataset of EL images under online data augmentation with accuracy of 91.74% and the parameters of 1.85M. The proposed lightweight high-performance model can be easily deployed to the end devices of the actual industrial projects and retain the accuracy.
abstract_zh: 如今，光伏电站的快速发展对光伏组件的现场维护和故障诊断提出了越来越可靠的要求。由于其有效性，卷积神经网络（CNN）已广泛应用于现有的光伏电池缺陷自动检测中。然而，这些基于CNN的模型参数非常大，对硬件资源要求严格，很难在实际工业项目中应用。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于神经架构搜索和知识蒸馏的新型轻量级高性能模型，用于电致发光（EL）图像中光伏电池缺陷的自动检测。为了自动设计有效的轻量级模型，我们首次将神经架构搜索引入光伏电池缺陷分类领域。由于缺陷可以是任意大小，因此我们设计了适当的网络搜索结构，以更好地利用多尺度特征。为了提高搜索到的轻量级模型的整体性能，我们基于知识蒸馏进一步迁移现有预训练的大规模模型所学到的知识。不同类型的知识被利用和转移，包括注意力信息、特征信息、逻辑信息和面向任务的信息。实验表明，该模型在在线数据增强的公共光伏电池数据集上实现了最先进的性能，准确率为 91.74%，参数为 1.85M。所提出的轻量级高性能模型可以轻松部署到实际工业项目的终端设备并保持准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经架构搜索和知识蒸馏的轻量级网络，用于光伏电池电致发光图像的缺陷检测。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN模型参数量大，硬件需求高，难以在实际工业场景中部署，需开发轻量级高性能模型。
AI.method: 首次将神经架构搜索引入光伏缺陷分类，设计多尺度网络结构，并通过知识蒸馏迁移预训练大模型的注意力、特征、logit及任务知识。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实现91.74%的准确率，参数量仅1.85M，可有效部署于工业终端设备。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轻量级模型在保持高精度的同时显著降低硬件需求，适用于光伏模块的实际缺陷检测场景。

authors_text: Ada Martin,Valerie Chen,Sérgio Jesus,Pedro Saleiro
title: A Case Study on Designing Evaluations of ML Explanations with Simulated User Studies
title_zh: 通过模拟用户研究设计机器学习解释评估的案例研究
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures. Will appear in ICLR 2023's TrustML-(un)Limited workshop
comments: 9 pages, 2 figures. Will appear in ICLR 2023's TrustML-(un)Limited workshop
abstract: When conducting user studies to ascertain the usefulness of model explanations in aiding human decision-making, it is important to use real-world use cases, data, and users. However, this process can be resource-intensive, allowing only a limited number of explanation methods to be evaluated. Simulated user evaluations (SimEvals), which use machine learning models as a proxy for human users, have been proposed as an intermediate step to select promising explanation methods. In this work, we conduct the first SimEvals on a real-world use case to evaluate whether explanations can better support ML-assisted decision-making in e-commerce fraud detection. We study whether SimEvals can corroborate findings from a user study conducted in this fraud detection context. In particular, we find that SimEvals suggest that all considered explainers are equally performant, and none beat a baseline without explanations -- this matches the conclusions of the original user study. Such correspondences between our results and the original user study provide initial evidence in favor of using SimEvals before running user studies. We also explore the use of SimEvals as a cheap proxy to explore an alternative user study set-up. We hope that this work motivates further study of when and how SimEvals should be used to aid in the design of real-world evaluations.
summary: When conducting user studies to ascertain the usefulness of model explanations in aiding human decision-making, it is important to use real-world use cases, data, and users. In particular, we find that SimEvals suggest that all considered explainers are equally performant, and none beat a baseline without explanations -- this matches the conclusions of the original user study. Such correspondences between our results and the original user study provide initial evidence in favor of using SimEvals before running user studies. We also explore the use of SimEvals as a cheap proxy to explore an alternative user study set-up. We hope that this work motivates further study of when and how SimEvals should be used to aid in the design of real-world evaluations.
abstract_zh: 在进行用户研究以确定模型解释在帮助人类决策方面的有用性时，使用现实世界的用例、数据和用户非常重要。然而，这个过程可能是资源密集型的，只允许评估有限数量的解释方法。模拟用户评估（SimEvals）使用机器学习模型作为人类用户的代理，已被提议作为选择有前途的解释方法的中间步骤。在这项工作中，我们对现实世界的用例进行了首次 SimEvals，以评估解释是否可以更好地支持电子商务欺诈检测中的 ML 辅助决策。我们研究 SimEvals 是否可以证实在欺诈检测背景下进行的用户研究的结果。特别是，我们发现 SimEvals 表明所有考虑的解释器都具有相同的性能，并且没有一个在没有解释的情况下超越了基线 - 这与原始用户研究的结论相匹配。我们的结果与原始用户研究之间的这种对应关系为在进行用户研究之前使用 SimEvals 提供了初步证据。我们还探索使用 SimEvals 作为廉价代理来探索替代的用户研究设置。我们希望这项工作能够激发进一步研究何时以及如何使用 SimEvals 来帮助设计现实世界的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文通过模拟用户评估（SimEvals）研究机器学习解释方法在电商欺诈检测中的有效性，验证其是否能支持ML辅助决策。
AI.motivation: 真实用户研究成本高昂且难以覆盖多种解释方法，需寻找低成本替代方案以预筛选有效解释方法。
AI.method: 基于真实场景设计模拟用户评估，对比不同解释方法在欺诈检测任务中的表现，并与真实用户研究结果进行对照分析。
AI.result: 模拟评估显示所有解释方法效果与无解释基线相当，与真实用户研究结论一致，证明SimEvals的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SimEvals可作为真实用户研究的低成本预筛选工具，未来需进一步探索其适用场景与优化方式。

search_text: A Case Study on Designing Evaluations of ML Explanations with Simulated User Studies 通过模拟用户研究设计机器学习解释评估的案例研究 When conducting user studies to ascertain the usefulness of model explanations in aiding human decision-making, it is important to use real-world use cases, data, and users. However, this process can be resource-intensive, allowing only a limited number of explanation methods to be evaluated. Simulated user evaluations (SimEvals), which use machine learning models as a proxy for human users, have been proposed as an intermediate step to select promising explanation methods. In this work, we conduct the first SimEvals on a real-world use case to evaluate whether explanations can better support ML-assisted decision-making in e-commerce fraud detection. We study whether SimEvals can corroborate findings from a user study conducted in this fraud detection context. In particular, we find that SimEvals suggest that all considered explainers are equally performant, and none beat a baseline without explanations -- this matches the conclusions of the original user study. Such correspondences between our results and the original user study provide initial evidence in favor of using SimEvals before running user studies. We also explore the use of SimEvals as a cheap proxy to explore an alternative user study set-up. We hope that this work motivates further study of when and how SimEvals should be used to aid in the design of real-world evaluations. 在进行用户研究以确定模型解释在帮助人类决策方面的有用性时，使用现实世界的用例、数据和用户非常重要。然而，这个过程可能是资源密集型的，只允许评估有限数量的解释方法。模拟用户评估（SimEvals）使用机器学习模型作为人类用户的代理，已被提议作为选择有前途的解释方法的中间步骤。在这项工作中，我们对现实世界的用例进行了首次 SimEvals，以评估解释是否可以更好地支持电子商务欺诈检测中的 ML 辅助决策。我们研究 SimEvals 是否可以证实在欺诈检测背景下进行的用户研究的结果。特别是，我们发现 SimEvals 表明所有考虑的解释器都具有相同的性能，并且没有一个在没有解释的情况下超越了基线 - 这与原始用户研究的结论相匹配。我们的结果与原始用户研究之间的这种对应关系为在进行用户研究之前使用 SimEvals 提供了初步证据。我们还探索使用 SimEvals 作为廉价代理来探索替代的用户研究设置。我们希望这项工作能够激发进一步研究何时以及如何使用 SimEvals 来帮助设计现实世界的评估。 本文通过模拟用户评估（SimEvals）研究机器学习解释方法在电商欺诈检测中的有效性，验证其是否能支持ML辅助决策。 Ada Martin,Valerie Chen,Sérgio Jesus,Pedro Saleiro cs.LG,cs.HC

authors_text: Sumit Mishra,Medhavi Mishra,Taeyoung Kim,Dongsoo Har
title: Road Redesign Technique Achieving Enhanced Road Safety by Inpainting with a Diffusion Model
title_zh: 道路重新设计技术通过扩散模型修复增强道路安全
comment: 9 Pages, 6 figures, 4 tables
comments: 9 Pages, 6 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Road infrastructure can affect the occurrence of road accidents. Therefore, identifying roadway features with high accident probability is crucial. Here, we introduce image inpainting that can assist authorities in achieving safe roadway design with minimal intervention in the current roadway structure. Image inpainting is based on inpainting safe roadway elements in a roadway image, replacing accident-prone (AP) features by using a diffusion model. After object-level segmentation, the AP features identified by the properties of accident hotspots are masked by a human operator and safe roadway elements are inpainted. With only an average time of 2 min for image inpainting, the likelihood of an image being classified as an accident hotspot drops by an average of 11.85%. In addition, safe urban spaces can be designed considering human factors of commuters such as gaze saliency. Considering this, we introduce saliency enhancement that suggests chrominance alteration for a safe road view.
summary: Road infrastructure can affect the occurrence of road accidents. Therefore, identifying roadway features with high accident probability is crucial. Here, we introduce image inpainting that can assist authorities in achieving safe roadway design with minimal intervention in the current roadway structure. Image inpainting is based on inpainting safe roadway elements in a roadway image, replacing accident-prone (AP) features by using a diffusion model. After object-level segmentation, the AP features identified by the properties of accident hotspots are masked by a human operator and safe roadway elements are inpainted. With only an average time of 2 min for image inpainting, the likelihood of an image being classified as an accident hotspot drops by an average of 11.85%. In addition, safe urban spaces can be designed considering human factors of commuters such as gaze saliency. Considering this, we introduce saliency enhancement that suggests chrominance alteration for a safe road view.
abstract_zh: 道路基础设施会影响道路事故的发生。因此，识别事故概率高的巷道特征至关重要。在这里，我们介绍图像修复，它可以帮助当局在对当前道路结构的干预最小化的情况下实现安全的道路设计。图像修复基于修复道路图像中的安全道路元素，通过使用扩散模型替换容易发生事故（AP）的特征。在对象级分割之后，由事故热点的属性识别的 AP 特征被操作员掩盖，并且安全道路元素被修复。平均图像修复时间仅为 2 分钟，图像被分类为事故热点的可能性平均下降 11.85%。此外，安全的城市空间的设计可以考虑通勤者的人为因素，例如目光显着性。考虑到这一点，我们引入了显着性增强，建议改变色度以获得安全的道路视图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的图像修复技术，用于改进道路设计以提高道路安全。
AI.motivation: 道路基础设施影响交通事故发生率，需识别高风险区域并进行安全设计，但传统方法干预较大，需更高效手段。
AI.method: 采用扩散模型进行图像修复，通过对象级分割后人工标记事故热点区域并替换为安全元素，结合视线显著性优化色度。
AI.result: 图像修复平均耗时2分钟，事故热点分类概率下降11.85%，且考虑人类因素提升道路安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低事故热点风险，结合人类视觉因素优化设计，为智能道路安全改进提供新思路。

authors_text: Huan Yin,Xuecheng Xu,Sha Lu,Xieyuanli Chen,Rong Xiong,Shaojie Shen,Cyrill Stachniss,Yue Wang
title: A Survey on Global LiDAR Localization: Challenges, Advances and Open Problems
title_zh: 全球激光雷达定位调查：挑战、进展和未决问题
comment: Publishe on International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
comments: Publishe on International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
abstract: Knowledge about the own pose is key for all mobile robot applications. Thus pose estimation is part of the core functionalities of mobile robots. Over the last two decades, LiDAR scanners have become the standard sensor for robot localization and mapping. This article aims to provide an overview of recent progress and advancements in LiDAR-based global localization. We begin by formulating the problem and exploring the application scope. We then present a review of the methodology, including recent advancements in several topics, such as maps, descriptor extraction, and cross-robot localization. The contents of the article are organized under three themes. The first theme concerns the combination of global place retrieval and local pose estimation. The second theme is upgrading single-shot measurements to sequential ones for sequential global localization. Finally, the third theme focuses on extending single-robot global localization to cross-robot localization in multi-robot systems. We conclude the survey with a discussion of open challenges and promising directions in global LiDAR localization. To our best knowledge, this is the first comprehensive survey on global LiDAR localization for mobile robots.
summary: Knowledge about the own pose is key for all mobile robot applications. Thus pose estimation is part of the core functionalities of mobile robots. Over the last two decades, LiDAR scanners have become the standard sensor for robot localization and mapping. This article aims to provide an overview of recent progress and advancements in LiDAR-based global localization. We begin by formulating the problem and exploring the application scope. We then present a review of the methodology, including recent advancements in several topics, such as maps, descriptor extraction, and cross-robot localization. The contents of the article are organized under three themes. The first theme concerns the combination of global place retrieval and local pose estimation. The second theme is upgrading single-shot measurements to sequential ones for sequential global localization. Finally, the third theme focuses on extending single-robot global localization to cross-robot localization in multi-robot systems. We conclude the survey with a discussion of open challenges and promising directions in global LiDAR localization. To our best knowledge, this is the first comprehensive survey on global LiDAR localization for mobile robots.
abstract_zh: 了解自身姿态是所有移动机器人应用的关键。因此，姿态估计是移动机器人核心功能的一部分。在过去的二十年中，激光雷达扫描仪已成为机器人定位和测绘的标准传感器。本文旨在概述基于激光雷达的全球定位的最新进展和进展。我们首先提出问题并探索应用范围。然后，我们对该方法进行回顾，包括地图、描述符提取和跨机器人定位等多个主题的最新进展。本文的内容分为三个主题。第一个主题涉及全局位置检索和局部姿态估计的结合。第二个主题是将单次测量升级为连续测量，以实现连续的全局定位。最后，第三个主题侧重于将单机器人全局定位扩展到多机器人系统中的跨机器人定位。我们在调查结束时讨论了全球激光雷达本地化的开放挑战和有希望的方向。据我们所知，这是首次针对移动机器人全球激光雷达定位的全面调查。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了全球激光雷达定位领域的最新进展、挑战及开放问题，重点分析了三种主题下的方法与技术。
AI.motivation: 激光雷达定位是移动机器人核心功能，但现有研究缺乏系统性综述，需总结技术进展并指出未来方向。
AI.method: 通过三个主题组织内容：全局位置检索与局部定位结合、单次测量升级为序列定位、多机器人跨机器人定位扩展。
AI.result: 系统梳理了地图构建、特征提取等方法，明确了当前技术瓶颈与跨机器人定位等新兴方向的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本文为首个全面覆盖激光雷达全局定位的综述，为后续研究提供了技术路线图与开放问题框架。

method: 通过三个主题组织内容：全局位置检索与局部定位结合、单次测量升级为序列定位、多机器人跨机器人定位扩展。
result: 系统梳理了地图构建、特征提取等方法，明确了当前技术瓶颈与跨机器人定位等新兴方向的挑战。
conclusion: 本文为首个全面覆盖激光雷达全局定位的综述，为后续研究提供了技术路线图与开放问题框架。
search_text: A Survey on Global LiDAR Localization: Challenges, Advances and Open Problems 全球激光雷达定位调查：挑战、进展和未决问题 Knowledge about the own pose is key for all mobile robot applications. Thus pose estimation is part of the core functionalities of mobile robots. Over the last two decades, LiDAR scanners have become the standard sensor for robot localization and mapping. This article aims to provide an overview of recent progress and advancements in LiDAR-based global localization. We begin by formulating the problem and exploring the application scope. We then present a review of the methodology, including recent advancements in several topics, such as maps, descriptor extraction, and cross-robot localization. The contents of the article are organized under three themes. The first theme concerns the combination of global place retrieval and local pose estimation. The second theme is upgrading single-shot measurements to sequential ones for sequential global localization. Finally, the third theme focuses on extending single-robot global localization to cross-robot localization in multi-robot systems. We conclude the survey with a discussion of open challenges and promising directions in global LiDAR localization. To our best knowledge, this is the first comprehensive survey on global LiDAR localization for mobile robots. 了解自身姿态是所有移动机器人应用的关键。因此，姿态估计是移动机器人核心功能的一部分。在过去的二十年中，激光雷达扫描仪已成为机器人定位和测绘的标准传感器。本文旨在概述基于激光雷达的全球定位的最新进展和进展。我们首先提出问题并探索应用范围。然后，我们对该方法进行回顾，包括地图、描述符提取和跨机器人定位等多个主题的最新进展。本文的内容分为三个主题。第一个主题涉及全局位置检索和局部姿态估计的结合。第二个主题是将单次测量升级为连续测量，以实现连续的全局定位。最后，第三个主题侧重于将单机器人全局定位扩展到多机器人系统中的跨机器人定位。我们在调查结束时讨论了全球激光雷达本地化的开放挑战和有希望的方向。据我们所知，这是首次针对移动机器人全球激光雷达定位的全面调查。 本文综述了全球激光雷达定位领域的最新进展、挑战及开放问题，重点分析了三种主题下的方法与技术。 Huan Yin,Xuecheng Xu,Sha Lu,Xieyuanli Chen,Rong Xiong,Shaojie Shen,Cyrill Stachniss,Yue Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Lei Zhang,Mingliang Wang,Xin Zhou,Xingyu Wu,Yiming Cao,Yonghui Xu,Lizhen Cui,Zhiqi Shen
title: Dual Graph Multitask Framework for Imbalanced Delivery Time Estimation
title_zh: 用于不平衡交付时间估计的双图多任务框架
comment: Accepted by DASFAA 2023 Industry Track
comments: Accepted by DASFAA 2023 Industry Track
abstract: Delivery Time Estimation (DTE) is a crucial component of the e-commerce supply chain that predicts delivery time based on merchant information, sending address, receiving address, and payment time. Accurate DTE can boost platform revenue and reduce customer complaints and refunds. However, the imbalanced nature of industrial data impedes previous models from reaching satisfactory prediction performance. Although imbalanced regression methods can be applied to the DTE task, we experimentally find that they improve the prediction performance of low-shot data samples at the sacrifice of overall performance. To address the issue, we propose a novel Dual Graph Multitask framework for imbalanced Delivery Time Estimation (DGM-DTE). Our framework first classifies package delivery time as head and tail data. Then, a dual graph-based model is utilized to learn representations of the two categories of data. In particular, DGM-DTE re-weights the embedding of tail data by estimating its kernel density. We fuse two graph-based representations to capture both high- and low-shot data representations. Experiments on real-world Taobao logistics datasets demonstrate the superior performance of DGM-DTE compared to baselines.
summary: Delivery Time Estimation (DTE) is a crucial component of the e-commerce supply chain that predicts delivery time based on merchant information, sending address, receiving address, and payment time. Accurate DTE can boost platform revenue and reduce customer complaints and refunds. However, the imbalanced nature of industrial data impedes previous models from reaching satisfactory prediction performance. Although imbalanced regression methods can be applied to the DTE task, we experimentally find that they improve the prediction performance of low-shot data samples at the sacrifice of overall performance. To address the issue, we propose a novel Dual Graph Multitask framework for imbalanced Delivery Time Estimation (DGM-DTE). Our framework first classifies package delivery time as head and tail data. Then, a dual graph-based model is utilized to learn representations of the two categories of data. In particular, DGM-DTE re-weights the embedding of tail data by estimating its kernel density. We fuse two graph-based representations to capture both high- and low-shot data representations. Experiments on real-world Taobao logistics datasets demonstrate the superior performance of DGM-DTE compared to baselines.
abstract_zh: 配送时间估算（DTE）是电子商务供应链的重要组成部分，它根据商户信息、发送地址、接收地址和付款时间来预测配送时间。准确的DTE可以提高平台收入并减少客户投诉和退款。然而，工业数据的不平衡性阻碍了先前的模型达到令人满意的预测性能。尽管不平衡回归方法可以应用于 DTE 任务，但我们通过实验发现它们以牺牲整体性能为代价来提高低样本数据样本的预测性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的用于不平衡交付时间估计的双图多任务框架（DGM-DTE）。我们的框架首先将包裹递送时间分类为头数据和尾数据。然后，利用基于对偶图的模型来学习两类数据的表示。特别是，DGM-DTE 通过估计其核密度来重新加权尾部数据的嵌入。我们融合两种基于图的表示来捕获高样本和低样本数据表示。在真实淘宝物流数据集上的实验表明，与基线相比，DGM-DTE 具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双图多任务框架（DGM-DTE），用于解决电商物流中因数据不平衡导致的配送时间估计（DTE）性能不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有不平衡回归方法在提升低样本数据预测性能时会牺牲整体表现，而工业数据的不平衡特性阻碍了DTE模型的准确预测。
AI.method: 通过将配送数据分为头部（高频）和尾部（低频）两类，构建双图模型学习两类数据表示，并利用核密度估计对尾部数据嵌入进行重加权，最终融合双图表示以捕捉高低频数据特征。
AI.result: 在淘宝真实物流数据集上的实验表明，DGM-DTE相比基线方法在预测性能上具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 双图多任务框架有效解决了DTE任务中数据不平衡问题，为工业场景下的时间估计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Majeed Kazemitabaar,Justin Chow,Carl Ka To Ma,Barbara J. Ericson,David Weintrop,Tovi Grossman
title: Studying the effect of AI Code Generators on Supporting Novice Learners in Introductory Programming
title_zh: 研究人工智能代码生成器对入门编程新手的支持效果
comment: To be published in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23--28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany 17 pages with 11 Figures, 2 Tables, 6 Page Appendix
comments: To be published in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23--28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany 17 pages with 11 Figures, 2 Tables, 6 Page Appendix
abstract: AI code generators like OpenAI Codex have the potential to assist novice programmers by generating code from natural language descriptions, however, over-reliance might negatively impact learning and retention. To explore the implications that AI code generators have on introductory programming, we conducted a controlled experiment with 69 novices (ages 10-17). Learners worked on 45 Python code-authoring tasks, for which half of the learners had access to Codex, each followed by a code-modification task. Our results show that using Codex significantly increased code-authoring performance (1.15x increased completion rate and 1.8x higher scores) while not decreasing performance on manual code-modification tasks. Additionally, learners with access to Codex during the training phase performed slightly better on the evaluation post-tests conducted one week later, although this difference did not reach statistical significance. Of interest, learners with higher Scratch pre-test scores performed significantly better on retention post-tests, if they had prior access to Codex.
summary: AI code generators like OpenAI Codex have the potential to assist novice programmers by generating code from natural language descriptions, however, over-reliance might negatively impact learning and retention. To explore the implications that AI code generators have on introductory programming, we conducted a controlled experiment with 69 novices (ages 10-17). Learners worked on 45 Python code-authoring tasks, for which half of the learners had access to Codex, each followed by a code-modification task. Our results show that using Codex significantly increased code-authoring performance (1.15x increased completion rate and 1.8x higher scores) while not decreasing performance on manual code-modification tasks. Additionally, learners with access to Codex during the training phase performed slightly better on the evaluation post-tests conducted one week later, although this difference did not reach statistical significance. Of interest, learners with higher Scratch pre-test scores performed significantly better on retention post-tests, if they had prior access to Codex.
abstract_zh: 像 OpenAI Codex 这样的人工智能代码生成器有潜力通过自然语言描述生成代码来帮助新手程序员，但是，过度依赖可能会对学习和保留产生负面影响。为了探索 AI 代码生成器对入门编程的影响，我们对 69 名新手（10-17 岁）进行了一项对照实验。学习者完成了 45 个 Python 代码编写任务，其中一半的学习者可以访问 Codex，每个任务后面都有一个代码修改任务。我们的结果表明，使用 Codex 显着提高了代码创作性能（完成率提高了 1.15 倍，分数提高了 1.8 倍），同时不会降低手动代码修改任务的性能。此外，在培训阶段访问 Codex 的学习者在一周后进行的评估后测试中表现稍好，尽管这种差异并未达到统计显着性。有趣的是，如果 Scratch 预测试分数较高的学习者事先访问过 Codex，他们在记忆后测试中的表现会明显更好。

AI.tldr: 研究AI代码生成器对入门编程新手学习者的影响
AI.motivation: AI代码生成器可能帮助新手程序员生成代码，但过度依赖可能影响学习效果，需验证其实际教学效果
AI.method: 对69名10-17岁新手进行对照实验，半数学员使用Codex完成45个Python编程任务及后续代码修改任务
AI.result: 使用Codex组代码完成率提升1.15倍，得分提高1.8倍；未影响代码修改能力；一周后测试表现略优但未达显著性；Scratch基础好的学员使用Codex后保留测试表现更佳
AI.conclusion: AI代码生成器可提升新手编程表现且不损害代码理解能力，但需平衡工具依赖与自主学习的关系

authors_text: Kiarash Banihashem,MohammadTaghi Hajiaghayi,Suho Shin,Aleksandrs Slivkins
title: Bandit Social Learning: Exploration under Myopic Behavior
title_zh: Bandit 社交学习：短视行为下的探索
comment: Extended version of NeurIPS 2023 paper titled "Bandit Social Learning under Myopic Behavior"
comments: Extended version of NeurIPS 2023 paper titled "Bandit Social Learning under Myopic Behavior"
abstract: We study social learning dynamics motivated by reviews on online platforms. The agents collectively follow a simple multi-armed bandit protocol, but each agent acts myopically, without regards to exploration. We allow the greedy (exploitation-only) algorithm, as well as a wide range of behavioral biases. Specifically, we allow myopic behaviors that are consistent with (parameterized) confidence intervals for the arms' expected rewards. We derive stark learning failures for any such behavior, and provide matching positive results. The learning-failure results extend to Bayesian agents and Bayesian bandit environments. In particular, we obtain general, quantitatively strong results on failure of the greedy bandit algorithm, both for ``frequentist" and ``Bayesian" versions. Failure results known previously are quantitatively weak, and either trivial or very specialized. Thus, we provide a theoretical foundation for designing non-trivial bandit algorithms, \ie algorithms that intentionally explore, which has been missing from the literature. Our general behavioral model can be interpreted as agents' optimism or pessimism. The matching positive results entail a maximal allowed amount of optimism. Moreover, we find that no amount of pessimism helps against the learning failures, whereas even a small-but-constant fraction of extreme optimists avoids the failures and leads to near-optimal regret rates.
summary: We study social learning dynamics motivated by reviews on online platforms. The agents collectively follow a simple multi-armed bandit protocol, but each agent acts myopically, without regards to exploration. We allow the greedy (exploitation-only) algorithm, as well as a wide range of behavioral biases. Specifically, we allow myopic behaviors that are consistent with (parameterized) confidence intervals for the arms' expected rewards. We derive stark learning failures for any such behavior, and provide matching positive results. The learning-failure results extend to Bayesian agents and Bayesian bandit environments. In particular, we obtain general, quantitatively strong results on failure of the greedy bandit algorithm, both for ``frequentist" and ``Bayesian" versions. Failure results known previously are quantitatively weak, and either trivial or very specialized. Thus, we provide a theoretical foundation for designing non-trivial bandit algorithms, \ie algorithms that intentionally explore, which has been missing from the literature. Our general behavioral model can be interpreted as agents' optimism or pessimism. The matching positive results entail a maximal allowed amount of optimism. Moreover, we find that no amount of pessimism helps against the learning failures, whereas even a small-but-constant fraction of extreme optimists avoids the failures and leads to near-optimal regret rates.
abstract_zh: 我们研究由在线平台上的评论激发的社会学习动态。这些智能体共同遵循一个简单的多臂老虎机协议，但每个智能体的行为都是短视的，不考虑探索。我们允许贪婪（仅利用）算法，以及广泛的行为偏差。具体来说，我们允许与手臂预期奖励的（参数化）置信区间一致的短视行为。对于任何此类行为，我们都会得出明显的学习失败结果，并提供匹配的积极结果。学习失败结果扩展到贝叶斯代理和贝叶斯强盗环境。特别是，我们在“频率论”和“贝叶斯”版本的贪婪老虎机算法失败时获得了普遍的、定量的强有力的结果。以前已知的失败结果在数量上很弱，并且要么微不足道，要么非常专业。因此，我们为设计非平凡老虎机算法提供了理论基础，即有意探索的算法，而这在文献中是缺失的。我们的一般行为模型可以解释为代理人的乐观或悲观。匹配的积极结果需要最大允许的乐观情绪。此外，我们发现，再多的悲观主义也无助于防止学习失败，而即使是一小部分但持续存在的极端乐观主义者也能避免失败，并导致接近最佳的后悔率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多臂老虎机框架下，由于代理者短视行为导致的社会学习动态，分析了仅利用无探索策略的失败案例，并提出了乐观主义者的积极结果。
AI.motivation: 在线平台评论等场景中，代理者常因短视行为（如仅贪心选择）导致学习失败，但现有理论缺乏对非平凡探索算法的设计基础。
AI.method: 构建参数化置信区间模型，分析贪婪算法及行为偏差，并扩展至贝叶斯框架，通过理论推导量化学习失败与乐观主义者的正面影响。
AI.result: 证明所有短视行为均导致学习失败，但少量极端乐观者可避免失败并实现近最优遗憾率，而悲观主义无帮助。
AI.conclusion: 需设计主动探索的算法以克服短视行为缺陷，本文模型为非平凡算法提供了理论依据。

Specifically, we allow myopic behaviors that are consistent with (parameterized) confidence intervals for the arms' expected rewards. We derive stark learning failures for any such behavior, and provide matching positive results. The learning-failure results extend to Bayesian agents and Bayesian bandit environments. In particular, we obtain general, quantitatively strong results on failure of the greedy bandit algorithm, both for ``frequentist" and ``Bayesian" versions. Failure results known previously are quantitatively weak, and either trivial or very specialized. Thus, we provide a theoretical foundation for designing non-trivial bandit algorithms, \ie algorithms that intentionally explore, which has been missing from the literature. Our general behavioral model can be interpreted as agents' optimism or pessimism. The matching positive results entail a maximal allowed amount of optimism. Moreover, we find that no amount of pessimism helps against the learning failures, whereas even a small-but-constant fraction of extreme optimists avoids the failures and leads to near-optimal regret rates. 我们研究由在线平台上的评论激发的社会学习动态。这些智能体共同遵循一个简单的多臂老虎机协议，但每个智能体的行为都是短视的，不考虑探索。我们允许贪婪（仅利用）算法，以及广泛的行为偏差。具体来说，我们允许与手臂预期奖励的（参数化）置信区间一致的短视行为。对于任何此类行为，我们都会得出明显的学习失败结果，并提供匹配的积极结果。学习失败结果扩展到贝叶斯代理和贝叶斯强盗环境。特别是，我们在“频率论”和“贝叶斯”版本的贪婪老虎机算法失败时获得了普遍的、定量的强有力的结果。以前已知的失败结果在数量上很弱，并且要么微不足道，要么非常专业。因此，我们为设计非平凡老虎机算法提供了理论基础，即有意探索的算法，而这在文献中是缺失的。我们的一般行为模型可以解释为代理人的乐观或悲观。匹配的积极结果需要最大允许的乐观情绪。此外，我们发现，再多的悲观主义也无助于防止学习失败，而即使是一小部分但持续存在的极端乐观主义者也能避免失败，并导致接近最佳的后悔率。 本文研究了在多臂老虎机框架下，由于代理者短视行为导致的社会学习动态，分析了仅利用无探索策略的失败案例，并提出了乐观主义者的积极结果。 Kiarash Banihashem,MohammadTaghi Hajiaghayi,Suho Shin,Aleksandrs Slivkins cs.GT,cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Jasper De Bock
title: A theory of desirable things
title_zh: 理想事物的理论
abstract: Inspired by the theory of desirable gambles that is used to model uncertainty in the field of imprecise probabilities, I present a theory of desirable things. Its aim is to model a subject's beliefs about which things are desirable. What the things are is not important, nor is what it means for them to be desirable. It can be applied to gambles, calling them desirable if a subject accepts them, but it can just as well be applied to pizzas, calling them desirable if my friend Arthur likes to eat them. Other useful examples of things one might apply this theory to are propositions, horse lotteries, or preferences between any of the above. Regardless of the particular things that are considered, inference rules are imposed by means of an abstract closure operator, and models that adhere to these rules are called coherent. I consider two types of models, each of which can capture a subject's beliefs about which things are desirable: sets of desirable things and sets of desirable sets of things. A crucial result is that the latter type can be represented by a set of the former.
summary: Inspired by the theory of desirable gambles that is used to model uncertainty in the field of imprecise probabilities, I present a theory of desirable things. Its aim is to model a subject's beliefs about which things are desirable. What the things are is not important, nor is what it means for them to be desirable. It can be applied to gambles, calling them desirable if a subject accepts them, but it can just as well be applied to pizzas, calling them desirable if my friend Arthur likes to eat them. Other useful examples of things one might apply this theory to are propositions, horse lotteries, or preferences between any of the above. Regardless of the particular things that are considered, inference rules are imposed by means of an abstract closure operator, and models that adhere to these rules are called coherent. I consider two types of models, each of which can capture a subject's beliefs about which things are desirable: sets of desirable things and sets of desirable sets of things. A crucial result is that the latter type can be represented by a set of the former.
abstract_zh: 受用于模拟不精确概率领域的不确定性的理想赌博理论的启发，我提出了一种理想事物理论。其目的是模拟受试者对哪些事物是可取的的信念。事物是什么并不重要，它们令人向往的意义也不重要。它可以应用于赌博，如果受试者接受它们，则称它们为可取的，但它也可以应用于比萨饼，如果我的朋友亚瑟喜欢吃它们，则称它们为可取的。其他有用的例子可以应用这一理论，包括命题、彩票或上述任何一项之间的偏好。无论考虑什么特定事物，推理规则都是通过抽象闭包运算符强加的，遵守这些规则的模型被称为一致的。我考虑两种类型的模型，每种模型都可以捕获主体对哪些事物是可取的的信念：可取的事物集和可取的事物集。一个关键的结果是后一种类型可以由前一种类型的集合来表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种建模主体对事物可取性信念的理论，适用于赌注、披萨、命题等多种对象。
AI.motivation: 受模糊概率领域可取赌注理论启发，需扩展至更广泛的事物类型并建立统一推理框架。
AI.method: 通过抽象闭包算子定义推理规则，构建两类模型：可取事物集合与可取事物集合的集合。
AI.result: 证明第二类模型可由第一类模型的集合表示，建立二者间的数学映射关系。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为多类型对象的可取性建模提供统一框架，深化了模糊概率与决策理论的分析工具。

authors_text: Han Li,Bowen Shi,Wenrui Dai,Hongwei Zheng,Botao Wang,Yu Sun,Min Guo,Chenlin Li,Junni Zou,Hongkai Xiong
title: Pose-Oriented Transformer with Uncertainty-Guided Refinement for 2D-to-3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 具有不确定性引导细化的面向姿势的 Transformer，用于 2D 到 3D 人体姿势估计
comment: accepted by AAAI2023
comments: accepted by AAAI2023
abstract: There has been a recent surge of interest in introducing transformers to 3D human pose estimation (HPE) due to their powerful capabilities in modeling long-term dependencies. However, existing transformer-based methods treat body joints as equally important inputs and ignore the prior knowledge of human skeleton topology in the self-attention mechanism. To tackle this issue, in this paper, we propose a Pose-Oriented Transformer (POT) with uncertainty guided refinement for 3D HPE. Specifically, we first develop novel pose-oriented self-attention mechanism and distance-related position embedding for POT to explicitly exploit the human skeleton topology. The pose-oriented self-attention mechanism explicitly models the topological interactions between body joints, whereas the distance-related position embedding encodes the distance of joints to the root joint to distinguish groups of joints with different difficulties in regression. Furthermore, we present an Uncertainty-Guided Refinement Network (UGRN) to refine pose predictions from POT, especially for the difficult joints, by considering the estimated uncertainty of each joint with uncertainty-guided sampling strategy and self-attention mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with reduced model parameters on 3D HPE benchmarks such as Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP
summary: There has been a recent surge of interest in introducing transformers to 3D human pose estimation (HPE) due to their powerful capabilities in modeling long-term dependencies. However, existing transformer-based methods treat body joints as equally important inputs and ignore the prior knowledge of human skeleton topology in the self-attention mechanism. To tackle this issue, in this paper, we propose a Pose-Oriented Transformer (POT) with uncertainty guided refinement for 3D HPE. Specifically, we first develop novel pose-oriented self-attention mechanism and distance-related position embedding for POT to explicitly exploit the human skeleton topology. The pose-oriented self-attention mechanism explicitly models the topological interactions between body joints, whereas the distance-related position embedding encodes the distance of joints to the root joint to distinguish groups of joints with different difficulties in regression. Furthermore, we present an Uncertainty-Guided Refinement Network (UGRN) to refine pose predictions from POT, especially for the difficult joints, by considering the estimated uncertainty of each joint with uncertainty-guided sampling strategy and self-attention mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with reduced model parameters on 3D HPE benchmarks such as Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP
abstract_zh: 最近，人们对将 Transformer 引入 3D 人体姿态估计 (HPE) 的兴趣激增，因为它们在建模长期依赖性方面具有强大的能力。然而，现有的基于变压器的方法将身体关节视为同等重要的输入，并忽略了自注意力机制中人体骨骼拓扑的先验知识。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种针对 3D HPE 的不确定性引导细化的姿势导向变换器 (POT)。具体来说，我们首先为 POT 开发新颖的面向姿势的自注意力机制和与距离相关的位置嵌入，以明确地利用人体骨骼拓扑。面向姿势的自注意力机制明确地模拟了身体关节之间的拓扑相互作用，而距离相关的位置嵌入对关节到根关节的距离进行编码，以区分回归中具有不同难度的关节组。此外，我们提出了一种不确定性引导细化网络（UGRN），通过使用不确定性引导采样策略和自注意力机制考虑每个关节的估计不确定性，来细化 POT 的姿态预测，特别是对于困难的关节。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 3D HPE 基准（例如 Human3.6M 和 MPI-INF-3DHP）上显着优于最先进的方法，并减少了模型参数

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于2D到3D人体姿态估计的Pose-Oriented Transformer（POT）模型，并结合不确定性引导的细化网络（UGRN）以提高姿态预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于Transformer的方法在处理3D人体姿态估计时，未充分考虑人体骨骼拓扑结构的先验知识，导致对关节间关系的建模不足，影响了预测性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的姿态导向自注意力机制和与距离相关的位嵌入，以显式利用人体骨骼拓扑。同时，设计了不确定性引导的细化网络（UGRN），通过不确定性引导的采样策略和自注意力机制，对难以预测的关节进行细化。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP等3D姿态估计基准数据集上，该方法在减少模型参数的情况下显著优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入姿态导向的Transformer和不确定性引导的细化网络，本文有效提升了3D人体姿态估计的性能，特别是在处理复杂关节时表现优异。

search_text: Pose-Oriented Transformer with Uncertainty-Guided Refinement for 2D-to-3D Human Pose Estimation 具有不确定性引导细化的面向姿势的 Transformer，用于 2D 到 3D 人体姿势估计 There has been a recent surge of interest in introducing transformers to 3D human pose estimation (HPE) due to their powerful capabilities in modeling long-term dependencies. However, existing transformer-based methods treat body joints as equally important inputs and ignore the prior knowledge of human skeleton topology in the self-attention mechanism. To tackle this issue, in this paper, we propose a Pose-Oriented Transformer (POT) with uncertainty guided refinement for 3D HPE. Specifically, we first develop novel pose-oriented self-attention mechanism and distance-related position embedding for POT to explicitly exploit the human skeleton topology. The pose-oriented self-attention mechanism explicitly models the topological interactions between body joints, whereas the distance-related position embedding encodes the distance of joints to the root joint to distinguish groups of joints with different difficulties in regression. Furthermore, we present an Uncertainty-Guided Refinement Network (UGRN) to refine pose predictions from POT, especially for the difficult joints, by considering the estimated uncertainty of each joint with uncertainty-guided sampling strategy and self-attention mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with reduced model parameters on 3D HPE benchmarks such as Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP 最近，人们对将 Transformer 引入 3D 人体姿态估计 (HPE) 的兴趣激增，因为它们在建模长期依赖性方面具有强大的能力。然而，现有的基于变压器的方法将身体关节视为同等重要的输入，并忽略了自注意力机制中人体骨骼拓扑的先验知识。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种针对 3D HPE 的不确定性引导细化的姿势导向变换器 (POT)。具体来说，我们首先为 POT 开发新颖的面向姿势的自注意力机制和与距离相关的位置嵌入，以明确地利用人体骨骼拓扑。面向姿势的自注意力机制明确地模拟了身体关节之间的拓扑相互作用，而距离相关的位置嵌入对关节到根关节的距离进行编码，以区分回归中具有不同难度的关节组。此外，我们提出了一种不确定性引导细化网络（UGRN），通过使用不确定性引导采样策略和自注意力机制考虑每个关节的估计不确定性，来细化 POT 的姿态预测，特别是对于困难的关节。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 3D HPE 基准（例如 Human3.6M 和 MPI-INF-3DHP）上显着优于最先进的方法，并减少了模型参数 本文提出了一种用于2D到3D人体姿态估计的Pose-Oriented Transformer（POT）模型，并结合不确定性引导的细化网络（UGRN）以提高姿态预测的准确性。 Han Li,Bowen Shi,Wenrui Dai,Hongwei Zheng,Botao Wang,Yu Sun,Min Guo,Chenlin Li,Junni Zou,Hongkai Xiong cs.CV

authors_text: Colin Sullivan,Mo Tiwari,Sebastian Thrun,Chris Piech
title: Bayesian Decision Trees via Tractable Priors and Probabilistic Context-Free Grammars
title_zh: 通过易处理先验和概率上下文无关语法的贝叶斯决策树
comment: 10 pages, 1 figure
comments: 10 pages, 1 figure
abstract: Decision Trees are some of the most popular machine learning models today due to their out-of-the-box performance and interpretability. Often, Decision Trees models are constructed greedily in a top-down fashion via heuristic search criteria, such as Gini impurity or entropy. However, trees constructed in this manner are sensitive to minor fluctuations in training data and are prone to overfitting. In contrast, Bayesian approaches to tree construction formulate the selection process as a posterior inference problem; such approaches are more stable and provide greater theoretical guarantees. However, generating Bayesian Decision Trees usually requires sampling from complex, multimodal posterior distributions. Current Markov Chain Monte Carlo-based approaches for sampling Bayesian Decision Trees are prone to mode collapse and long mixing times, which makes them impractical. In this paper, we propose a new criterion for training Bayesian Decision Trees. Our criterion gives rise to BCART-PCFG, which can efficiently sample decision trees from a posterior distribution across trees given the data and find the maximum a posteriori (MAP) tree. Learning the posterior and training the sampler can be done in time that is polynomial in the dataset size. Once the posterior has been learned, trees can be sampled efficiently (linearly in the number of nodes). At the core of our method is a reduction of sampling the posterior to sampling a derivation from a probabilistic context-free grammar. We find that trees sampled via BCART-PCFG perform comparable to or better than greedily-constructed Decision Trees in classification accuracy on several datasets. Additionally, the trees sampled via BCART-PCFG are significantly smaller -- sometimes by as much as 20x.

In this paper, we propose a new criterion for training Bayesian Decision Trees. Our criterion gives rise to BCART-PCFG, which can efficiently sample decision trees from a posterior distribution across trees given the data and find the maximum a posteriori (MAP) tree. Learning the posterior and training the sampler can be done in time that is polynomial in the dataset size. Once the posterior has been learned, trees can be sampled efficiently (linearly in the number of nodes). At the core of our method is a reduction of sampling the posterior to sampling a derivation from a probabilistic context-free grammar. We find that trees sampled via BCART-PCFG perform comparable to or better than greedily-constructed Decision Trees in classification accuracy on several datasets. abstract_zh: 决策树因其开箱即用的性能和可解释性而成为当今最流行的机器学习模型之一。通常，决策树模型是通过启发式搜索标准（例如基尼杂质或熵）以自上而下的方式贪婪地构建的。然而，以这种方式构建的树对训练数据的微小波动很敏感，并且容易过度拟合。相比之下，贝叶斯树构建方法将选择过程表述为后验推理问题；这种方法更加稳定，提供了更大的理论保证。然而，生成贝叶斯决策树通常需要从复杂的多模态后验分布中进行采样。当前基于马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗的贝叶斯决策树采样方法容易出现模式崩溃和长混合时间，这使得它们不切实际。在本文中，我们提出了一种训练贝叶斯决策树的新标准。我们的标准产生了 BCART-PCFG，它可以在给定数据的情况下从跨树的后验分布中有效地采样决策树，并找到最大后验（MAP）树。学习后验和训练采样器可以在数据集大小的多项式时间内完成。一旦学习了后验，就可以有效地对树进行采样（与节点数量呈线性关系）。我们方法的核心是将后验采样减少到对概率上下文无关语法的推导进行采样。我们发现通过 BCART-PCFG 采样的树在多个数据集上的分类准确性方面与贪婪构造的决策树相当或更好。此外，通过 BCART-PCFG 采样的树木明显更小——有时小了 20 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可处理先验和概率上下文无关文法的贝叶斯决策树构建方法，实现高效后验采样与最大后验树求解。
AI.motivation: 传统决策树对训练数据敏感且易过拟合，贝叶斯方法虽更稳定但现有采样方法存在模式崩溃和混合时间长的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将后验采样转化为概率上下文无关文法的推导过程，通过多项式时间学习后验分布，实现线性节点数的高效采样。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上分类准确率与贪心决策树相当或更优，生成的树规模显著更小（最大缩小20倍）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了贝叶斯决策树的采样难题，在保持性能的同时显著提升模型简洁性与可解释性。

authors_text: A. Baki Kocaballi
title: Conversational AI-Powered Design: ChatGPT as Designer, User, and Product
title_zh: 对话式 AI 驱动设计：ChatGPT 作为设计师、用户和产品
abstract: The recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs), particularly conversational LLMs like ChatGPT, have prompted changes in a range of fields, including design. This study aims to examine the capabilities of ChatGPT in a human-centered design process. To this end, a hypothetical design project was conducted, where ChatGPT was utilized to generate personas, simulate interviews with fictional users, create new design ideas, simulate usage scenarios and conversations between an imaginary prototype and fictional users, and lastly evaluate user experience. The results show that ChatGPT effectively performed the tasks assigned to it as a designer, user, or product, providing mostly appropriate responses. The study does, however, highlight some drawbacks such as forgotten information, partial responses, and a lack of output diversity. The paper explains the potential benefits and limitations of using conversational LLMs in design, discusses its implications, and suggests directions for future research in this rapidly evolving area.
summary: The recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs), particularly conversational LLMs like ChatGPT, have prompted changes in a range of fields, including design. This study aims to examine the capabilities of ChatGPT in a human-centered design process. To this end, a hypothetical design project was conducted, where ChatGPT was utilized to generate personas, simulate interviews with fictional users, create new design ideas, simulate usage scenarios and conversations between an imaginary prototype and fictional users, and lastly evaluate user experience. The results show that ChatGPT effectively performed the tasks assigned to it as a designer, user, or product, providing mostly appropriate responses. The study does, however, highlight some drawbacks such as forgotten information, partial responses, and a lack of output diversity. The paper explains the potential benefits and limitations of using conversational LLMs in design, discusses its implications, and suggests directions for future research in this rapidly evolving area.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的最新进展，特别是像 ChatGPT 这样的对话式 LLM，已经促使包括设计在内的一系列领域发生了变化。本研究旨在检验 ChatGPT 在以人为本的设计过程中的能力。为此，进行了一个假设的设计项目，利用ChatGPT生成角色，模拟与虚构用户的访谈，创造新的设计思路，模拟使用场景以及虚构原型与虚构用户之间的对话，最后评估用户体验。结果表明，ChatGPT 作为设计师、用户或产品有效地执行了分配给它的任务，并提供了最适当的响应。然而，该研究确实强调了一些缺点，例如信息被遗忘、反应不完整以及输出缺乏多样性。本文解释了在设计中使用对话式法学硕士的潜在好处和局限性，讨论了其影响，并为这个快速发展的领域的未来研究提出了方向。

AI.tldr: 本文通过假设性设计项目，探讨ChatGPT在以人为中心的设计流程中作为设计师、用户和产品的潜力。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（如ChatGPT）的发展，其在设计领域的应用潜力引发关注，需研究其在设计过程中的实际能力与限制。
AI.method: 通过假设性设计项目，让ChatGPT生成用户画像、模拟用户访谈、提出设计概念、模拟使用场景及用户交互，并评估用户体验。
AI.result: ChatGPT能有效完成分配任务，但存在信息遗忘、回答不完整和输出多样性不足等问题。
AI.conclusion: 对话式LLM在设计中有潜力，但需进一步研究其局限性及优化方向，以推动该领域的应用发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过假设性设计项目，探讨ChatGPT在以人为中心的设计流程中作为设计师、用户和产品的潜力。
ai_content.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（如ChatGPT）的发展，其在设计领域的应用潜力引发关注，需研究其在设计过程中的实际能力与限制。
ai_content.method: 通过假设性设计项目，让ChatGPT生成用户画像、模拟用户访谈、提出设计概念、模拟使用场景及用户交互，并评估用户体验。
ai_content.result: ChatGPT能有效完成分配任务，但存在信息遗忘、回答不完整和输出多样性不足等问题。
ai_content.conclusion: 对话式LLM在设计中有潜力，但需进一步研究其局限性及优化方向，以推动该领域的应用发展。

search_text: Conversational AI-Powered Design: ChatGPT as Designer, User, and Product 对话式 AI 驱动设计：ChatGPT 作为设计师、用户和产品 The recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs), particularly conversational LLMs like ChatGPT, have prompted changes in a range of fields, including design. This study aims to examine the capabilities of ChatGPT in a human-centered design process. To this end, a hypothetical design project was conducted, where ChatGPT was utilized to generate personas, simulate interviews with fictional users, create new design ideas, simulate usage scenarios and conversations between an imaginary prototype and fictional users, and lastly evaluate user experience. The results show that ChatGPT effectively performed the tasks assigned to it as a designer, user, or product, providing mostly appropriate responses. The study does, however, highlight some drawbacks such as forgotten information, partial responses, and a lack of output diversity. The paper explains the potential benefits and limitations of using conversational LLMs in design, discusses its implications, and suggests directions for future research in this rapidly evolving area. 大型语言模型（LLM）的最新进展，特别是像 ChatGPT 这样的对话式 LLM，已经促使包括设计在内的一系列领域发生了变化。本研究旨在检验 ChatGPT 在以人为本的设计过程中的能力。为此，进行了一个假设的设计项目，利用ChatGPT生成角色，模拟与虚构用户的访谈，创造新的设计思路，模拟使用场景以及虚构原型与虚构用户之间的对话，最后评估用户体验。结果表明，ChatGPT 作为设计师、用户或产品有效地执行了分配给它的任务，并提供了最适当的响应。然而，该研究确实强调了一些缺点，例如信息被遗忘、反应不完整以及输出缺乏多样性。本文解释了在设计中使用对话式法学硕士的潜在好处和局限性，讨论了其影响，并为这个快速发展的领域的未来研究提出了方向。 本文通过假设性设计项目，探讨ChatGPT在以人为中心的设计流程中作为设计师、用户和产品的潜力。 A. Baki Kocaballi cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Anne Catherine Nguyen,Turgay Pamuklu,Aisha Syed,W. Sean Kennedy,Melike Erol-Kantarci
title: To Risk or Not to Risk: Learning with Risk Quantification for IoT Task Offloading in UAVs
title_zh: 冒险还是不冒险：通过风险量化学习无人机物联网任务卸载
comment: Accepted for ICC2023
comments: Accepted for ICC2023
abstract: A deep reinforcement learning technique is presented for task offloading decision-making algorithms for a multi-access edge computing (MEC) assisted unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) network in a smart farm Internet of Things (IoT) environment. The task offloading technique uses financial concepts such as cost functions and conditional variable at risk (CVaR) in order to quantify the damage that may be caused by each risky action. The approach was able to quantify potential risks to train the reinforcement learning agent to avoid risky behaviors that will lead to irreversible consequences for the farm. Such consequences include an undetected fire, pest infestation, or a UAV being unusable. The proposed CVaR-based technique was compared to other deep reinforcement learning techniques and two fixed rule-based techniques. The simulation results show that the CVaR-based risk quantifying method eliminated the most dangerous risk, which was exceeding the deadline for a fire detection task. As a result, it reduced the total number of deadline violations with a negligible increase in energy consumption.
summary: A deep reinforcement learning technique is presented for task offloading decision-making algorithms for a multi-access edge computing (MEC) assisted unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) network in a smart farm Internet of Things (IoT) environment. The task offloading technique uses financial concepts such as cost functions and conditional variable at risk (CVaR) in order to quantify the damage that may be caused by each risky action. The approach was able to quantify potential risks to train the reinforcement learning agent to avoid risky behaviors that will lead to irreversible consequences for the farm. Such consequences include an undetected fire, pest infestation, or a UAV being unusable. The proposed CVaR-based technique was compared to other deep reinforcement learning techniques and two fixed rule-based techniques. The simulation results show that the CVaR-based risk quantifying method eliminated the most dangerous risk, which was exceeding the deadline for a fire detection task. As a result, it reduced the total number of deadline violations with a negligible increase in energy consumption.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种深度强化学习技术，用于智能农场物联网 (IoT) 环境中多路访问边缘计算 (MEC) 辅助无人机 (UAV) 网络的任务卸载决策算法。任务卸载技术使用成本函数和风险条件变量（CVaR）等金融概念来量化每个风险行为可能造成的损害。该方法能够量化潜在风险，以训练强化学习代理，以避免对农场造成不可逆转后果的危险行为。此类后果包括未被发现的火灾、虫害侵扰或无人机无法使用。将所提出的基于 CVaR 的技术与其他深度强化学习技术和两种基于固定规则的技术进行了比较。仿真结果表明，基于CVaR的风险量化方法消除了最危险的风险，即超过火灾探测任务期限的风险。结果，它减少了违反期限的总数，而能源消耗的增加几乎可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件风险价值（CVaR）的深度强化学习方法，用于无人机辅助的物联网任务卸载决策，以量化并规避可能引发严重后果的风险行为。
AI.motivation: 在智能农场物联网环境中，传统任务卸载方法可能因忽略风险导致不可逆后果（如火灾未检测、无人机失效等），需通过风险量化机制提升决策安全性。
AI.method: 结合深度强化学习与金融领域的CVaR模型，通过量化任务卸载的潜在风险（如截止时间违规成本），训练智能体优先规避高风险动作。
AI.result: 实验表明，CVaR方法相比其他算法显著减少火灾检测任务的截止时间违规次数，且仅带来可忽略的能耗增加。
AI.conclusion: 引入CVaR的风险量化框架能有效提升无人机物联网任务卸载的可靠性，为高风险场景下的边缘计算决策提供新思路。

authors_text: Marcelo O. Magnasco
title: Convolutional unitary or orthogonal recurrent neural networks
title_zh: 卷积酉或正交循环神经网络
abstract: Recurrent neural networks are extremely powerful yet hard to train. One of their issues is the vanishing gradient problem, whereby propagation of training signals may be exponentially attenuated, freezing training. Use of orthogonal or unitary matrices, whose powers neither explode nor decay, has been proposed to mitigate this issue, but their computational expense has hindered their use. Here we show that in the specific case of convolutional RNNs, we can define a convolutional exponential and that this operation transforms antisymmetric or anti-Hermitian convolution kernels into orthogonal or unitary convolution kernels. We explicitly derive FFT-based algorithms to compute the kernels and their derivatives. The computational complexity of parametrizing this subspace of orthogonal transformations is thus the same as the networks' iteration.
summary: Recurrent neural networks are extremely powerful yet hard to train. One of their issues is the vanishing gradient problem, whereby propagation of training signals may be exponentially attenuated, freezing training. Use of orthogonal or unitary matrices, whose powers neither explode nor decay, has been proposed to mitigate this issue, but their computational expense has hindered their use. Here we show that in the specific case of convolutional RNNs, we can define a convolutional exponential and that this operation transforms antisymmetric or anti-Hermitian convolution kernels into orthogonal or unitary convolution kernels. We explicitly derive FFT-based algorithms to compute the kernels and their derivatives. The computational complexity of parametrizing this subspace of orthogonal transformations is thus the same as the networks' iteration.
abstract_zh: 循环神经网络非常强大但难以训练。他们的问题之一是梯度消失问题，训练信号的传播可能会呈指数衰减，从而冻结训练。已经提出使用正交或酉矩阵来缓解这个问题，其幂既不爆炸也不衰减，但它们的计算费用阻碍了它们的使用。在这里，我们展示了在卷积 RNN 的具体情况下，我们可以定义一个卷积指数，并且该操作将反对称或反埃尔米特卷积核转换为正交或酉卷积核。我们明确推导基于 FFT 的算法来计算内核及其导数。因此，参数化正交变换子空间的计算复杂度与网络迭代相同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对卷积循环神经网络（RNN）的正交/酉矩阵参数化方法，通过卷积指数运算解决梯度消失问题。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN因梯度消失难以训练，正交/酉矩阵虽能缓解该问题但计算成本高，需寻找高效实现方案。
AI.method: 定义卷积指数运算，将反对称/反埃尔米特卷积核转化为正交/酉核，并推导基于FFT的高效计算算法。
AI.result: 实现正交变换子空间参数化的计算复杂度与网络迭代复杂度相当，有效缓解梯度消失问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持计算效率的同时解决了卷积RNN的稳定性问题，为循环网络优化提供新方向。

authors_text: Saptarshi Mandal,Seo Taek Kong,Dimitrios Katselis,R. Srikant
title: Spectral Clustering for Crowdsourcing with Inherently Distinct Task Types
title_zh: 用于具有固有不同任务类型的众包的谱聚类
abstract: The Dawid-Skene model is the most widely assumed model in the analysis of crowdsourcing algorithms that estimate ground-truth labels from noisy worker responses. In this work, we are motivated by crowdsourcing applications where workers have distinct skill sets and their accuracy additionally depends on a task's type. While weighted majority vote (WMV) with a single weight vector for each worker achieves the optimal label estimation error in the Dawid-Skene model, we show that different weights for different types are necessary for a multi-type model. Focusing on the case where there are two types of tasks, we propose a spectral method to partition tasks into two groups that cluster tasks by type. Our analysis reveals that task types can be perfectly recovered if the number of workers $n$ scales logarithmically with the number of tasks $d$. Any algorithm designed for the Dawid-Skene model can then be applied independently to each type to infer the labels. Numerical experiments show how clustering tasks by type before estimating ground-truth labels enhances the performance of crowdsourcing algorithms in practical applications.
summary: The Dawid-Skene model is the most widely assumed model in the analysis of crowdsourcing algorithms that estimate ground-truth labels from noisy worker responses. In this work, we are motivated by crowdsourcing applications where workers have distinct skill sets and their accuracy additionally depends on a task's type. While weighted majority vote (WMV) with a single weight vector for each worker achieves the optimal label estimation error in the Dawid-Skene model, we show that different weights for different types are necessary for a multi-type model. Focusing on the case where there are two types of tasks, we propose a spectral method to partition tasks into two groups that cluster tasks by type. Our analysis reveals that task types can be perfectly recovered if the number of workers $n$ scales logarithmically with the number of tasks $d$. Any algorithm designed for the Dawid-Skene model can then be applied independently to each type to infer the labels. Numerical experiments show how clustering tasks by type before estimating ground-truth labels enhances the performance of crowdsourcing algorithms in practical applications.
abstract_zh: Dawid-Skene 模型是众包算法分析中最广泛假设的模型，该算法从嘈杂的工人响应中估计真实标签。在这项工作中，我们受到众包应用程序的推动，其中工作人员具有独特的技能组合，并且他们的准确性还取决于任务的类型。虽然每个工作人员使用单个权重向量的加权多数投票 (WMV) 在 Dawid-Skene 模型中实现了最佳标签估计误差，但我们表明，对于多类型模型，不同类型的不同权重是必要的。针对有两种类型任务的情况，我们提出了一种谱方法，将任务划分为两组，并按类型对任务进行聚类。我们的分析表明，如果工作人员数量 $n$ 与任务数量 $d$ 成对数比例，则可以完美恢复任务类型。然后，为 Dawid-Skene 模型设计的任何算法都可以独立应用于每种类型来推断标签。数值实验表明，在估计真实标签之前按类型对任务进行聚类如何提高实际应用中众包算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于谱聚类的方法，用于处理存在固有不同任务类型的众包问题，通过聚类任务类型提升标签估计准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有众包算法（如加权多数投票）假设工人误差与任务类型无关，但实际中工人准确率可能因任务类型而异，需针对不同任务类型调整权重。
AI.method: 针对两类任务场景，提出谱聚类方法将任务按类型分组，证明当工人数量随任务数对数增长时可完美恢复任务类型，再分别应用Dawid-Skene模型估计标签。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，先聚类任务类型再估计标签，能显著提升众包算法在实际应用中的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过谱聚类分离任务类型后再进行标签推断，可有效解决多类型众包任务中因类型差异导致的误差问题。

authors_text: Shrimai Prabhumoye,Mostofa Patwary,Mohammad Shoeybi,Bryan Catanzaro
title: Adding Instructions during Pretraining: Effective Way of Controlling Toxicity in Language Models
title_zh: 在预训练期间添加指令：控制语言模型毒性的有效方法
comment: This paper will be presented at EACL 2023
comments: This paper will be presented at EACL 2023
abstract: Pretrained large language models have become indispensable for solving various natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, safely deploying them in real world applications is challenging because they generate toxic content. To address this challenge, we propose two novel pretraining data augmentation strategies that significantly reduce model toxicity without compromising its utility. Our two strategies are: (1) MEDA: adds raw toxicity score as meta-data to the pretraining samples, and (2) INST: adds instructions to those samples indicating their toxicity. Our results indicate that our best performing strategy (INST) substantially reduces the toxicity probability up to 61% while preserving the accuracy on five benchmark NLP tasks as well as improving AUC scores on four bias detection tasks by 1.3%. We also demonstrate the generalizability of our techniques by scaling the number of training samples and the number of model parameters.
summary: Pretrained large language models have become indispensable for solving various natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, safely deploying them in real world applications is challenging because they generate toxic content. To address this challenge, we propose two novel pretraining data augmentation strategies that significantly reduce model toxicity without compromising its utility. Our two strategies are: (1) MEDA: adds raw toxicity score as meta-data to the pretraining samples, and (2) INST: adds instructions to those samples indicating their toxicity. Our results indicate that our best performing strategy (INST) substantially reduces the toxicity probability up to 61% while preserving the accuracy on five benchmark NLP tasks as well as improving AUC scores on four bias detection tasks by 1.3%. We also demonstrate the generalizability of our techniques by scaling the number of training samples and the number of model parameters.
abstract_zh: 预训练的大型语言模型已成为解决各种自然语言处理（NLP）任务所不可或缺的。然而，在现实世界的应用中安全部署它们具有挑战性，因为它们会产生有毒内容。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了两种新颖的预训练数据增强策略，可以显着降低模型毒性而不损害其实用性。我们的两种策略是：(1) MEDA：将原始毒性评分作为元数据添加到预训练样本中，(2) INST：向这些样本添加指示其毒性的说明。我们的结果表明，我们的最佳执行策略 (INST) 将毒性概率大幅降低了 61%，同时保留了五个基准 NLP 任务的准确性，并将四个偏差检测任务的 AUC 分数提高了 1.3%。我们还通过扩展训练样本的数量和模型参数的数量来证明我们的技术的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在预训练阶段通过添加元数据和指令来有效降低语言模型的毒性，同时保持其在NLP任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 预训练语言模型在生成有毒内容方面的安全部署问题亟待解决，需要在不损害模型效用的前提下控制其毒性。
AI.method: 提出两种预训练数据增强策略：MEDA（添加毒性评分元数据）和INST（添加毒性指示指令），其中INST通过显式标注毒性信息引导模型学习。
AI.result: INST策略使毒性概率降低61%，保持NLP任务准确率，并提升偏差检测任务AUC分数1.3%；方法具有可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 在预训练阶段添加指令是控制语言模型毒性的有效方法，且具有良好的泛化能力和参数扩展性。

search_text: Adding Instructions during Pretraining: Effective Way of Controlling Toxicity in Language Models 在预训练期间添加指令：控制语言模型毒性的有效方法 Pretrained large language models have become indispensable for solving various natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, safely deploying them in real world applications is challenging because they generate toxic content. To address this challenge, we propose two novel pretraining data augmentation strategies that significantly reduce model toxicity without compromising its utility. Our two strategies are: (1) MEDA: adds raw toxicity score as meta-data to the pretraining samples, and (2) INST: adds instructions to those samples indicating their toxicity. Our results indicate that our best performing strategy (INST) substantially reduces the toxicity probability up to 61% while preserving the accuracy on five benchmark NLP tasks as well as improving AUC scores on four bias detection tasks by 1.3%. We also demonstrate the generalizability of our techniques by scaling the number of training samples and the number of model parameters. 预训练的大型语言模型已成为解决各种自然语言处理（NLP）任务所不可或缺的。然而，在现实世界的应用中安全部署它们具有挑战性，因为它们会产生有毒内容。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了两种新颖的预训练数据增强策略，可以显着降低模型毒性而不损害其实用性。我们的两种策略是：(1) MEDA：将原始毒性评分作为元数据添加到预训练样本中，(2) INST：向这些样本添加指示其毒性的说明。我们的结果表明，我们的最佳执行策略 (INST) 将毒性概率大幅降低了 61%，同时保留了五个基准 NLP 任务的准确性，并将四个偏差检测任务的 AUC 分数提高了 1.3%。我们还通过扩展训练样本的数量和模型参数的数量来证明我们的技术的通用性。 本文提出在预训练阶段通过添加元数据和指令来有效降低语言模型的毒性，同时保持其在NLP任务中的性能。 Shrimai Prabhumoye,Mostofa Patwary,Mohammad Shoeybi,Bryan Catanzaro cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiang Liu,Hui Ding,Zhaowei Cai,Yuting Zhang,Ravi Kumar Satzoda,Vijay Mahadevan,R. Manmatha
title: PolyFormer: Referring Image Segmentation as Sequential Polygon Generation
title_zh: PolyFormer：将图像分割称为顺序多边形生成
comment: CVPR 2023. Project Page: https://polyformer.github.io/
comments: CVPR 2023. Project Page: https://polyformer.github.io/
abstract: In this work, instead of directly predicting the pixel-level segmentation masks, the problem of referring image segmentation is formulated as sequential polygon generation, and the predicted polygons can be later converted into segmentation masks. This is enabled by a new sequence-to-sequence framework, Polygon Transformer (PolyFormer), which takes a sequence of image patches and text query tokens as input, and outputs a sequence of polygon vertices autoregressively. For more accurate geometric localization, we propose a regression-based decoder, which predicts the precise floating-point coordinates directly, without any coordinate quantization error. In the experiments, PolyFormer outperforms the prior art by a clear margin, e.g., 5.40% and 4.52% absolute improvements on the challenging RefCOCO+ and RefCOCOg datasets. It also shows strong generalization ability when evaluated on the referring video segmentation task without fine-tuning, e.g., achieving competitive 61.5% J&F on the Ref-DAVIS17 dataset.
summary: In this work, instead of directly predicting the pixel-level segmentation masks, the problem of referring image segmentation is formulated as sequential polygon generation, and the predicted polygons can be later converted into segmentation masks. This is enabled by a new sequence-to-sequence framework, Polygon Transformer (PolyFormer), which takes a sequence of image patches and text query tokens as input, and outputs a sequence of polygon vertices autoregressively. For more accurate geometric localization, we propose a regression-based decoder, which predicts the precise floating-point coordinates directly, without any coordinate quantization error. In the experiments, PolyFormer outperforms the prior art by a clear margin, e.g., 5.40% and 4.52% absolute improvements on the challenging RefCOCO+ and RefCOCOg datasets. It also shows strong generalization ability when evaluated on the referring video segmentation task without fine-tuning, e.g., achieving competitive 61.5% J&F on the Ref-DAVIS17 dataset.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，不是直接预测像素级分割掩模，而是将参考图像分割问题表述为顺序多边形生成，并且预测的多边形可以稍后转换为分割掩模。这是通过新的序列到序列框架 Polygon Transformer (PolyFormer) 实现的，该框架将一系列图像块和文本查询标记作为输入，并自回归输出一系列多边形顶点。为了更准确的几何定位，我们提出了一种基于回归的解码器，它直接预测精确的浮点坐标，没有任何坐标量化误差。在实验中，PolyFormer 明显优于现有技术，例如，在具有挑战性的 RefCOCO+ 和 RefCOCOg 数据集上绝对提高了 5.40% 和 4.52%。在无需微调的参考视频分割任务上进行评估时，它还显示出强大的泛化能力，例如，在 Ref-DAVIS17 数据集上实现了具有竞争力的 61.5% J&F。

AI.tldr: 将指代图像分割任务转化为顺序多边形生成，提出PolyFormer框架实现文本引导的精确分割。
AI.motivation: 传统像素级分割存在精度限制，多边形生成更符合人类标注习惯，且可避免坐标量化误差。
AI.method: 基于序列到序列的PolyFormer框架，输入图像块和文本查询，输出多边形顶点序列，采用回归解码器直接预测浮点坐标。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO+和RefCOCOg数据集上分别提升5.40%和4.52%，视频分割任务达到61.5% J&F指标。
AI.conclusion: PolyFormer通过多边形生成有效提升分割精度，具有良好的泛化能力，适用于视频分割等任务。
