search_text: CiteSee: Augmenting Citations in Scientific Papers with Persistent and Personalized Historical Context CiteSee：通过持久且个性化的历史背景增加科学论文的引用 When reading a scholarly article, inline citations help researchers contextualize the current article and discover relevant prior work. However, it can be challenging to prioritize and make sense of the hundreds of citations encountered during literature reviews. This paper introduces CiteSee, a paper reading tool that leverages a user's publishing, reading, and saving activities to provide personalized visual augmentations and context around citations. First, CiteSee connects the current paper to familiar contexts by surfacing known citations a user had cited or opened. Second, CiteSee helps users prioritize their exploration by highlighting relevant but unknown citations based on saving and reading history. We conducted a lab study that suggests CiteSee is significantly more effective for paper discovery than three baselines. A field deployment study shows CiteSee helps participants keep track of their explorations and leads to better situational awareness and increased paper discovery via inline citation when conducting real-world literature reviews. 在阅读学术文章时，内联引用可以帮助研究人员了解当前文章的背景并发现相关的先前工作。然而，对文献综述期间遇到的数百条引用进行优先排序并理解其意义可能具有挑战性。本文介绍了 CiteSee，这是一种论文阅读工具，它利用用户的发布、阅读和保存活动来提供个性化的视觉增强和引文上下文。首先，CiteSee 通过显示用户引用或打开的已知引文，将当前论文与熟悉的上下文联系起来。其次，CiteSee 根据保存和阅读历史记录突出显示相关但未知的引文，帮助用户优先考虑其探索。我们进行的一项实验室研究表明，CiteSee 在论文发现方面比三个基线更有效。一项现场部署研究表明，CiteSee 可以帮助参与者跟踪他们的探索，并在进行现实世界文献综述时通过内联引用提高态势感知并增加论文发现。 本文提出CiteSee工具，通过个性化历史上下文增强科学论文中的引用信息，帮助研究人员更高效地进行文献回顾。 Joseph Chee Chang,Amy X. Zhang,Jonathan Bragg,Andrew Head,Kyle Lo,Doug Downey,Daniel S. Weld cs.HC,cs.DL

authors_text: Dingding Cai,Janne Heikkilä,Esa Rahtu
title: MSDA: Monocular Self-supervised Domain Adaptation for 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: MSDA：用于 6D 物体姿态估计的单目自监督域适应
comment: SCIA2023
comments: SCIA2023
abstract: Acquiring labeled 6D poses from real images is an expensive and time-consuming task. Though massive amounts of synthetic RGB images are easy to obtain, the models trained on them suffer from noticeable performance degradation due to the synthetic-to-real domain gap. To mitigate this degradation, we propose a practical self-supervised domain adaptation approach that takes advantage of real RGB(-D) data without needing real pose labels. We first pre-train the model with synthetic RGB images and then utilize real RGB(-D) images to fine-tune the pre-trained model. The fine-tuning process is self-supervised by the RGB-based pose-aware consistency and the depth-guided object distance pseudo-label, which does not require the time-consuming online differentiable rendering. We build our domain adaptation method based on the recent pose estimator SC6D and evaluate it on the YCB-Video dataset. We experimentally demonstrate that our method achieves comparable performance against its fully-supervised counterpart while outperforming existing state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Acquiring labeled 6D poses from real images is an expensive and time-consuming task. Though massive amounts of synthetic RGB images are easy to obtain, the models trained on them suffer from noticeable performance degradation due to the synthetic-to-real domain gap. To mitigate this degradation, we propose a practical self-supervised domain adaptation approach that takes advantage of real RGB(-D) data without needing real pose labels. We first pre-train the model with synthetic RGB images and then utilize real RGB(-D) images to fine-tune the pre-trained model. The fine-tuning process is self-supervised by the RGB-based pose-aware consistency and the depth-guided object distance pseudo-label, which does not require the time-consuming online differentiable rendering. We build our domain adaptation method based on the recent pose estimator SC6D and evaluate it on the YCB-Video dataset. We experimentally demonstrate that our method achieves comparable performance against its fully-supervised counterpart while outperforming existing state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 从真实图像中获取带标签的 6D 姿势是一项昂贵且耗时的任务。虽然大量的合成 RGB 图像很容易获得，但由于合成域与真实域的差距，在这些图像上训练的模型会出现明显的性能下降。为了减轻这种退化，我们提出了一种实用的自监督域适应方法，该方法利用真实的 RGB(-D) 数据，而不需要真实的姿势标签。我们首先使用合成 RGB 图像对模型进行预训练，然后利用真实 RGB(-D) 图像对预训练模型进行微调。微调过程由基于RGB的姿势感知一致性和深度引导的物距伪标签进行自我监督，不需要耗时的在线可微分渲染。我们基于最近的姿态估计器 SC6D 构建了域适应方法，并在 YCB-Video 数据集上对其进行了评估。我们通过实验证明，我们的方法实现了与完全监督的方法相当的性能，同时优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种单目自监督领域自适应方法MSDA，用于解决6D物体姿态估计中合成数据与真实数据之间的领域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 获取真实图像的标注6D姿态成本高昂，而基于合成图像训练的模型因领域差异性能下降明显。现有方法或需真实标注或依赖耗时的在线渲染，缺乏高效解决方案。
AI.method: 先用合成RGB图像预训练模型，再利用真实RGB(-D)图像通过自监督微调：基于RGB的姿态一致性约束与深度引导的伪标签联合优化，无需真实姿态标注。
AI.result: 在YCB-Video数据集上，该方法性能与全监督方法相当，且优于现有最先进的领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自监督领域自适应框架有效弥合了合成与真实数据的差距，在无需真实标注的情况下实现了高效准确的6D姿态估计。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种单目自监督领域自适应方法MSDA，用于解决6D物体姿态估计中合成数据与真实数据之间的领域差距问题。

authors_text: Lisa P. Argyle,Ethan Busby,Joshua Gubler,Chris Bail,Thomas Howe,Christopher Rytting,David Wingate
title: AI Chat Assistants can Improve Conversations about Divisive Topics
title_zh: 人工智能聊天助手可以改善有关分歧话题的对话
abstract: A rapidly increasing amount of human conversation occurs online. But divisiveness and conflict can fester in text-based interactions on social media platforms, in messaging apps, and on other digital forums. Such toxicity increases polarization and, importantly, corrodes the capacity of diverse societies to develop efficient solutions to complex social problems that impact everyone. Scholars and civil society groups promote interventions that can make interpersonal conversations less divisive or more productive in offline settings, but scaling these efforts to the amount of discourse that occurs online is extremely challenging. We present results of a large-scale experiment that demonstrates how online conversations about divisive topics can be improved with artificial intelligence tools. Specifically, we employ a large language model to make real-time, evidence-based recommendations intended to improve participants' perception of feeling understood in conversations. We find that these interventions improve the reported quality of the conversation, reduce political divisiveness, and improve the tone, without systematically changing the content of the conversation or moving people's policy attitudes. These findings have important implications for future research on social media, political deliberation, and the growing community of scholars interested in the place of artificial intelligence within computational social science.
summary: A rapidly increasing amount of human conversation occurs online. But divisiveness and conflict can fester in text-based interactions on social media platforms, in messaging apps, and on other digital forums. Such toxicity increases polarization and, importantly, corrodes the capacity of diverse societies to develop efficient solutions to complex social problems that impact everyone. Scholars and civil society groups promote interventions that can make interpersonal conversations less divisive or more productive in offline settings, but scaling these efforts to the amount of discourse that occurs online is extremely challenging. We present results of a large-scale experiment that demonstrates how online conversations about divisive topics can be improved with artificial intelligence tools. Specifically, we employ a large language model to make real-time, evidence-based recommendations intended to improve participants' perception of feeling understood in conversations. We find that these interventions improve the reported quality of the conversation, reduce political divisiveness, and improve the tone, without systematically changing the content of the conversation or moving people's policy attitudes. These findings have important implications for future research on social media, political deliberation, and the growing community of scholars interested in the place of artificial intelligence within computational social science.
abstract_zh: 网上的人类对话量迅速增加。但在社交媒体平台、消息应用程序和其他数字论坛上基于文本的互动中，分歧和冲突可能会加剧。这种毒性加剧了两极分化，更重要的是，削弱了不同社会为影响每个人的复杂社会问题制定有效解决方案的能力。学者和民间社会团体提倡采取干预措施，以减少线下环境中人际对话的分歧或提高其成效，但将这些努力扩展到网上的话语量极具挑战性。我们展示了一项大规模实验的结果，该实验展示了如何利用人工智能工具改善有关分歧话题的在线对话。具体来说，我们采用大型语言模型来提出实时的、基于证据的建议，旨在改善参与者在对话中感觉被理解的感觉。我们发现这些干预措施提高了对话的报道质量，减少了政治分歧，改善了基调，但没有系统地改变对话内容或改变人们的政策态度。这些发现对于社交媒体、政治审议以及越来越多对人工智能在计算社会科学中的地位感兴趣的学者的未来研究具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了AI聊天助手如何改善在线讨论中涉及争议性话题的对话质量。
AI.motivation: 在线交流中分歧和冲突加剧了社会分裂，传统线下干预方法难以扩展至大规模网络对话，亟需有效技术手段缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 通过大规模实验，利用大型语言模型实时生成基于证据的建议，帮助对话参与者提升被理解感。
AI.result: 实验显示干预措施提升了对话质量感知，降低了政治分歧程度，并改善了语气，但未改变对话内容或政策立场。
AI.conclusion: AI工具可作为缓解网络分歧的有效补充，为社交媒体治理和计算社会科学领域提供了新研究方向。

search_text: AI Chat Assistants can Improve Conversations about Divisive Topics 人工智能聊天助手可以改善有关分歧话题的对话 A rapidly increasing amount of human conversation occurs online. But divisiveness and conflict can fester in text-based interactions on social media platforms, in messaging apps, and on other digital forums. Such toxicity increases polarization and, importantly, corrodes the capacity of diverse societies to develop efficient solutions to complex social problems that impact everyone. Scholars and civil society groups promote interventions that can make interpersonal conversations less divisive or more productive in offline settings, but scaling these efforts to the amount of discourse that occurs online is extremely challenging. We present results of a large-scale experiment that demonstrates how online conversations about divisive topics can be improved with artificial intelligence tools. Specifically, we employ a large language model to make real-time, evidence-based recommendations intended to improve participants' perception of feeling understood in conversations. We find that these interventions improve the reported quality of the conversation, reduce political divisiveness, and improve the tone, without systematically changing the content of the conversation or moving people's policy attitudes. These findings have important implications for future research on social media, political deliberation, and the growing community of scholars interested in the place of artificial intelligence within computational social science. 网上的人类对话量迅速增加。但在社交媒体平台、消息应用程序和其他数字论坛上基于文本的互动中，分歧和冲突可能会加剧。这种毒性加剧了两极分化，更重要的是，削弱了不同社会为影响每个人的复杂社会问题制定有效解决方案的能力。学者和民间社会团体提倡采取干预措施，以减少线下环境中人际对话的分歧或提高其成效，但将这些努力扩展到网上的话语量极具挑战性。我们展示了一项大规模实验的结果，该实验展示了如何利用人工智能工具改善有关分歧话题的在线对话。具体来说，我们采用大型语言模型来提出实时的、基于证据的建议，旨在改善参与者在对话中感觉被理解的感觉。我们发现这些干预措施提高了对话的报道质量，减少了政治分歧，改善了基调，但没有系统地改变对话内容或改变人们的政策态度。这些发现对于社交媒体、政治审议以及越来越多对人工智能在计算社会科学中的地位感兴趣的学者的未来研究具有重要意义。 该论文研究了AI聊天助手如何改善在线讨论中涉及争议性话题的对话质量。 Lisa P. Argyle,Ethan Busby,Joshua Gubler,Chris Bail,Thomas Howe,Christopher Rytting,David Wingate cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Peter S. Park,Philipp Schoenegger,Chongyang Zhu
title: Diminished Diversity-of-Thought in a Standard Large Language Model
title_zh: 标准大型语言模型中思想多样性的减少
comment: 67 pages (42-page main text, 25-page SI); 12 visualizations (four tables and three figures in the main text, five figures in the SI); additional exploratory follow-up study varied the demographic details preceding the prompt; preregistered OSF database is available at https://osf.io/dzp8t/
comments: 67 pages (42-page main text, 25-page SI); 12 visualizations (four tables and three figures in the main text, five figures in the SI); additional exploratory follow-up study varied the demographic details preceding the prompt; preregistered OSF database is available at https://osf.io/dzp8t/
abstract: We test whether Large Language Models (LLMs) can be used to simulate human participants in social-science studies. To do this, we run replications of 14 studies from the Many Labs 2 replication project with OpenAI's text-davinci-003 model, colloquially known as GPT3.5. Based on our pre-registered analyses, we find that among the eight studies we could analyse, our GPT sample replicated 37.5% of the original results and 37.5% of the Many Labs 2 results. However, we were unable to analyse the remaining six studies due to an unexpected phenomenon we call the "correct answer" effect. Different runs of GPT3.5 answered nuanced questions probing political orientation, economic preference, judgement, and moral philosophy with zero or near-zero variation in responses: with the supposedly "correct answer." In one exploratory follow-up study, we found that a "correct answer" was robust to changing the demographic details that precede the prompt. In another, we found that most but not all "correct answers" were robust to changing the order of answer choices. One of our most striking findings occurred in our replication of the Moral Foundations Theory survey results, where we found GPT3.5 identifying as a political conservative in 99.6% of the cases, and as a liberal in 99.3% of the cases in the reverse-order condition. However, both self-reported 'GPT conservatives' and 'GPT liberals' showed right-leaning moral foundations. Our results cast doubts on the validity of using LLMs as a general replacement for human participants in the social sciences. Our results also raise concerns that a hypothetical AI-led future may be subject to a diminished diversity-of-thought.

To do this, we run replications of 14 studies from the Many Labs 2 replication project with OpenAI's text-davinci-003 model, colloquially known as GPT3.5. Based on our pre-registered analyses, we find that among the eight studies we could analyse, our GPT sample replicated 37.5% of the original results and 37.5% of the Many Labs 2 results. However, we were unable to analyse the remaining six studies due to an unexpected phenomenon we call the "correct answer" effect. Different runs of GPT3.5 answered nuanced questions probing political orientation, economic preference, judgement, and moral philosophy with zero or near-zero variation in responses: with the supposedly "correct answer." In one exploratory follow-up study, we found that a "correct answer" was robust to changing the demographic details that precede the prompt. In another, we found that most but not all "correct answers" were robust to changing the order of answer choices. One of our most striking findings occurred in our replication of the Moral Foundations Theory survey results, where we found GPT3.5 identifying as a political conservative in 99.6% of the cases, and as a liberal in 99.3% of the cases in the reverse-order condition. However, both self-reported 'GPT conservatives' and 'GPT liberals' showed right-leaning moral foundations. Our results cast doubts on the validity of using LLMs as a general replacement for human participants in the social sciences. Our results also raise concerns that a hypothetical AI-led future may be subject to a diminished diversity-of-thought.
abstract_zh: 我们测试大型语言模型（LLM）是否可用于模拟社会科学研究中的人类参与者。为此，我们使用 OpenAI 的 text-davinci-003 模型（俗称 GPT3.5）对 Many Labs 2 复制项目中的 14 项研究进行了复制。根据我们预先注册的分析，我们发现在我们可以分析的八项研究中，我们的 GPT 样本复制了 37.5% 的原始结果和 37.5% 的 Many Labs 2 结果。然而，由于我们称之为“正确答案”效应的意外现象，我们无法分析其余六项研究。不同的 GPT3.5 运行回答了探讨政治取向、经济偏好、判断和道德哲学的微妙问题，答案的变化为零或接近零：即所谓的“正确答案”。在一项探索性后续研究中，我们发现“正确答案”对于改变提示之前的人口统计详细信息是有效的。在另一项研究中，我们发现大多数但并非全部“正确答案”对于改变答案选择的顺序都是稳健的。我们最引人注目的发现之一发生在我们对道德基础理论调查结果的复制中，我们发现 GPT3.5 在 99.6% 的情况下被识别为政治保守派，而在相反的顺序条件下，在 99.3% 的情况下 GPT3.5 被识别为自由派。然而，自称的“GPT保守派”和“GPT自由派”都表现出右倾的道德基础。我们的结果对使用法学硕士作为社会科学领域人类参与者的一般替代品的有效性提出了质疑。我们的研究结果还引发了人们的担忧，即假设的人工智能主导的未来可能会受到思想多样性减少的影响。

AI.tldr: 该论文测试了大型语言模型（LLMs）是否能模拟人类参与者进行社会科学研究，发现模型在回答复杂问题时缺乏多样性，存在'正确答案'效应。
AI.motivation: 验证LLMs在社会科学实验中替代人类参与者的可行性，并探讨其思想多样性是否符合现实人类表现。
AI.method: 使用GPT3.5复制Many Labs 2项目的14项研究，通过预注册分析检测结果可重复性，并探索'正确答案'效应的稳定性。
AI.result: 仅复制了37.5%的原始结果，6项研究因'正确答案'效应无法分析；在道德基础理论测试中，模型几乎始终被归类为保守派或自由派，但道德倾向均偏向右翼。
AI.conclusion: 质疑LLMs作为社会科学人类参与者替代品的有效性，并警示AI未来可能面临思想多样性下降的风险。

authors_text: Anna Hedström,Philine Bommer,Kristoffer K. Wickstrøm,Wojciech Samek,Sebastian Lapuschkin,Marina M. -C. Höhne
title: The Meta-Evaluation Problem in Explainable AI: Identifying Reliable Estimators with MetaQuantus
title_zh: 可解释人工智能中的元评估问题：使用 MetaQuantus 识别可靠的估计器
comment: 35 pages, 15 figures, 5 tables
comments: 35 pages, 15 figures, 5 tables
abstract: One of the unsolved challenges in the field of Explainable AI (XAI) is determining how to most reliably estimate the quality of an explanation method in the absence of ground truth explanation labels. Resolving this issue is of utmost importance as the evaluation outcomes generated by competing evaluation methods (or ''quality estimators''), which aim at measuring the same property of an explanation method, frequently present conflicting rankings. Such disagreements can be challenging for practitioners to interpret, thereby complicating their ability to select the best-performing explanation method. We address this problem through a meta-evaluation of different quality estimators in XAI, which we define as ''the process of evaluating the evaluation method''. Our novel framework, MetaQuantus, analyses two complementary performance characteristics of a quality estimator: its resilience to noise and reactivity to randomness, thus circumventing the need for ground truth labels. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework through a series of experiments, targeting various open questions in XAI such as the selection and hyperparameter optimisation of quality estimators. Our work is released under an open-source license (https://github.com/annahedstroem/MetaQuantus) to serve as a development tool for XAI- and Machine Learning (ML) practitioners to verify and benchmark newly constructed quality estimators in a given explainability context. With this work, we provide the community with clear and theoretically-grounded guidance for identifying reliable evaluation methods, thus facilitating reproducibility in the field.
summary: One of the unsolved challenges in the field of Explainable AI (XAI) is determining how to most reliably estimate the quality of an explanation method in the absence of ground truth explanation labels. Resolving this issue is of utmost importance as the evaluation outcomes generated by competing evaluation methods (or ''quality estimators''), which aim at measuring the same property of an explanation method, frequently present conflicting rankings. Such disagreements can be challenging for practitioners to interpret, thereby complicating their ability to select the best-performing explanation method. We address this problem through a meta-evaluation of different quality estimators in XAI, which we define as ''the process of evaluating the evaluation method''. Our novel framework, MetaQuantus, analyses two complementary performance characteristics of a quality estimator: its resilience to noise and reactivity to randomness, thus circumventing the need for ground truth labels. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework through a series of experiments, targeting various open questions in XAI such as the selection and hyperparameter optimisation of quality estimators. Our work is released under an open-source license (https://github.com/annahedstroem/MetaQuantus) to serve as a development tool for XAI- and Machine Learning (ML) practitioners to verify and benchmark newly constructed quality estimators in a given explainability context. With this work, we provide the community with clear and theoretically-grounded guidance for identifying reliable evaluation methods, thus facilitating reproducibility in the field.
abstract_zh: 可解释人工智能（XAI）领域尚未解决的挑战之一是确定如何在缺乏基本事实解释标签的情况下最可靠地估计解释方法的质量。解决这个问题至关重要，因为旨在衡量解释方法相同属性的竞争评估方法（或“质量估计器”）产生的评估结果经常出现相互冲突的排名。这种分歧对于从业者来说可能难以解释，从而使他们选择最佳解释方法的能力变得复杂。我们通过 XAI 中不同质量估计器的元评估来解决这个问题，我们将其定义为“评估评估方法的过程”。我们的新颖框架 MetaQuantus 分析了质量估计器的两个互补的性能特征：其对噪声的弹性和对随机性的反应性，从而避免了对真实标签的需要。我们通过一系列实验证明了我们框架的有效性，针对 XAI 中的各种开放问题，例如质量估计器的选择和超参数优化。我们的工作是在开源许可证 (https://github.com/annahedstroem/MetaQuantus) 下发布的，作为 XAI 和机器学习 (ML) 从业者的开发工具，在给定的可解释性上下文中验证和基准新构建的质量估计器。通过这项工作，我们为社区提供了明确且有理论依据的指导，以识别可靠的评估方法，从而促进该领域的可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaQuantus框架，通过元评估方法解决可解释AI中缺乏真实解释标签时如何可靠评估解释方法质量的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有质量评估方法在衡量解释方法性能时存在冲突排名，导致实践者难以选择最佳方法。
AI.method: MetaQuantus框架通过分析质量评估器对噪声的鲁棒性和对随机性的反应性，无需真实标签即可评估其性能。
AI.result: 实验验证了框架的有效性，成功应用于质量评估器选择与超参数优化，并开源工具供社区使用。
AI.conclusion: 为XAI领域提供了理论依据的评估方法选择指南，推动了该领域的可重复性研究。

search_text: The Meta-Evaluation Problem in Explainable AI: Identifying Reliable Estimators with MetaQuantus 可解释人工智能中的元评估问题：使用 MetaQuantus 识别可靠的估计器 One of the unsolved challenges in the field of Explainable AI (XAI) is determining how to most reliably estimate the quality of an explanation method in the absence of ground truth explanation labels. Resolving this issue is of utmost importance as the evaluation outcomes generated by competing evaluation methods (or ''quality estimators''), which aim at measuring the same property of an explanation method, frequently present conflicting rankings. Such disagreements can be challenging for practitioners to interpret, thereby complicating their ability to select the best-performing explanation method. We address this problem through a meta-evaluation of different quality estimators in XAI, which we define as ''the process of evaluating the evaluation method''. Our novel framework, MetaQuantus, analyses two complementary performance characteristics of a quality estimator: its resilience to noise and reactivity to randomness, thus circumventing the need for ground truth labels. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework through a series of experiments, targeting various open questions in XAI such as the selection and hyperparameter optimisation of quality estimators. Our work is released under an open-source license (https://github.com/annahedstroem/MetaQuantus) to serve as a development tool for XAI- and Machine Learning (ML) practitioners to verify and benchmark newly constructed quality estimators in a given explainability context. With this work, we provide the community with clear and theoretically-grounded guidance for identifying reliable evaluation methods, thus facilitating reproducibility in the field. 可解释人工智能（XAI）领域尚未解决的挑战之一是确定如何在缺乏基本事实解释标签的情况下最可靠地估计解释方法的质量。解决这个问题至关重要，因为旨在衡量解释方法相同属性的竞争评估方法（或“质量估计器”）产生的评估结果经常出现相互冲突的排名。这种分歧对于从业者来说可能难以解释，从而使他们选择最佳解释方法的能力变得复杂。我们通过 XAI 中不同质量估计器的元评估来解决这个问题，我们将其定义为“评估评估方法的过程”。我们的新颖框架 MetaQuantus 分析了质量估计器的两个互补的性能特征：其对噪声的弹性和对随机性的反应性，从而避免了对真实标签的需要。我们通过一系列实验证明了我们框架的有效性，针对 XAI 中的各种开放问题，例如质量估计器的选择和超参数优化。我们的工作是在开源许可证 (https://github.com/annahedstroem/MetaQuantus) 下发布的，作为 XAI 和机器学习 (ML) 从业者的开发工具，在给定的可解释性上下文中验证和基准新构建的质量估计器。通过这项工作，我们为社区提供了明确且有理论依据的指导，以识别可靠的评估方法，从而促进该领域的可重复性。 本文提出MetaQuantus框架，通过元评估方法解决可解释AI中缺乏真实解释标签时如何可靠评估解释方法质量的问题。 Anna Hedström,Philine Bommer,Kristoffer K. Wickstrøm,Wojciech Samek,Sebastian Lapuschkin,Marina M. -C. Höhne cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Naren Sarayu Manoj,Nathan Srebro
title: Interpolation Learning With Minimum Description Length
title_zh: 最小描述长度的插值学习
abstract: We prove that the Minimum Description Length learning rule exhibits tempered overfitting. We obtain tempered agnostic finite sample learning guarantees and characterize the asymptotic behavior in the presence of random label noise.
summary: We prove that the Minimum Description Length learning rule exhibits tempered overfitting. We obtain tempered agnostic finite sample learning guarantees and characterize the asymptotic behavior in the presence of random label noise.
abstract_zh: 我们证明最小描述长度学习规则表现出缓和的过度拟合。我们获得了缓和的不可知有限样本学习保证，并表征了随机标签噪声存在下的渐近行为。

AI.tldr: 研究最小描述长度原则在插值学习中的表现，证明其温和过拟合特性并分析其学习保证。
AI.motivation: 传统学习理论对过拟合现象的理解不足，尤其是在存在随机标签噪声的情况下，需要更精确的理论分析。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和数学证明，结合有限样本学习理论与随机标签噪声的渐进行为分析。
AI.result: 证明了最小描述长度学习规则在有限样本下具有温和过拟合特性，并在随机标签噪声下表现出渐近收敛行为。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为插值学习中的过拟合现象提供了更精确的理论保证，有助于理解模型在噪声环境下的学习行为。

authors_text: Mohamed Aziz Bhouri,Michael Joly,Robert Yu,Soumalya Sarkar,Paris Perdikaris
title: Scalable Bayesian optimization with high-dimensional outputs using randomized prior networks
title_zh: 使用随机先验网络进行高维输出的可扩展贝叶斯优化
comment: 23 pages, 8 figures
comments: 23 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Several fundamental problems in science and engineering consist of global optimization tasks involving unknown high-dimensional (black-box) functions that map a set of controllable variables to the outcomes of an expensive experiment. Bayesian Optimization (BO) techniques are known to be effective in tackling global optimization problems using a relatively small number objective function evaluations, but their performance suffers when dealing with high-dimensional outputs. To overcome the major challenge of dimensionality, here we propose a deep learning framework for BO and sequential decision making based on bootstrapped ensembles of neural architectures with randomized priors. Using appropriate architecture choices, we show that the proposed framework can approximate functional relationships between design variables and quantities of interest, even in cases where the latter take values in high-dimensional vector spaces or even infinite-dimensional function spaces. In the context of BO, we augmented the proposed probabilistic surrogates with re-parameterized Monte Carlo approximations of multiple-point (parallel) acquisition functions, as well as methodological extensions for accommodating black-box constraints and multi-fidelity information sources. We test the proposed framework against state-of-the-art methods for BO and demonstrate superior performance across several challenging tasks with high-dimensional outputs, including a constrained multi-fidelity optimization task involving shape optimization of rotor blades in turbo-machinery.
summary: Several fundamental problems in science and engineering consist of global optimization tasks involving unknown high-dimensional (black-box) functions that map a set of controllable variables to the outcomes of an expensive experiment. Bayesian Optimization (BO) techniques are known to be effective in tackling global optimization problems using a relatively small number objective function evaluations, but their performance suffers when dealing with high-dimensional outputs. To overcome the major challenge of dimensionality, here we propose a deep learning framework for BO and sequential decision making based on bootstrapped ensembles of neural architectures with randomized priors. Using appropriate architecture choices, we show that the proposed framework can approximate functional relationships between design variables and quantities of interest, even in cases where the latter take values in high-dimensional vector spaces or even infinite-dimensional function spaces. In the context of BO, we augmented the proposed probabilistic surrogates with re-parameterized Monte Carlo approximations of multiple-point (parallel) acquisition functions, as well as methodological extensions for accommodating black-box constraints and multi-fidelity information sources. We test the proposed framework against state-of-the-art methods for BO and demonstrate superior performance across several challenging tasks with high-dimensional outputs, including a constrained multi-fidelity optimization task involving shape optimization of rotor blades in turbo-machinery.
abstract_zh: 科学和工程中的几个基本问​​题包括涉及未知高维（黑盒）函数的全局优化任务，这些函数将一组可控变量映射到昂贵实验的结果。众所周知，贝叶斯优化 (BO) 技术可以使用相对少量的目标函数评估来有效解决全局优化问题，但在处理高维输出时，其性能会受到影响。为了克服维数的主要挑战，我们在这里提出了一种基于具有随机先验的神经架构自举集成的 BO 和顺序决策的深度学习框架。使用适当的架构选择，我们表明所提出的框架可以近似设计变量和感兴趣的数量之间的函数关系，即使后者在高维向量空间甚至无限维函数空间中取值。在 BO 的背景下，我们通过多点（并行）采集函数的重新参数化蒙特卡罗近似以及适应黑盒约束和多保真度信息源的方法扩展来增强所提出的概率代理。我们针对最先进的 BO 方法测试了所提出的框架，并在具有高维输出的几个具有挑战性的任务中展示了卓越的性能，包括涉及涡轮机械中转子叶片形状优化的约束多保真度优化任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机先验网络的深度学习框架，用于解决高维输出的可扩展贝叶斯优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化在处理高维输出时效率低下，难以建模复杂映射关系及约束条件，亟需改进方法以应对科学工程中的高维优化挑战。
AI.method: 采用引导式神经网络集成架构，结合随机先验与重参数化蒙特卡洛近似，扩展多点采集函数及多保真度约束处理机制。
AI.result: 在包含涡轮机械叶片形状优化等任务的多个高维问题中，该框架性能优于现有最先进的贝叶斯优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度学习与贝叶斯优化的融合，提出的框架有效解决了高维输出优化难题，在复杂工程场景中展现出显著优势。

authors_text: Sheng Wang,Zihao Zhao,Xi Ouyang,Qian Wang,Dinggang Shen
title: ChatCAD: Interactive Computer-Aided Diagnosis on Medical Image using Large Language Models
title_zh: ChatCAD：使用大型语言模型对医学图像进行交互式计算机辅助诊断
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated their potential in clinical applications, providing valuable medical knowledge and advice. For example, a large dialog LLM like ChatGPT has successfully passed part of the US medical licensing exam. However, LLMs currently have difficulty processing images, making it challenging to interpret information from medical images, which are rich in information that supports clinical decisions. On the other hand, computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) networks for medical images have seen significant success in the medical field by using advanced deep-learning algorithms to support clinical decision-making. This paper presents a method for integrating LLMs into medical-image CAD networks. The proposed framework uses LLMs to enhance the output of multiple CAD networks, such as diagnosis networks, lesion segmentation networks, and report generation networks, by summarizing and reorganizing the information presented in natural language text format. The goal is to merge the strengths of LLMs' medical domain knowledge and logical reasoning with the vision understanding capability of existing medical-image CAD models to create a more user-friendly and understandable system for patients compared to conventional CAD systems. In the future, LLM's medical knowledge can be also used to improve the performance of vision-based medical-image CAD models.
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated their potential in clinical applications, providing valuable medical knowledge and advice. For example, a large dialog LLM like ChatGPT has successfully passed part of the US medical licensing exam. However, LLMs currently have difficulty processing images, making it challenging to interpret information from medical images, which are rich in information that supports clinical decisions. On the other hand, computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) networks for medical images have seen significant success in the medical field by using advanced deep-learning algorithms to support clinical decision-making. This paper presents a method for integrating LLMs into medical-image CAD networks. The proposed framework uses LLMs to enhance the output of multiple CAD networks, such as diagnosis networks, lesion segmentation networks, and report generation networks, by summarizing and reorganizing the information presented in natural language text format. The goal is to merge the strengths of LLMs' medical domain knowledge and logical reasoning with the vision understanding capability of existing medical-image CAD models to create a more user-friendly and understandable system for patients compared to conventional CAD systems. In the future, LLM's medical knowledge can be also used to improve the performance of vision-based medical-image CAD models.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）最近展示了其在临床应用中的潜力，提供了宝贵的医学知识和建议。例如像ChatGPT这样的大型对话LLM已经成功通过了美国医疗执照考试的部分内容。然而，法学硕士目前在处理图像方面存在困难，这使得解释医学图像中的信息变得具有挑战性，而医学图像中含有丰富的支持临床决策的信息。另一方面，医学图像计算机辅助诊断（CAD）网络通过使用先进的深度学习算法支持临床决策，在医学领域取得了巨大成功。本文提出了一种将法学硕士集成到医学图像 CAD 网络中的方法。所提出的框架使用法学硕士通过总结和重新组织以自然语言文本格式呈现的信息来增强多个 CAD 网络的输出，例如诊断网络、病变分割网络和报告生成网络。目标是将法学硕士的医学领域知识和逻辑推理的优势与现有医学图像 CAD 模型的视觉理解能力相结合，为患者创建一个比传统 CAD 系统更加用户友好和易于理解的系统。未来，法学硕士的医学知识还可用于提高基于视觉的医学图像 CAD 模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChatCAD框架，通过整合大型语言模型（LLMs）与医学图像计算机辅助诊断（CAD）网络，提升医疗图像诊断的自然语言输出能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在医学知识和逻辑推理方面表现优异，但难以处理医学图像；而传统CAD系统虽擅长图像分析，却缺乏自然语言表达能力，需结合两者优势以提升临床可用性。
AI.method: 设计框架将LLMs与多种CAD网络（如诊断、病灶分割、报告生成）集成，利用LLMs对CAD输出的信息进行自然语言总结与重构，增强系统可解释性。
AI.result: 实现了融合LLMs医学知识与CAD视觉理解能力的交互式诊断系统，生成更符合患者理解需求的自然语言报告，未来可进一步优化视觉模型性能。
AI.conclusion: LLMs与CAD系统的结合可有效提升医学图像诊断的智能化与人性化水平，为临床提供更直观、易懂的辅助决策支持。

search_text: ChatCAD: Interactive Computer-Aided Diagnosis on Medical Image using Large Language Models ChatCAD：使用大型语言模型对医学图像进行交互式计算机辅助诊断 Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated their potential in clinical applications, providing valuable medical knowledge and advice. For example, a large dialog LLM like ChatGPT has successfully passed part of the US medical licensing exam. However, LLMs currently have difficulty processing images, making it challenging to interpret information from medical images, which are rich in information that supports clinical decisions. On the other hand, computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) networks for medical images have seen significant success in the medical field by using advanced deep-learning algorithms to support clinical decision-making. This paper presents a method for integrating LLMs into medical-image CAD networks. The proposed framework uses LLMs to enhance the output of multiple CAD networks, such as diagnosis networks, lesion segmentation networks, and report generation networks, by summarizing and reorganizing the information presented in natural language text format. The goal is to merge the strengths of LLMs' medical domain knowledge and logical reasoning with the vision understanding capability of existing medical-image CAD models to create a more user-friendly and understandable system for patients compared to conventional CAD systems. In the future, LLM's medical knowledge can be also used to improve the performance of vision-based medical-image CAD models. 大语言模型（LLM）最近展示了其在临床应用中的潜力，提供了宝贵的医学知识和建议。例如像ChatGPT这样的大型对话LLM已经成功通过了美国医疗执照考试的部分内容。然而，法学硕士目前在处理图像方面存在困难，这使得解释医学图像中的信息变得具有挑战性，而医学图像中含有丰富的支持临床决策的信息。另一方面，医学图像计算机辅助诊断（CAD）网络通过使用先进的深度学习算法支持临床决策，在医学领域取得了巨大成功。本文提出了一种将法学硕士集成到医学图像 CAD 网络中的方法。所提出的框架使用法学硕士通过总结和重新组织以自然语言文本格式呈现的信息来增强多个 CAD 网络的输出，例如诊断网络、病变分割网络和报告生成网络。目标是将法学硕士的医学领域知识和逻辑推理的优势与现有医学图像 CAD 模型的视觉理解能力相结合，为患者创建一个比传统 CAD 系统更加用户友好和易于理解的系统。未来，法学硕士的医学知识还可用于提高基于视觉的医学图像 CAD 模型的性能。 本文提出ChatCAD框架，通过整合大型语言模型（LLMs）与医学图像计算机辅助诊断（CAD）网络，提升医疗图像诊断的自然语言输出能力。 Sheng Wang,Zihao Zhao,Xi Ouyang,Qian Wang,Dinggang Shen cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Benjamin Hoover,Yuchen Liang,Bao Pham,Rameswar Panda,Hendrik Strobelt,Duen Horng Chau,Mohammed J. Zaki,Dmitry Krotov
title: Energy Transformer
title_zh: 能源变压器
comment: ef:37th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2023)
comments: ef:37th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2023)
abstract: Our work combines aspects of three promising paradigms in machine learning, namely, attention mechanism, energy-based models, and associative memory. Attention is the power-house driving modern deep learning successes, but it lacks clear theoretical foundations. Energy-based models allow a principled approach to discriminative and generative tasks, but the design of the energy functional is not straightforward. At the same time, Dense Associative Memory models or Modern Hopfield Networks have a well-established theoretical foundation, and allow an intuitive design of the energy function. We propose a novel architecture, called the Energy Transformer (or ET for short), that uses a sequence of attention layers that are purposely designed to minimize a specifically engineered energy function, which is responsible for representing the relationships between the tokens. In this work, we introduce the theoretical foundations of ET, explore its empirical capabilities using the image completion task, and obtain strong quantitative results on the graph anomaly detection and graph classification tasks.
summary: Our work combines aspects of three promising paradigms in machine learning, namely, attention mechanism, energy-based models, and associative memory. Attention is the power-house driving modern deep learning successes, but it lacks clear theoretical foundations. Energy-based models allow a principled approach to discriminative and generative tasks, but the design of the energy functional is not straightforward. At the same time, Dense Associative Memory models or Modern Hopfield Networks have a well-established theoretical foundation, and allow an intuitive design of the energy function. We propose a novel architecture, called the Energy Transformer (or ET for short), that uses a sequence of attention layers that are purposely designed to minimize a specifically engineered energy function, which is responsible for representing the relationships between the tokens. In this work, we introduce the theoretical foundations of ET, explore its empirical capabilities using the image completion task, and obtain strong quantitative results on the graph anomaly detection and graph classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们的工作结合了机器学习中三种有前景的范式的各个方面，即注意力机制、基于能量的模型和联想记忆。注意力是推动现代深度学习成功的动力源，但它缺乏明确的理论基础。基于能量的模型允许采用原则性方法来执行判别性和生成性任务，但能量函数的设计并不简单。同时，密集联想记忆模型或现代 Hopfield 网络具有完善的理论基础，并且允许直观地设计能量函数。我们提出了一种新颖的架构，称为 Energy Transformer（简称 ET），它使用一系列注意力层，这些注意力层专门设计用于最小化专门设计的能量函数，该函数负责表示令牌之间的关系。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 ET 的理论基础，利用图像补全任务探索其经验能力，并在图异常检测和图分类任务上获得了强有力的定量结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合注意力机制、能量模型和联想记忆的新型神经网络架构Energy Transformer（ET），用于解决图像补全、图异常检测和分类任务。
AI.motivation: 为解决注意力机制缺乏理论基础、能量模型设计复杂的问题，结合具有明确理论框架的联想记忆模型优势，开发兼具理论支撑与实用性的新型模型架构。
AI.method: 设计基于能量函数的注意力层序列，通过特定能量函数表征token间关系，构建理论支撑的Energy Transformer架构，并在图像补全等任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 在图像补全任务中验证模型有效性，在图异常检测和分类任务中取得显著定量结果。
AI.conclusion: Energy Transformer通过融合三类模型优势，建立了理论完备且实用性强的新架构，实验验证了其在多个任务中的有效性，未来可拓展至更复杂场景。

authors_text: Alexandra Leavitt,Ryan Lam,Nichols Crawford Taylor,Daniel S. Drew,Alan Kuntz
title: Toward a Millimeter-Scale Tendon-Driven Continuum Wrist with Integrated Gripper for Microsurgical Applications
title_zh: 面向显微外科应用的带有集成夹具的毫米级肌腱驱动连续手腕
comment: 2 pages, 3 figures, published in the proceedings of the 2023 Hamlyn Symposium on Medical Robotics (HSMR) conference
comments: 2 pages, 3 figures, published in the proceedings of the 2023 Hamlyn Symposium on Medical Robotics (HSMR) conference
abstract: Microsurgery is a particularly impactful yet challenging form of surgery. Robot assisted microsurgery has the potential to improve surgical dexterity and enable precise operation on such small scales in ways not previously possible. Intraocular microsurgery is a particularly challenging domain in part due to the lack of dexterity that is achievable with rigid instruments inserted through the eye. In this work, we present a new design for a millimeter-scale, dexterous wrist intended for microsurgery applications. The wrist is created via a state-of-the-art two-photon-polymerization (2PP) microfabrication technique, enabling the wrist to be constructed of flexible material with complex internal geometries and critical features at the micron-scale. The wrist features a square cross section with side length of 1.25 mm and total length of 3.75 mm. The wrist has three tendons routed down its length which, when actuated by small-scale linear actuators, enable bending in any plane. We present an integrated gripper actuated by a fourth tendon routed down the center of the robot. We evaluate the wrist and gripper by characterizing its bend-angle. We achieve more than 90 degrees bending in both axes. We demonstrate out of plane bending as well as the robot's ability to grip while actuated. Our integrated gripper/tendon-driven continuum robot design and meso-scale assembly techniques have the potential to enable small-scale wrists with more dexterity than has been previously demonstrated. Such a wrist could improve surgeon capabilities during teleoperation with the potential to improve patient outcomes in a variety of surgical applications, including intraocular surgery.

Our integrated gripper/tendon-driven continuum robot design and meso-scale assembly techniques have the potential to enable small-scale wrists with more dexterity than has been previously demonstrated. Such a wrist could improve surgeon capabilities during teleoperation with the potential to improve patient outcomes in a variety of surgical applications, including intraocular surgery.
abstract_zh: 显微外科手术是一种特别有影响力但具有挑战性的手术形式。机器人辅助显微外科手术有可能提高手术灵活性，并以以前不可能的方式在如此小规模的情况下实现精确手术。眼内显微外科手术是一个特别具有挑战性的领域，部分原因是缺乏通过眼睛插入的刚性仪器可以实现的灵活性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于显微外科应用的毫米级灵巧手腕的新设计。手腕是通过最先进的双光子聚合（2PP）微加工技术制造的，使手腕能够由具有复杂内部几何形状和微米级关键特征的柔性材料制成。手腕横截面为方形，边长为 1.25 毫米，总长为 3.75 毫米。手腕上有三个沿着其长度延伸的肌腱，当由小型线性致动器驱动时，可以在任何平面上弯曲。我们提出了一种集成夹具，由沿着机器人中心延伸的第四根肌腱驱动。我们通过表征其弯曲角度来评估手腕和夹具。我们在两个轴上实现了超过 90 度的弯曲。我们演示了平面外弯曲以及机器人在驱动时的抓握能力。我们的集成夹具/肌腱驱动的连续体机器人设计和细观组装技术有潜力使小型手腕比之前展示的更加灵巧。这种手腕可以提高外科医生在远程手术期间的能力，并有可能改善各种手术应用（包括眼内手术）中的患者治疗效果。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种用于显微手术的毫米级腱驱动连续腕部设计，该设计集成了夹持器。
AI.motivation: 显微手术对操作精度要求极高，而传统工具难以满足需求。因此，需要开发一种更灵活、更精确的微型手术机器人。
AI.method: 采用双光子聚合微制造技术制作柔性材料的复杂内部结构，设计了具有三个肌腱的腕部和一个集成夹持器，通过小型线性执行器进行驱动。
AI.result: 腕部实现了超过90度的弯曲，且具备平面外弯曲和夹持功能，展示了其在显微手术中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该集成夹持器和腱驱动连续机器人设计，结合中尺度装配技术，有望在显微手术中实现更高的灵活性，提升手术效果。

search_text: Toward a Millimeter-Scale Tendon-Driven Continuum Wrist with Integrated Gripper for Microsurgical Applications 面向显微外科应用的带有集成夹具的毫米级肌腱驱动连续手腕 Microsurgery is a particularly impactful yet challenging form of surgery. Robot assisted microsurgery has the potential to improve surgical dexterity and enable precise operation on such small scales in ways not previously possible. Intraocular microsurgery is a particularly challenging domain in part due to the lack of dexterity that is achievable with rigid instruments inserted through the eye. In this work, we present a new design for a millimeter-scale, dexterous wrist intended for microsurgery applications. The wrist is created via a state-of-the-art two-photon-polymerization (2PP) microfabrication technique, enabling the wrist to be constructed of flexible material with complex internal geometries and critical features at the micron-scale. The wrist features a square cross section with side length of 1.25 mm and total length of 3.75 mm. The wrist has three tendons routed down its length which, when actuated by small-scale linear actuators, enable bending in any plane. We present an integrated gripper actuated by a fourth tendon routed down the center of the robot. We evaluate the wrist and gripper by characterizing its bend-angle. We achieve more than 90 degrees bending in both axes. We demonstrate out of plane bending as well as the robot's ability to grip while actuated. Our integrated gripper/tendon-driven continuum robot design and meso-scale assembly techniques have the potential to enable small-scale wrists with more dexterity than has been previously demonstrated. Such a wrist could improve surgeon capabilities during teleoperation with the potential to improve patient outcomes in a variety of surgical applications, including intraocular surgery. 显微外科手术是一种特别有影响力但具有挑战性的手术形式。机器人辅助显微外科手术有可能提高手术灵活性，并以以前不可能的方式在如此小规模的情况下实现精确手术。眼内显微外科手术是一个特别具有挑战性的领域，部分原因是缺乏通过眼睛插入的刚性仪器可以实现的灵活性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于显微外科应用的毫米级灵巧手腕的新设计。手腕是通过最先进的双光子聚合（2PP）微加工技术制造的，使手腕能够由具有复杂内部几何形状和微米级关键特征的柔性材料制成。手腕横截面为方形，边长为 1.25 毫米，总长为 3.75 毫米。手腕上有三个沿着其长度延伸的肌腱，当由小型线性致动器驱动时，可以在任何平面上弯曲。我们提出了一种集成夹具，由沿着机器人中心延伸的第四根肌腱驱动。我们通过表征其弯曲角度来评估手腕和夹具。我们在两个轴上实现了超过 90 度的弯曲。我们演示了平面外弯曲以及机器人在驱动时的抓握能力。我们的集成夹具/肌腱驱动的连续体机器人设计和细观组装技术有潜力使小型手腕比之前展示的更加灵巧。这种手腕可以提高外科医生在远程手术期间的能力，并有可能改善各种手术应用（包括眼内手术）中的患者治疗效果。 本文介绍了一种用于显微手术的毫米级腱驱动连续腕部设计，该设计集成了夹持器。 Alexandra Leavitt,Ryan Lam,Nichols Crawford Taylor,Daniel S. authors_text: Helena Vasconcelos,Gagan Bansal,Adam Fourney,Q. Vera Liao,Jennifer Wortman Vaughan
title: Generation Probabilities Are Not Enough: Uncertainty Highlighting in AI Code Completions
title_zh: 生成概率还不够：人工智能代码补全中的不确定性突出
comment: ACM Transactions on Computer-Human Interaction (TOCHI) 2024
comments: ACM Transactions on Computer-Human Interaction (TOCHI) 2024
abstract: Large-scale generative models enabled the development of AI-powered code completion tools to assist programmers in writing code. However, much like other AI-powered tools, AI-powered code completions are not always accurate, potentially introducing bugs or even security vulnerabilities into code if not properly detected and corrected by a human programmer. One technique that has been proposed and implemented to help programmers identify potential errors is to highlight uncertain tokens. However, there have been no empirical studies exploring the effectiveness of this technique -- nor investigating the different and not-yet-agreed-upon notions of uncertainty in the context of generative models. We explore the question of whether conveying information about uncertainty enables programmers to more quickly and accurately produce code when collaborating with an AI-powered code completion tool, and if so, what measure of uncertainty best fits programmers' needs. Through a mixed-methods study with 30 programmers, we compare three conditions: providing the AI system's code completion alone, highlighting tokens with the lowest likelihood of being generated by the underlying generative model, and highlighting tokens with the highest predicted likelihood of being edited by a programmer. We find that highlighting tokens with the highest predicted likelihood of being edited leads to faster task completion and more targeted edits, and is subjectively preferred by study participants. In contrast, highlighting tokens according to their probability of being generated does not provide any benefit over the baseline with no highlighting. We further explore the design space of how to convey uncertainty in AI-powered code completion tools, and find that programmers prefer highlights that are granular, informative, interpretable, and not overwhelming.
summary: Large-scale generative models enabled the development of AI-powered code completion tools to assist programmers in writing code. However, much like other AI-powered tools, AI-powered code completions are not always accurate, potentially introducing bugs or even security vulnerabilities into code if not properly detected and corrected by a human programmer. One technique that has been proposed and implemented to help programmers identify potential errors is to highlight uncertain tokens. However, there have been no empirical studies exploring the effectiveness of this technique -- nor investigating the different and not-yet-agreed-upon notions of uncertainty in the context of generative models. We explore the question of whether conveying information about uncertainty enables programmers to more quickly and accurately produce code when collaborating with an AI-powered code completion tool, and if so, what measure of uncertainty best fits programmers' needs. Through a mixed-methods study with 30 programmers, we compare three conditions: providing the AI system's code completion alone, highlighting tokens with the lowest likelihood of being generated by the underlying generative model, and highlighting tokens with the highest predicted likelihood of being edited by a programmer. We find that highlighting tokens with the highest predicted likelihood of being edited leads to faster task completion and more targeted edits, and is subjectively preferred by study participants. In contrast, highlighting tokens according to their probability of being generated does not provide any benefit over the baseline with no highlighting. We further explore the design space of how to convey uncertainty in AI-powered code completion tools, and find that programmers prefer highlights that are granular, informative, interpretable, and not overwhelming.
abstract_zh: 大规模生成模型使得人工智能驱动的代码完成工具的开发成为可能，以帮助程序员编写代码。然而，与其他人工智能工具一样，人工智能驱动的代码补全并不总是准确的，如果人类程序员没有正确检测和纠正，可能会在代码中引入错误甚至安全漏洞。已提出并实施的一种帮助程序员识别潜在错误的技术是突出显示不确定的标记。然而，还没有实证研究探索这种技术的有效性，也没有调查生成模型背景下不同的、尚未达成一致的不确定性概念。我们探讨的问题是，传达有关不确定性的信息是否能让程序员在与人工智能驱动的代码完成工具协作时更快、更准确地生成代码，如果是这样，那么哪种不确定性衡量标准最适合程序员的需求。通过对 30 名程序员的混合方法研究，我们比较了三种条件：单独提供 AI 系统的代码完成，突出显示由底层生成模型生成的可能性最低的标记，以及突出显示由程序员编辑的预测可能性最高的标记。我们发现，突出显示预测编辑可能性最高的标记可以更快地完成任务和更有针对性的编辑，并且是研究参与者的主观偏好。相反，根据生成的概率突出显示令牌并没有比不突出显示的基线提供任何好处。我们进一步探索了如何在人工智能驱动的代码完成工具中传达不确定性的设计空间，并发现程序员更喜欢精细的、信息丰富的、可解释的、而不是压倒性的亮点。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在AI代码补全工具中通过突出显示不确定性来帮助程序员更高效、准确地编写代码的效果，并比较了不同不确定性度量方法的优劣。
AI.motivation: AI代码补全工具可能引入错误，而现有通过突出显示不确定标记的方案缺乏实证研究支持，需验证其有效性及适用的不确定性定义。
AI.method: 通过30名程序员的混合方法研究，对比三种条件：仅提供代码补全、突出显示生成概率最低的标记、突出显示程序员最可能编辑的标记。
AI.result: 突出显示程序员高概率编辑的标记显著提升任务完成速度和编辑精准度，且受参与者主观偏好；基于生成概率的突出显示无额外收益。
AI.conclusion: 基于编辑可能性的不确定性突出显示更符合程序员需求，且有效设计需兼顾颗粒度、信息量、可解释性及非干扰性。

authors_text: Laxman Kumarapu,Shiv Ram Dubey,Snehasis Mukherjee,Parkhi Mohan,Sree Pragna Vinnakoti,Subhash Karthikeya
title: WSD: Wild Selfie Dataset for Face Recognition in Selfie Images
title_zh: WSD：用于自拍图像中人脸识别的狂野自拍数据集
abstract: With the rise of handy smart phones in the recent years, the trend of capturing selfie images is observed. Hence efficient approaches are required to be developed for recognising faces in selfie images. Due to the short distance between the camera and face in selfie images, and the different visual effects offered by the selfie apps, face recognition becomes more challenging with existing approaches. A dataset is needed to be developed to encourage the study to recognize faces in selfie images. In order to alleviate this problem and to facilitate the research on selfie face images, we develop a challenging Wild Selfie Dataset (WSD) where the images are captured from the selfie cameras of different smart phones, unlike existing datasets where most of the images are captured in controlled environment. The WSD dataset contains 45,424 images from 42 individuals (i.e., 24 female and 18 male subjects), which are divided into 40,862 training and 4,562 test images. The average number of images per subject is 1,082 with minimum and maximum number of images for any subject are 518 and 2,634, respectively. The proposed dataset consists of several challenges, including but not limited to augmented reality filtering, mirrored images, occlusion, illumination, scale, expressions, view-point, aspect ratio, blur, partial faces, rotation, and alignment. We compare the proposed dataset with existing benchmark datasets in terms of different characteristics. The complexity of WSD dataset is also observed experimentally, where the performance of the existing state-of-the-art face recognition methods is poor on WSD dataset, compared to the existing datasets. Hence, the proposed WSD dataset opens up new challenges in the area of face recognition and can be beneficial to the community to study the specific challenges related to selfie images and develop improved methods for face recognition in selfie images.

abstract_zh: 近年来，随着智能手机的兴起，自拍成为一种趋势。因此，需要开发有效的方法来识别自拍图像中的面部。由于自拍图像中相机与脸部之间的距离较短，以及自拍应用程序提供的不同视觉效果，因此现有方法的人脸识别变得更具挑战性。需要开发一个数据集来鼓励研究识别自拍图像中的面孔。为了缓解这个问题并促进对自拍人脸图像的研究，我们开发了一个具有挑战性的野生自拍数据集（WSD），其中的图像是从不同智能手机的自拍相机捕获的，这与现有数据集的大部分图像是在受控环境中捕获的不同。 WSD 数据集包含来自 42 个人（即 24 名女性和 18 名男性受试者）的 45,424 张图像，分为 40,862 张训练图像和 4,562 张测试图像。每个主题的平均图像数量为 1,082，任何主题的最小和最大图像数量分别为 518 和 2,634。所提出的数据集包含几个挑战，包括但不限于增强现实过滤、镜像图像、遮挡、照明、比例、表情、视点、纵横比、模糊、部分人脸、旋转和对齐。我们将提出的数据集与现有基准数据集的不同特征进行比较。通过实验也观察到了 WSD 数据集的复杂性，与现有数据集相比，现有最先进的人脸识别方法在 WSD 数据集上的性能较差。因此，所提出的 WSD 数据集在人脸识别领域提出了新的挑战，并且有利于社区研究与自拍图像相关的具体挑战并开发改进的自拍图像人脸识别方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为WSD的野生自拍数据集，用于解决自拍图像中人脸识别的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集多为受控环境拍摄，难以反映真实自拍场景中的复杂因素（如滤镜、光照、角度等），需开发更具挑战性的数据集推动研究。
AI.method: 收集42名受试者（24女18男）使用不同智能手机拍摄的45,424张自拍图像，包含遮挡、模糊、光照变化等12类挑战，按40,862张训练集和4,562张测试集划分。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有先进人脸识别方法在WSD上的表现显著低于传统数据集，验证了该数据集的复杂性和挑战性。
AI.conclusion: WSD数据集为自拍图像人脸识别领域提供了新挑战，有助于推动针对自拍特有难题的算法改进研究。

authors_text: Krishna Murthy Jatavallabhula,Alihusein Kuwajerwala,Qiao Gu,Mohd Omama,Tao Chen,Alaa Maalouf,Shuang Li,Ganesh Iyer,Soroush Saryazdi,Nikhil Keetha,Ayush Tewari,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Celso Miguel de Melo,Madhava Krishna,Liam Paull,Florian Shkurti,Antonio Torralba
title: ConceptFusion: Open-set Multimodal 3D Mapping
title_zh: ConceptFusion：开放集多模态 3D 映射
comment: RSS 2023. Project page: https://concept-fusion.github.io Explainer video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rkXgws8fiDs Code: https://github.com/concept-fusion/concept-fusion
comments: RSS 2023. Project page: https://concept-fusion.github.io Explainer video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rkXgws8fiDs Code: https://github.com/concept-fusion/concept-fusion
abstract: Building 3D maps of the environment is central to robot navigation, planning, and interaction with objects in a scene. Most existing approaches that integrate semantic concepts with 3D maps largely remain confined to the closed-set setting: they can only reason about a finite set of concepts, pre-defined at training time. Further, these maps can only be queried using class labels, or in recent work, using text prompts. We address both these issues with ConceptFusion, a scene representation that is (1) fundamentally open-set, enabling reasoning beyond a closed set of concepts and (ii) inherently multimodal, enabling a diverse range of possible queries to the 3D map, from language, to images, to audio, to 3D geometry, all working in concert. ConceptFusion leverages the open-set capabilities of today's foundation models pre-trained on internet-scale data to reason about concepts across modalities such as natural language, images, and audio. We demonstrate that pixel-aligned open-set features can be fused into 3D maps via traditional SLAM and multi-view fusion approaches. This enables effective zero-shot spatial reasoning, not needing any additional training or finetuning, and retains long-tailed concepts better than supervised approaches, outperforming them by more than 40% margin on 3D IoU. We extensively evaluate ConceptFusion on a number of real-world datasets, simulated home environments, a real-world tabletop manipulation task, and an autonomous driving platform. We showcase new avenues for blending foundation models with 3D open-set multimodal mapping. For more information, visit our project page https://concept-fusion.github.io or watch our 5-minute explainer video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rkXgws8fiDs

abstract_zh: 构建环境 3D 地图对于机器人导航、规划以及与场景中的对象交互至关重要。大多数将语义概念与 3D 地图集成的现有方法在很大程度上仍然局限于封闭集设置：它们只能推理在训练时预先定义的有限概念集。此外，这些地图只能使用类标签来查询，或者在最近的工作中，使用文本提示来查询。我们用 ConceptFusion 解决了这两个问题，这是一种场景表示，它 (1) 本质上是开放集，能够超越一组封闭的概念进行推理，(ii) 本质上是多模式的，能够对 3D 地图进行各种可能的查询，从语言、图像、音频到 3D 几何，所有这些都协同工作。 ConceptFusion 利用当今基于互联网规模数据预先训练的基础模型的开放集功能来推理跨自然语言、图像和音频等模式的概念。我们证明了像素对齐的开放集特征可以通过传统的 SLAM 和多视图融合方法融合到 3D 地图中。这可以实现有效的零样本空间推理，不需要任何额外的训练或微调，并且比监督方法更好地保留长尾概念，在 3D IoU 上比它们高出 40% 以上。我们在大量真实数据集、模拟家庭环境、真实桌面操作任务和自动驾驶平台上对 ConceptFusion 进行了广泛评估。我们展示了将基础模型与 3D 开放集多模态映射混合的新途径。有关更多信息，请访问我们的项目页面 https://concept-fusion.github.io 或观看我们的 5 分钟讲解视频 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rkXgws8fiDs

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConceptFusion，一种开放集多模态3D映射方法，使机器人能够超越预定义概念进行跨模态空间推理。
AI.motivation: 现有3D地图方法局限于封闭概念集且查询方式单一，无法处理未知概念或跨模态交互需求。
AI.method: 融合预训练基础模型的开放集能力与传统SLAM技术，通过像素对齐特征融合实现多模态（语言/图像/音频/几何）联合查询。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集和模拟环境中，零样本空间推理性能优于监督方法40%以上，且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: ConceptFusion为融合基础模型与开放集多模态3D映射开辟了新方向，支持更灵活的机器人环境交互。

For more information, visit our project page https://concept-fusion.github.io or watch our 5-minute explainer video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rkXgws8fiDs 构建环境 3D 地图对于机器人导航、规划以及与场景中的对象交互至关重要。大多数将语义概念与 3D 地图集成的现有方法在很大程度上仍然局限于封闭集设置：它们只能推理在训练时预先定义的有限概念集。此外，这些地图只能使用类标签来查询，或者在最近的工作中，使用文本提示来查询。我们用 ConceptFusion 解决了这两个问题，这是一种场景表示，它 (1) 本质上是开放集，能够超越一组封闭的概念进行推理，(ii) 本质上是多模式的，能够对 3D 地图进行各种可能的查询，从语言、图像、音频到 3D 几何，所有这些都协同工作。 ConceptFusion 利用当今基于互联网规模数据预先训练的基础模型的开放集功能来推理跨自然语言、图像和音频等模式的概念。我们证明了像素对齐的开放集特征可以通过传统的 SLAM 和多视图融合方法融合到 3D 地图中。这可以实现有效的零样本空间推理，不需要任何额外的训练或微调，并且比监督方法更好地保留长尾概念，在 3D IoU 上比它们高出 40% 以上。我们在大量真实数据集、模拟家庭环境、真实桌面操作任务和自动驾驶平台上对 ConceptFusion 进行了广泛评估。我们展示了将基础模型与 3D 开放集多模态映射混合的新途径。有关更多信息，请访问我们的项目页面 https://concept-fusion.github.io 或观看我们的 5 分钟讲解视频 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rkXgws8fiDs 本文提出ConceptFusion，一种开放集多模态3D映射方法，使机器人能够超越预定义概念进行跨模态空间推理。 Krishna Murthy Jatavallabhula,Alihusein Kuwajerwala,Qiao Gu,Mohd Omama,Tao Chen,Alaa Maalouf,Shuang Li,Ganesh Iyer,Soroush Saryazdi,Nikhil Keetha,Ayush Tewari,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Celso Miguel de Melo,Madhava Krishna,Liam Paull,Florian Shkurti,Antonio Torralba cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Thamsanqa Mlotshwa,Heinrich van Deventer,Anna Sergeevna Bosman
title: Cauchy Loss Function: Robustness Under Gaussian and Cauchy Noise
title_zh: 柯西损失函数：高斯和柯西噪声下的鲁棒性
comment: A version of this paper was accepted for publication in SACAIR'22
comments: A version of this paper was accepted for publication in SACAIR'22
abstract: In supervised machine learning, the choice of loss function implicitly assumes a particular noise distribution over the data. For example, the frequently used mean squared error (MSE) loss assumes a Gaussian noise distribution. The choice of loss function during training and testing affects the performance of artificial neural networks (ANNs). It is known that MSE may yield substandard performance in the presence of outliers. The Cauchy loss function (CLF) assumes a Cauchy noise distribution, and is therefore potentially better suited for data with outliers. This papers aims to determine the extent of robustness and generalisability of the CLF as compared to MSE. CLF and MSE are assessed on a few handcrafted regression problems, and a real-world regression problem with artificially simulated outliers, in the context of ANN training. CLF yielded results that were either comparable to or better than the results yielded by MSE, with a few notable exceptions.
summary: In supervised machine learning, the choice of loss function implicitly assumes a particular noise distribution over the data. For example, the frequently used mean squared error (MSE) loss assumes a Gaussian noise distribution. The choice of loss function during training and testing affects the performance of artificial neural networks (ANNs). It is known that MSE may yield substandard performance in the presence of outliers. The Cauchy loss function (CLF) assumes a Cauchy noise distribution, and is therefore potentially better suited for data with outliers. This papers aims to determine the extent of robustness and generalisability of the CLF as compared to MSE. CLF and MSE are assessed on a few handcrafted regression problems, and a real-world regression problem with artificially simulated outliers, in the context of ANN training. CLF yielded results that were either comparable to or better than the results yielded by MSE, with a few notable exceptions.
abstract_zh: 在监督机器学习中，损失函数的选择隐含地假设了数据上的特定噪声分布。例如，常用的均方误差（MSE）损失假设高斯噪声分布​​。训练和测试期间损失函数的选择会影响人工神经网络（ANN）的性能。众所周知，在存在异常值的情况下，MSE 可能会产生不合格的性能。柯西损失函数 (CLF) 假设柯西噪声分布，因此可能更适合具有异常值的数据。本文旨在确定 CLF 与 MSE 相比的鲁棒性和通用性程度。在 ANN 训练的背景下，针对一些手工回归问题以及具有人工模拟异常值的现实世界回归问题来评估 CLF 和 MSE。 CLF 产生的结果与 MSE 产生的结果相当或更好，但有一些值得注意的例外。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了Cauchy损失函数（CLF）与均方误差（MSE）在高斯和柯西噪声下的鲁棒性，通过人工设计的回归问题和现实回归问题验证其性能。
AI.motivation: MSE在存在异常值时表现不佳，而CLF假设柯西噪声分布可能更适合处理异常值，需验证其鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 在人工设计的回归任务和包含人工模拟异常值的真实回归任务中，使用人工神经网络训练比较CLF与MSE的性能。
AI.result: CLF在多数情况下表现优于或等于MSE，仅少数情况例外。
AI.conclusion: CLF比MSE更鲁棒，尤其在存在异常值的数据中，建议在相关场景下优先使用CLF。

authors_text: Daniel Gibney,Sharma V. Thankachan
title: Compressibility-Aware Quantum Algorithms on Strings
title_zh: 字符串上的可压缩性感知量子算法
abstract: Sublinear time quantum algorithms have been established for many fundamental problems on strings. This work demonstrates that new, faster quantum algorithms can be designed when the string is highly compressible. We focus on two popular and theoretically significant compression algorithms -- the Lempel-Ziv77 algorithm (LZ77) and the Run-length-encoded Burrows-Wheeler Transform (RL-BWT), and obtain the results below. We first provide a quantum algorithm running in $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{zn})$ time for finding the LZ77 factorization of an input string $T[1..n]$ with $z$ factors. Combined with multiple existing results, this yields an $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{rn})$ time quantum algorithm for finding the RL-BWT encoding with $r$ BWT runs. Note that $r = \tildeΘ(z)$. We complement these results with lower bounds proving that our algorithms are optimal (up to polylog factors). Next, we study the problem of compressed indexing, where we provide a $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{rn})$ time quantum algorithm for constructing a recently designed $\tilde{O}(r)$ space structure with equivalent capabilities as the suffix tree. This data structure is then applied to numerous problems to obtain sublinear time quantum algorithms when the input is highly compressible. For example, we show that the longest common substring of two strings of total length $n$ can be computed in $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{zn})$ time, where $z$ is the number of factors in the LZ77 factorization of their concatenation. This beats the best known $\tilde{O}(n^\frac{2}{3})$ time quantum algorithm when $z$ is sufficiently small.
summary: Sublinear time quantum algorithms have been established for many fundamental problems on strings. This work demonstrates that new, faster quantum algorithms can be designed when the string is highly compressible. We focus on two popular and theoretically significant compression algorithms -- the Lempel-Ziv77 algorithm (LZ77) and the Run-length-encoded Burrows-Wheeler Transform (RL-BWT), and obtain the results below. We first provide a quantum algorithm running in $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{zn})$ time for finding the LZ77 factorization of an input string $T[1..n]$ with $z$ factors. Combined with multiple existing results, this yields an $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{rn})$ time quantum algorithm for finding the RL-BWT encoding with $r$ BWT runs. Note that $r = \tildeΘ(z)$. We complement these results with lower bounds proving that our algorithms are optimal (up to polylog factors). Next, we study the problem of compressed indexing, where we provide a $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{rn})$ time quantum algorithm for constructing a recently designed $\tilde{O}(r)$ space structure with equivalent capabilities as the suffix tree. This data structure is then applied to numerous problems to obtain sublinear time quantum algorithms when the input is highly compressible. For example, we show that the longest common substring of two strings of total length $n$ can be computed in $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{zn})$ time, where $z$ is the number of factors in the LZ77 factorization of their concatenation. This beats the best known $\tilde{O}(n^\frac{2}{3})$ time quantum algorithm when $z$ is sufficiently small.
abstract_zh: 亚线性时间量子算法已经针对弦上的许多基本问题建立起来。这项工作表明，当字符串高度可压缩时，可以设计出更快的新量子算法。我们重点关注两种流行且具有理论意义的压缩算法——Lempel-Ziv77 算法 (LZ77) 和游程编码 Burrows-Wheeler 变换 (RL-BWT)，并获得以下结果。我们首先提供一个在 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{zn})$ 时间内运行的量子算法，用于查找输入字符串 $T[1..n]$ 与 $z$ 因子的 LZ77 分解。结合多个现有结果，这产生了 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{rn})$ 时间量子算法，用于通过 $r$ BWT 运行查找 RL-BWT 编码。请注意 $r = \tildeθ(z)$。我们用下限来补充这些结果，证明我们的算法是最优的（最多可达多对数因子）。接下来，我们研究压缩索引问题，其中我们提供了 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{rn})$ 时间量子算法，用于构造最近设计的 $\tilde{O}(r)$ 空间结构，其具有与后缀树相同的功能。然后，当输入高度可压缩时，将该数据结构应用于许多问题以获得亚线性时间量子算法。例如，我们证明了总长度为 $n$ 的两个字符串的最长公共子串可以在 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{zn})$ 时间内计算出来，其中 $z$ 是它们串联的 LZ77 分解中的因子数。当 $z$ 足够小时，这击败了最著名的 $\tilde{O}(n^\frac{2}{3})$ 时间量子算法。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了针对高可压缩字符串的量子算法，利用LZ77和RL-BWT压缩特性提升算法效率。
AI.motivation: 传统量子算法未充分利用字符串压缩特性，而高可压缩性数据在实际中广泛存在，需针对性优化算法性能。
AI.method: 结合LZ77因子分解与RL-BWT编码特性，设计量子算法并证明其复杂度下界，通过压缩索引结构解决多类字符串问题。
AI.result: 提出Õ(√zn)时间复杂度的LZ77分解算法和Õ(√rn)的RL-BWT编码算法，最长公共子串问题时间复杂度优于经典量子算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在压缩性高的场景下实现最优时间复杂度，为压缩数据处理提供高效的量子解决方案。

authors_text: Shangzan Zhang,Sida Peng,Tianrun Chen,Linzhan Mou,Haotong Lin,Kaicheng Yu,Yiyi Liao,Xiaowei Zhou
title: Painting 3D Nature in 2D: View Synthesis of Natural Scenes from a Single Semantic Mask
title_zh: 在 2D 中绘制 3D 自然：从单个语义掩模查看自然场景的合成
abstract: We introduce a novel approach that takes a single semantic mask as input to synthesize multi-view consistent color images of natural scenes, trained with a collection of single images from the Internet. Prior works on 3D-aware image synthesis either require multi-view supervision or learning category-level prior for specific classes of objects, which can hardly work for natural scenes. Our key idea to solve this challenging problem is to use a semantic field as the intermediate representation, which is easier to reconstruct from an input semantic mask and then translate to a radiance field with the assistance of off-the-shelf semantic image synthesis models. Experiments show that our method outperforms baseline methods and produces photorealistic, multi-view consistent videos of a variety of natural scenes.
summary: We introduce a novel approach that takes a single semantic mask as input to synthesize multi-view consistent color images of natural scenes, trained with a collection of single images from the Internet. Prior works on 3D-aware image synthesis either require multi-view supervision or learning category-level prior for specific classes of objects, which can hardly work for natural scenes. Our key idea to solve this challenging problem is to use a semantic field as the intermediate representation, which is easier to reconstruct from an input semantic mask and then translate to a radiance field with the assistance of off-the-shelf semantic image synthesis models. Experiments show that our method outperforms baseline methods and produces photorealistic, multi-view consistent videos of a variety of natural scenes.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的方法，该方法采用单个语义掩模作为输入来合成自然场景的多视图一致彩色图像，并使用来自互联网的单个图像集合进行训练。先前关于 3D 感知图像合成的工作要么需要多视图监督，要么需要学习特定类别对象的类别级先验，这几乎不适用于自然场景。我们解决这个具有挑战性的问题的关键思想是使用语义场作为中间表示，它更容易从输入语义掩模重建，然后在现成的语义图像合成模型的帮助下转换为辐射场。实验表明，我们的方法优于基线方法，并生成各种自然场景的逼真、多视图一致的视频。

AI.result: 方法在多个自然场景中生成了逼真且多视角一致的视频，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了自然场景的多视角合成问题，为单图生成3D场景提供了新思路。

search_text: Painting 3D Nature in 2D: View Synthesis of Natural Scenes from a Single Semantic Mask 在 2D 中绘制 3D 自然：从单个语义掩模查看自然场景的合成 We introduce a novel approach that takes a single semantic mask as input to synthesize multi-view consistent color images of natural scenes, trained with a collection of single images from the Internet. Prior works on 3D-aware image synthesis either require multi-view supervision or learning category-level prior for specific classes of objects, which can hardly work for natural scenes. Our key idea to solve this challenging problem is to use a semantic field as the intermediate representation, which is easier to reconstruct from an input semantic mask and then translate to a radiance field with the assistance of off-the-shelf semantic image synthesis models. Experiments show that our method outperforms baseline methods and produces photorealistic, multi-view consistent videos of a variety of natural scenes. 我们引入了一种新颖的方法，该方法采用单个语义掩模作为输入来合成自然场景的多视图一致彩色图像，并使用来自互联网的单个图像集合进行训练。先前关于 3D 感知图像合成的工作要么需要多视图监督，要么需要学习特定类别对象的类别级先验，这几乎不适用于自然场景。我们解决这个具有挑战性的问题的关键思想是使用语义场作为中间表示，它更容易从输入语义掩模重建，然后在现成的语义图像合成模型的帮助下转换为辐射场。实验表明，我们的方法优于基线方法，并生成各种自然场景的逼真、多视图一致的视频。 该论文提出一种从单个语义掩码合成多视角一致的自然场景图像的方法。 Shangzan Zhang,Sida Peng,Tianrun Chen,Linzhan Mou,Haotong Lin,Kaicheng Yu,Yiyi Liao,Xiaowei Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Zhuohuan Wu,Sheng Cheng,Pan Zhao,Aditya Gahlawat,Kasey A. Ackerman,Arun Lakshmanan,Chengyu Yang,Jiahao Yu,Naira Hovakimyan
title: $\mathcal{L}_1$Quad: $\mathcal{L}_1$ Adaptive Augmentation of Geometric Control for Agile Quadrotors with Performance Guarantees
title_zh: $\mathcal{L}_1$Quad：$\mathcal{L}_1$敏捷四旋翼飞行器几何控制的自适应增强并保证性能
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work
comments: The first two authors contributed equally to this work
abstract: Quadrotors that can operate predictably in the presence of imperfect model knowledge and external disturbances are crucial in safety-critical applications. We present L1Quad, a control architecture that ensures uniformly bounded transient response of the quadrotor's uncertain dynamics on the special Euclidean group SE(3). By leveraging the geometric controller and the L1 adaptive controller, the L1Quad architecture provides a theoretically justified framework for the design and analysis of quadrotor's tracking controller in the presence of nonlinear (time- and state-dependent) uncertainties on both the translational and rotational dynamics. In addition, we validate the performance of the L1Quad architecture through extensive experiments for eleven types of uncertainties across various trajectories. The results demonstrate that the L1Quad can achieve consistently small tracking errors despite the uncertainties and disturbances and significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art controllers.
summary: Quadrotors that can operate predictably in the presence of imperfect model knowledge and external disturbances are crucial in safety-critical applications. We present L1Quad, a control architecture that ensures uniformly bounded transient response of the quadrotor's uncertain dynamics on the special Euclidean group SE(3). By leveraging the geometric controller and the L1 adaptive controller, the L1Quad architecture provides a theoretically justified framework for the design and analysis of quadrotor's tracking controller in the presence of nonlinear (time- and state-dependent) uncertainties on both the translational and rotational dynamics. In addition, we validate the performance of the L1Quad architecture through extensive experiments for eleven types of uncertainties across various trajectories. The results demonstrate that the L1Quad can achieve consistently small tracking errors despite the uncertainties and disturbances and significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art controllers.
abstract_zh: 在模型知识不完善和外部干扰存在的情况下能够以可预测方式运行的四旋翼飞行器对于安全关键型应用至关重要。我们提出了 L1Quad，一种控制架构，可确保四旋翼飞行器在特殊欧几里得群 SE(3) 上的不确定动力学的一致有界瞬态响应。通过利用几何控制器和 L1 自适应控制器，L1Quad 架构为在平移和旋转动力学存在非线性（时间和状态相关）不确定性的情况下四旋翼飞行器跟踪控制器的设计和分析提供了理论上合理的框架。此外，我们还通过对不同轨迹上 11 种不确定性的广泛实验来验证 L1Quad 架构的性能。结果表明，尽管存在不确定性和干扰，L1Quad 仍然可以实现始终如一的小跟踪误差，并且显着优于现有的最先进控制器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为L1Quad的控制架构，用于在存在模型不确定性和外部干扰的情况下，确保四旋翼飞行器在特殊欧几里得群SE(3)上的动态响应有界。
AI.motivation: 在安全关键应用中，四旋翼飞行器需要能够在模型不完美和外部干扰下稳定运行，现有控制器难以有效处理非线性不确定性。
AI.method: 结合几何控制器与L1自适应控制器，设计L1Quad架构，理论框架可处理平移和旋转动态中的非线性时变不确定性。
AI.result: 通过11种不确定性类型的多轨迹实验验证，L1Quad在存在干扰时仍能保持小跟踪误差，显著优于现有先进控制器。
AI.conclusion: L1Quad为四旋翼飞行器提供了理论支持的控制框架，在多种不确定性下表现出优越的跟踪性能和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Xiaofeng Liu,Fangxu Xing,Jerry L. Prince,Maureen Stone,Georges El Fakhri,Jonghye Woo
title: Synthesizing audio from tongue motion during speech using tagged MRI via transformer
title_zh: 通过变压器使用标记的 MRI 从语音期间的舌头运动合成音频
comment: SPIE Medical Imaging: Deep Dive Oral
comments: SPIE Medical Imaging: Deep Dive Oral
abstract: Investigating the relationship between internal tissue point motion of the tongue and oropharyngeal muscle deformation measured from tagged MRI and intelligible speech can aid in advancing speech motor control theories and developing novel treatment methods for speech related-disorders. However, elucidating the relationship between these two sources of information is challenging, due in part to the disparity in data structure between spatiotemporal motion fields (i.e., 4D motion fields) and one-dimensional audio waveforms. In this work, we present an efficient encoder-decoder translation network for exploring the predictive information inherent in 4D motion fields via 2D spectrograms as a surrogate of the audio data. Specifically, our encoder is based on 3D convolutional spatial modeling and transformer-based temporal modeling. The extracted features are processed by an asymmetric 2D convolution decoder to generate spectrograms that correspond to 4D motion fields. Furthermore, we incorporate a generative adversarial training approach into our framework to further improve synthesis quality on our generated spectrograms. We experiment on 63 paired motion field sequences and speech waveforms, demonstrating that our framework enables the generation of clear audio waveforms from a sequence of motion fields. Thus, our framework has the potential to improve our understanding of the relationship between these two modalities and inform the development of treatments for speech disorders.
summary: Investigating the relationship between internal tissue point motion of the tongue and oropharyngeal muscle deformation measured from tagged MRI and intelligible speech can aid in advancing speech motor control theories and developing novel treatment methods for speech related-disorders. However, elucidating the relationship between these two sources of information is challenging, due in part to the disparity in data structure between spatiotemporal motion fields (i.e., 4D motion fields) and one-dimensional audio waveforms. In this work, we present an efficient encoder-decoder translation network for exploring the predictive information inherent in 4D motion fields via 2D spectrograms as a surrogate of the audio data. Specifically, our encoder is based on 3D convolutional spatial modeling and transformer-based temporal modeling. The extracted features are processed by an asymmetric 2D convolution decoder to generate spectrograms that correspond to 4D motion fields. Furthermore, we incorporate a generative adversarial training approach into our framework to further improve synthesis quality on our generated spectrograms. We experiment on 63 paired motion field sequences and speech waveforms, demonstrating that our framework enables the generation of clear audio waveforms from a sequence of motion fields. Thus, our framework has the potential to improve our understanding of the relationship between these two modalities and inform the development of treatments for speech disorders.
abstract_zh: 研究舌头内部组织点运动与通过标记 MRI 和可理解语音测量的口咽肌肉变形之间的关系可以帮助推进言语运动控制理论并开发针对言语相关障碍的新治疗方法。然而，阐明这两个信息源之间的关系具有挑战性，部分原因是时空运动场（即 4D 运动场）和一维音频波形之间的数据结构存在差异。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效的编码器-解码器翻译网络，用于通过 2D 声谱图作为音频数据的替代来探索 4D 运动场中固有的预测信息。具体来说，我们的编码器基于 3D 卷积空间建模和基于转换器的时间建模。提取的特征由非对称 2D 卷积解码器处理，生成与 4D 运动场相对应的频谱图。此外，我们将生成对抗训练方法纳入我们的框架中，以进一步提高生成的频谱图的合成质量。我们对 63 个配对的运动场序列和语音波形进行了实验，证明我们的框架能够从运动场序列生成清晰的音频波形。因此，我们的框架有可能提高我们对这两种模式之间关系的理解，并为言语障碍治疗的开发提供信息。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于Transformer的编码器-解码器网络，用于从4D舌部运动场中合成音频。
AI.motivation: 研究舌部内部组织点运动与口咽肌变形之间的关系，有助于推进语音运动控制理论并开发治疗语音障碍的新方法。然而，由于4D运动场与一维音频波形的数据结构差异，这一关系的阐明具有挑战性。
AI.method: 论文提出了一种高效的编码器-解码器翻译网络，利用2D频谱图作为音频数据的替代，通过3D卷积空间建模和基于Transformer的时间建模提取特征，再通过非对称2D卷积解码器生成频谱图，并结合生成对抗训练方法提高合成质量。
AI.result: 实验在63组运动场序列和语音波形上进行，证明了该框架能够从运动场序列生成清晰的音频波形。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有助于加深对这两种模态之间关系的理解，并为语音障碍的治疗方法开发提供信息支持。

motivation: 研究舌部内部组织点运动与口咽肌变形之间的关系，有助于推进语音运动控制理论并开发治疗语音障碍的新方法。然而，由于4D运动场与一维音频波形的数据结构差异，这一关系的阐明具有挑战性。
method: 论文提出了一种高效的编码器-解码器翻译网络，利用2D频谱图作为音频数据的替代，通过3D卷积空间建模和基于Transformer的时间建模提取特征，再通过非对称2D卷积解码器生成频谱图，并结合生成对抗训练方法提高合成质量。
result: 实验在63组运动场序列和语音波形上进行，证明了该框架能够从运动场序列生成清晰的音频波形。
conclusion: 该框架有助于加深对这两种模态之间关系的理解，并为语音障碍的治疗方法开发提供信息支持。
search_text: Synthesizing audio from tongue motion during speech using tagged MRI via transformer 通过变压器使用标记的 MRI 从语音期间的舌头运动合成音频 Investigating the relationship between internal tissue point motion of the tongue and oropharyngeal muscle deformation measured from tagged MRI and intelligible speech can aid in advancing speech motor control theories and developing novel treatment methods for speech related-disorders. However, elucidating the relationship between these two sources of information is challenging, due in part to the disparity in data structure between spatiotemporal motion fields (i.e., 4D motion fields) and one-dimensional audio waveforms. In this work, we present an efficient encoder-decoder translation network for exploring the predictive information inherent in 4D motion fields via 2D spectrograms as a surrogate of the audio data. Specifically, our encoder is based on 3D convolutional spatial modeling and transformer-based temporal modeling. The extracted features are processed by an asymmetric 2D convolution decoder to generate spectrograms that correspond to 4D motion fields. Furthermore, we incorporate a generative adversarial training approach into our framework to further improve synthesis quality on our generated spectrograms. We experiment on 63 paired motion field sequences and speech waveforms, demonstrating that our framework enables the generation of clear audio waveforms from a sequence of motion fields. Thus, our framework has the potential to improve our understanding of the relationship between these two modalities and inform the development of treatments for speech disorders. 研究舌头内部组织点运动与通过标记 MRI 和可理解语音测量的口咽肌肉变形之间的关系可以帮助推进言语运动控制理论并开发针对言语相关障碍的新治疗方法。然而，阐明这两个信息源之间的关系具有挑战性，部分原因是时空运动场（即 4D 运动场）和一维音频波形之间的数据结构存在差异。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效的编码器-解码器翻译网络，用于通过 2D 声谱图作为音频数据的替代来探索 4D 运动场中固有的预测信息。具体来说，我们的编码器基于 3D 卷积空间建模和基于转换器的时间建模。提取的特征由非对称 2D 卷积解码器处理，生成与 4D 运动场相对应的频谱图。此外，我们将生成对抗训练方法纳入我们的框架中，以进一步提高生成的频谱图的合成质量。我们对 63 个配对的运动场序列和语音波形进行了实验，证明我们的框架能够从运动场序列生成清晰的音频波形。因此，我们的框架有可能提高我们对这两种模式之间关系的理解，并为言语障碍治疗的开发提供信息。 该论文提出了一种基于Transformer的编码器-解码器网络，用于从4D舌部运动场中合成音频。 Xiaofeng Liu,Fangxu Xing,Jerry L.
