search_text: DualStreamFoveaNet: A Dual Stream Fusion Architecture with Anatomical Awareness for Robust Fovea Localization DualStreamFoveaNet：具有解剖意识的双流融合架构，可实现稳健的中央凹定位 Accurate fovea localization is essential for analyzing retinal diseases to prevent irreversible vision loss. While current deep learning-based methods outperform traditional ones, they still face challenges such as the lack of local anatomical landmarks around the fovea, the inability to robustly handle diseased retinal images, and the variations in image conditions. In this paper, we propose a novel transformer-based architecture called DualStreamFoveaNet (DSFN) for multi-cue fusion. This architecture explicitly incorporates long-range connections and global features using retina and vessel distributions for robust fovea localization. We introduce a spatial attention mechanism in the dual-stream encoder to extract and fuse self-learned anatomical information, focusing more on features distributed along blood vessels and significantly reducing computational costs by decreasing token numbers. Our extensive experiments show that the proposed architecture achieves state-of-the-art performance on two public datasets and one large-scale private dataset. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the DSFN is more robust on both normal and diseased retina images and has better generalization capacity in cross-dataset experiments. 准确的中央凹定位对于分析视网膜疾病以防止不可逆的视力丧失至关重要。虽然当前基于深度学习的方法优于传统方法，但它们仍然面临挑战，例如中央凹周围缺乏局部解剖标志、无法稳健地处理患病的视网膜图像以及图像条件的变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于变压器的新颖架构，称为 DualStreamFoveaNet (DSFN)，用于多线索融合。该架构明确地结合了远程连接和全局特征，使用视网膜和血管分布来实现强大的中央凹定位。我们在双流编码器中引入了空间注意力机制来提取和融合自学的解剖信息，更多地关注沿着血管分布的特征，并通过减少标记数量来显着降低计算成本。我们的大量实验表明，所提出的架构在两个公共数据集和一个大型私有数据集上实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们证明 DSFN 在正常和患病视网膜图像上都更稳健，并且在跨数据集实验中具有更好的泛化能力。 本文提出了一种基于双流融合架构的DualStreamFoveaNet（DSFN），通过解剖学特征增强实现稳健的黄斑定位，以提升视网膜疾病分析的准确性。 Sifan Song,Jinfeng Wang,Zilong Wang,Hongxing Wang,Jionglong Su,Xiaowei Ding,Kang Dang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Emil Brissman,Per-Erik Forssén,Johan Edstedt
title: Camera Calibration without Camera Access -- A Robust Validation Technique for Extended PnP Methods
title_zh: 无需相机访问即可进行相机校准——扩展 PnP 方法的稳健验证技术
abstract: A challenge in image based metrology and forensics is intrinsic camera calibration when the used camera is unavailable. The unavailability raises two questions. The first question is how to find the projection model that describes the camera, and the second is to detect incorrect models. In this work, we use off-the-shelf extended PnP-methods to find the model from 2D-3D correspondences, and propose a method for model validation. The most common strategy for evaluating a projection model is comparing different models' residual variances - however, this naive strategy cannot distinguish whether the projection model is potentially underfitted or overfitted. To this end, we model the residual errors for each correspondence, individually scale all residuals using a predicted variance and test if the new residuals are drawn from a standard normal distribution. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed validation in experiments on synthetic data, simulating 2D detection and Lidar measurements. Additionally, we provide experiments using data from an actual scene and compare non-camera access and camera access calibrations. Last, we use our method to validate annotations in MegaDepth.
summary: A challenge in image based metrology and forensics is intrinsic camera calibration when the used camera is unavailable. The unavailability raises two questions. The first question is how to find the projection model that describes the camera, and the second is to detect incorrect models. In this work, we use off-the-shelf extended PnP-methods to find the model from 2D-3D correspondences, and propose a method for model validation. The most common strategy for evaluating a projection model is comparing different models' residual variances - however, this naive strategy cannot distinguish whether the projection model is potentially underfitted or overfitted. To this end, we model the residual errors for each correspondence, individually scale all residuals using a predicted variance and test if the new residuals are drawn from a standard normal distribution. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed validation in experiments on synthetic data, simulating 2D detection and Lidar measurements. Additionally, we provide experiments using data from an actual scene and compare non-camera access and camera access calibrations. Last, we use our method to validate annotations in MegaDepth.
abstract_zh: 基于图像的计量和取证的挑战是当所用相机不可用时进行内部相机校准。不可用引发了两个问题。第一个问题是如何找到描述相机的投影模型，第二个问题是检测错误的模型。在这项工作中，我们使用现成的扩展 PnP 方法从 2D-3D 对应关系中查找模型，并提出了一种模型验证方法。评估投影模型的最常见策略是比较不同模型的残差方差 - 然而，这种简单的策略无法区分投影模型是否可能欠拟合或过拟合。为此，我们对每个对应关系的残差进行建模，使用预测方差单独缩放所有残差，并测试新残差是否来自标准正态分布。我们在合成数据实验、模拟 2D 检测和激光雷达测量中证明了我们提出的验证的有效性。此外，我们还使用实际场景的数据进行实验，并比较非相机访问和相机访问校准。最后，我们使用我们的方法来验证 MegaDepth 中的注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需实际相机访问的鲁棒相机标定验证方法，通过扩展PnP算法和残差分析解决投影模型评估难题。
AI.motivation: 传统相机标定依赖物理访问设备，而法证和计量场景常面临相机不可用问题，且现有残差方差比较法无法区分模型欠拟合/过拟合风险。
AI.method: 基于扩展PnP方法从2D-3D对应关系重建投影模型，通过预测方差缩放残差并检验其是否符合标准正态分布实现模型验证。
AI.result: 在合成数据、实际场景数据及MegaDepth数据集验证中，该方法有效识别错误模型，且与传统标定结果具有可比性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的验证技术为无相机访问场景提供了可靠标定评估方案，可提升图像计量和法证分析的可信度。

authors_text: Kaiyue Liu,Qi Sun,Daming Sun,Mengduo Yang,Nizhuan Wang
title: Underwater target detection based on improved YOLOv7
title_zh: 基于改进YOLOv7的水下目标检测
abstract: Underwater target detection is a crucial aspect of ocean exploration. However, conventional underwater target detection methods face several challenges such as inaccurate feature extraction, slow detection speed and lack of robustness in complex underwater environments. To address these limitations, this study proposes an improved YOLOv7 network (YOLOv7-AC) for underwater target detection. The proposed network utilizes an ACmixBlock module to replace the 3x3 convolution block in the E-ELAN structure, and incorporates jump connections and 1x1 convolution architecture between ACmixBlock modules to improve feature extraction and network reasoning speed. Additionally, a ResNet-ACmix module is designed to avoid feature information loss and reduce computation, while a Global Attention Mechanism (GAM) is inserted in the backbone and head parts of the model to improve feature extraction. Furthermore, the K-means++ algorithm is used instead of K-means to obtain anchor boxes and enhance model accuracy. Experimental results show that the improved YOLOv7 network outperforms the original YOLOv7 model and other popular underwater target detection methods. The proposed network achieved a mean average precision (mAP) value of 89.6% and 97.4% on the URPC dataset and Brackish dataset, respectively, and demonstrated a higher frame per second (FPS) compared to the original YOLOv7 model. The source code for this study is publicly available at https://github.com/NZWANG/YOLOV7-AC. In conclusion, the improved YOLOv7 network proposed in this study represents a promising solution for underwater target detection and holds great potential for practical applications in various underwater tasks.
summary: Underwater target detection is a crucial aspect of ocean exploration. However, conventional underwater target detection methods face several challenges such as inaccurate feature extraction, slow detection speed and lack of robustness in complex underwater environments. To address these limitations, this study proposes an improved YOLOv7 network (YOLOv7-AC) for underwater target detection. The proposed network utilizes an ACmixBlock module to replace the 3x3 convolution block in the E-ELAN structure, and incorporates jump connections and 1x1 convolution architecture between ACmixBlock modules to improve feature extraction and network reasoning speed. Additionally, a ResNet-ACmix module is designed to avoid feature information loss and reduce computation, while a Global Attention Mechanism (GAM) is inserted in the backbone and head parts of the model to improve feature extraction. Furthermore, the K-means++ algorithm is used instead of K-means to obtain anchor boxes and enhance model accuracy. Experimental results show that the improved YOLOv7 network outperforms the original YOLOv7 model and other popular underwater target detection methods. The proposed network achieved a mean average precision (mAP) value of 89.6% and 97.4% on the URPC dataset and Brackish dataset, respectively, and demonstrated a higher frame per second (FPS) compared to the original YOLOv7 model. The source code for this study is publicly available at https://github.com/NZWANG/YOLOV7-AC. In conclusion, the improved YOLOv7 network proposed in this study represents a promising solution for underwater target detection and holds great potential for practical applications in various underwater tasks.
abstract_zh: 水下目标检测是海洋探索的一个重要方面。然而，传统的水下目标检测方法面临着特征提取不准确、检测速度慢以及在复杂水下环境下缺乏鲁棒性等挑战。为了解决这些限制，本研究提出了一种用于水下目标检测的改进的 YOLOv7 网络（YOLOv7-AC）。所提出的网络利用ACmixBlock模块取代E-ELAN结构中的3x3卷积块，并在ACmixBlock模块之间结合跳跃连接和1x1卷积架构，以提高特征提取和网络推理速度。此外，ResNet-ACmix模块旨在避免特征信息丢失并减少计算量，同时在模型的主干和头部插入全局注意力机制（GAM）以改进特征提取。此外，使用K-means++算法代替K-means来获取anchor box，提高模型精度。实验结果表明，改进后的YOLOv7网络优于原始YOLOv7模型和其他流行的水下目标检测方法。所提出的网络在 URPC 数据集和 Brackish 数据集上分别实现了 89.6% 和 97.4% 的平均精度 (mAP) 值，并且与原始 YOLOv7 模型相比，表现出更高的每秒帧数 (FPS)。本研究的源代码可在 https://github.com/NZWANG/YOLOV7-AC 上公开获取。总之，本研究提出的改进的 YOLOv7 网络代表了水下目标检测的一种有前途的解决方案，并且在各种水下任务中具有巨大的实际应用潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的YOLOv7网络（YOLOv7-AC）用于水下目标检测，以解决传统方法在特征提取、检测速度和鲁棒性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统水下目标检测方法存在特征提取不准确、检测速度慢及复杂水下环境适应性差等问题，需改进模型以提升性能。
AI.method: 采用ACmixBlock模块替代E-ELAN结构中的3x3卷积块，结合跳跃连接与1x1卷积优化特征提取；设计ResNet-ACmix模块减少计算量，引入全局注意力机制（GAM）增强特征表达，并使用K-means++算法优化锚框生成。
AI.result: 在URPC和Brackish数据集上分别达到89.6%和97.4%的mAP，且帧率（FPS）优于原始YOLOv7模型。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的YOLOv7-AC网络在水下目标检测中表现优异，具有实际应用潜力。

conclusion: 改进后的YOLOv7-AC网络在水下目标检测中表现优异，具有实际应用潜力。
search_text: Underwater target detection based on improved YOLOv7 基于改进YOLOv7的水下目标检测 Underwater target detection is a crucial aspect of ocean exploration. However, conventional underwater target detection methods face several challenges such as inaccurate feature extraction, slow detection speed and lack of robustness in complex underwater environments. To address these limitations, this study proposes an improved YOLOv7 network (YOLOv7-AC) for underwater target detection. The proposed network utilizes an ACmixBlock module to replace the 3x3 convolution block in the E-ELAN structure, and incorporates jump connections and 1x1 convolution architecture between ACmixBlock modules to improve feature extraction and network reasoning speed. Additionally, a ResNet-ACmix module is designed to avoid feature information loss and reduce computation, while a Global Attention Mechanism (GAM) is inserted in the backbone and head parts of the model to improve feature extraction. Furthermore, the K-means++ algorithm is used instead of K-means to obtain anchor boxes and enhance model accuracy. Experimental results show that the improved YOLOv7 network outperforms the original YOLOv7 model and other popular underwater target detection methods. The proposed network achieved a mean average precision (mAP) value of 89.6% and 97.4% on the URPC dataset and Brackish dataset, respectively, and demonstrated a higher frame per second (FPS) compared to the original YOLOv7 model. The source code for this study is publicly available at https://github.com/NZWANG/YOLOV7-AC. In conclusion, the improved YOLOv7 network proposed in this study represents a promising solution for underwater target detection and holds great potential for practical applications in various underwater tasks. 水下目标检测是海洋探索的一个重要方面。然而，传统的水下目标检测方法面临着特征提取不准确、检测速度慢以及在复杂水下环境下缺乏鲁棒性等挑战。为了解决这些限制，本研究提出了一种用于水下目标检测的改进的 YOLOv7 网络（YOLOv7-AC）。所提出的网络利用ACmixBlock模块取代E-ELAN结构中的3x3卷积块，并在ACmixBlock模块之间结合跳跃连接和1x1卷积架构，以提高特征提取和网络推理速度。此外，ResNet-ACmix模块旨在避免特征信息丢失并减少计算量，同时在模型的主干和头部插入全局注意力机制（GAM）以改进特征提取。此外，使用K-means++算法代替K-means来获取anchor box，提高模型精度。实验结果表明，改进后的YOLOv7网络优于原始YOLOv7模型和其他流行的水下目标检测方法。所提出的网络在 URPC 数据集和 Brackish 数据集上分别实现了 89.6% 和 97.4% 的平均精度 (mAP) 值，并且与原始 YOLOv7 模型相比，表现出更高的每秒帧数 (FPS)。本研究的源代码可在 https://github.com/NZWANG/YOLOV7-AC 上公开获取。总之，本研究提出的改进的 YOLOv7 网络代表了水下目标检测的一种有前途的解决方案，并且在各种水下任务中具有巨大的实际应用潜力。 本文提出改进的YOLOv7网络（YOLOv7-AC）用于水下目标检测，以解决传统方法在特征提取、检测速度和鲁棒性方面的不足。 Kaiyue Liu,Qi Sun,Daming Sun,Mengduo Yang,Nizhuan Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Max Spahn,Javier Alonso-Mora
title: Autotuning Symbolic Optimization Fabrics for Trajectory Generation
title_zh: 用于轨迹生成的自动调整符号优化结构
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures
abstract: In this paper, we present an automated parameter optimization method for trajectory generation. We formulate parameter optimization as a constrained optimization problem that can be effectively solved using Bayesian optimization. While the approach is generic to any trajectory generation method, we showcase it using optimization fabrics. Optimization fabrics are a geometric trajectory generation method based on non-Riemannian geometry. By symbolically pre-solving the structure of the tree of fabrics, we obtain a parameterized trajectory generator, called symbolic fabrics. We show that autotuned symbolic fabrics reach expert-level performance in a few trials. Additionally, we show that tuning transfers across different robots, motion planning problems and between simulation and real world. Finally, we qualitatively showcase that the framework could be used for coupled mobile manipulation.
summary: In this paper, we present an automated parameter optimization method for trajectory generation. We formulate parameter optimization as a constrained optimization problem that can be effectively solved using Bayesian optimization. While the approach is generic to any trajectory generation method, we showcase it using optimization fabrics. Optimization fabrics are a geometric trajectory generation method based on non-Riemannian geometry. By symbolically pre-solving the structure of the tree of fabrics, we obtain a parameterized trajectory generator, called symbolic fabrics. We show that autotuned symbolic fabrics reach expert-level performance in a few trials. Additionally, we show that tuning transfers across different robots, motion planning problems and between simulation and real world. Finally, we qualitatively showcase that the framework could be used for coupled mobile manipulation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于轨迹生成的自动参数优化方法。我们将参数优化表述为可以使用贝叶斯优化有效解决的约束优化问题。虽然该方法对于任何轨迹生成方法都是通用的，但我们使用优化结构来展示它。优化织物是一种基于非黎曼几何的几何轨迹生成方法。通过符号地预求解织物树的结构，我们获得了一个参数化的轨迹生成器，称为符号织物。我们证明，自动调整的符号织物在几次试验中达到了专家级的性能。此外，我们还展示了调优在不同机器人、运动规划问题以及模拟与现实世界之间的转移。最后，我们定性地展示了该框架可用于耦合移动操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动参数优化方法用于轨迹生成，通过贝叶斯优化和符号织物结构实现高效轨迹生成。
AI.motivation: 传统轨迹生成方法依赖手动调参，难以适应不同机器人和场景，需自动化方法提升效率与泛化能力。
AI.method: 将参数优化建模为约束问题，结合贝叶斯优化与符号织物的几何结构，预解织物树生成参数化轨迹生成器。
AI.result: 自调谐符号织物在少量试验中达专家级性能，调参能力跨机器人、运动规划问题及仿真与现实环境迁移。
AI.conclusion: 框架实现了轨迹生成的自动化优化，具备良好的跨场景迁移性，适用于复杂移动操作任务。

authors_text: Eleonora Andreis,Paolo Panicucci,Francesco Topputo
title: An Image Processing Pipeline for Autonomous Deep-Space Optical Navigation
title_zh: 用于自主深空光学导航的图像处理管道
comment: 26 pages, 7 figures
comments: 26 pages, 7 figures
abstract: A new era of space exploration and exploitation is fast approaching. A multitude of spacecraft will flow in the future decades under the propulsive momentum of the new space economy. Yet, the flourishing proliferation of deep-space assets will make it unsustainable to pilot them from ground with standard radiometric tracking. The adoption of autonomous navigation alternatives is crucial to overcoming these limitations. Among these, optical navigation is an affordable and fully ground-independent approach. Probes can triangulate their position by observing visible beacons, e.g., planets or asteroids, by acquiring their line-of-sight in deep space. To do so, developing efficient and robust image processing algorithms providing information to navigation filters is a necessary action. This paper proposes an innovative pipeline for unresolved beacon recognition and line-of-sight extraction from images for autonomous interplanetary navigation. The developed algorithm exploits the k-vector method for the non-stellar object identification and statistical likelihood to detect whether any beacon projection is visible in the image. Statistical results show that the accuracy in detecting the planet position projection is independent of the spacecraft position uncertainty. Whereas, the planet detection success rate is higher than 95% when the spacecraft position is known with a 3sigma accuracy up to 10^5 km.
summary: A new era of space exploration and exploitation is fast approaching. A multitude of spacecraft will flow in the future decades under the propulsive momentum of the new space economy. Yet, the flourishing proliferation of deep-space assets will make it unsustainable to pilot them from ground with standard radiometric tracking. The adoption of autonomous navigation alternatives is crucial to overcoming these limitations. Among these, optical navigation is an affordable and fully ground-independent approach. Probes can triangulate their position by observing visible beacons, e.g., planets or asteroids, by acquiring their line-of-sight in deep space. To do so, developing efficient and robust image processing algorithms providing information to navigation filters is a necessary action. This paper proposes an innovative pipeline for unresolved beacon recognition and line-of-sight extraction from images for autonomous interplanetary navigation. The developed algorithm exploits the k-vector method for the non-stellar object identification and statistical likelihood to detect whether any beacon projection is visible in the image. Statistical results show that the accuracy in detecting the planet position projection is independent of the spacecraft position uncertainty. Whereas, the planet detection success rate is higher than 95% when the spacecraft position is known with a 3sigma accuracy up to 10^5 km.
abstract_zh: 太空探索和开发的新时代正在迅速到来。未来几十年，在新航天经济的推动下，将有大量的航天器涌入。然而，深空资产的蓬勃发展将使利用标准辐射跟踪从地面进行试验变得不可持续。采用自主导航替代方案对于克服这些限制至关重要。其中，光学导航是一种经济实惠且完全独立于地面的方法。探测器可以通过观察可见的信标（例如行星或小行星）并获取其在深空的视线来三角测量其位置。为此，开发高效且强大的图像处理算法为导航过滤器提供信息是必要的行动。本文提出了一种创新的管道，用于悬而未决的信标识别和从图像中提取视线，以进行自主行星际导航。所开发的算法利用 k 向量方法进行非恒星物体识别和统计可能性来检测图像中是否有任何信标投影可见。统计结果表明，探测行星位置投影的精度与航天器位置不确定性无关。而当航天器位置已知时，行星探测成功率高达 95% 以上，精度可达 10^5 km，精度为 3sigma。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自主星际光学导航的图像处理流程，通过识别未解析的信标并提取视线信息来实现深空探测器的自主定位。
AI.motivation: 随着深空探测器数量的激增，传统的地面雷达测轨方式难以持续支撑，亟需开发自主导航技术以降低对地面设施的依赖。
AI.method: 采用k向量法识别非恒星天体，并结合统计似然模型判断图像中是否存在信标投影，从而实现信标检测与视线提取。
AI.result: 实验表明，行星位置投影检测精度不受航天器位置不确定性影响，当航天器位置精度达3σ误差10^5公里时，行星检测成功率超过95%。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为深空自主光学导航提供了高效可靠的图像处理方案，可有效支持未来深空探测任务的自主化需求。

authors_text: Cheryl Lee,Tianyi Yang,Zhuangbin Chen,Yuxin Su,Yongqiang Yang,Michael R. Lyu
title: Heterogeneous Anomaly Detection for Software Systems via Semi-supervised Cross-modal Attention
title_zh: 通过半监督跨模态注意力进行软件系统的异构异常检测
comment: In Proceedings of the 2023 IEEE/ACM 45th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2207.02918
comments: In Proceedings of the 2023 IEEE/ACM 45th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2207.02918
abstract: Prompt and accurate detection of system anomalies is essential to ensure the reliability of software systems. Unlike manual efforts that exploit all available run-time information, existing approaches usually leverage only a single type of monitoring data (often logs or metrics) or fail to make effective use of the joint information among different types of data. Consequently, many false predictions occur. To better understand the manifestations of system anomalies, we conduct a systematical study on a large amount of heterogeneous data, i.e., logs and metrics. Our study demonstrates that logs and metrics can manifest system anomalies collaboratively and complementarily, and neither of them only is sufficient. Thus, integrating heterogeneous data can help recover the complete picture of a system's health status. In this context, we propose Hades, the first end-to-end semi-supervised approach to effectively identify system anomalies based on heterogeneous data. Our approach employs a hierarchical architecture to learn a global representation of the system status by fusing log semantics and metric patterns. It captures discriminative features and meaningful interactions from heterogeneous data via a cross-modal attention module, trained in a semi-supervised manner. We evaluate Hades extensively on large-scale simulated data and datasets from Huawei Cloud. The experimental results present the effectiveness of our model in detecting system anomalies. We also release the code and the annotated dataset for replication and future research.
summary: Prompt and accurate detection of system anomalies is essential to ensure the reliability of software systems. Unlike manual efforts that exploit all available run-time information, existing approaches usually leverage only a single type of monitoring data (often logs or metrics) or fail to make effective use of the joint information among different types of data. Consequently, many false predictions occur. To better understand the manifestations of system anomalies, we conduct a systematical study on a large amount of heterogeneous data, i.e., logs and metrics. Our study demonstrates that logs and metrics can manifest system anomalies collaboratively and complementarily, and neither of them only is sufficient. Thus, integrating heterogeneous data can help recover the complete picture of a system's health status. In this context, we propose Hades, the first end-to-end semi-supervised approach to effectively identify system anomalies based on heterogeneous data. Our approach employs a hierarchical architecture to learn a global representation of the system status by fusing log semantics and metric patterns. It captures discriminative features and meaningful interactions from heterogeneous data via a cross-modal attention module, trained in a semi-supervised manner. We evaluate Hades extensively on large-scale simulated data and datasets from Huawei Cloud. The experimental results present the effectiveness of our model in detecting system anomalies. We also release the code and the annotated dataset for replication and future research.
abstract_zh: 及时、准确地检测系统异常对于保证软件系统的可靠性至关重要。与利用所有可用运行时信息的手动工作不同，现有方法通常仅利用单一类型的监控数据（通常是日志或指标），或者无法有效利用不同类型数据之间的联合信息。因此，出现了许多错误的预测。为了更好地理解系统异常的表现形式，我们对大量的异构数据，即日志和指标进行了系统的研究。我们的研究表明，日志和指标可以协同、互补地体现系统异常情况，但仅靠其中任何一个都是不够的。因此，集成异构数据可以帮助恢复系统健康状态的完整情况。在这种背景下，我们提出了Hades，这是第一个基于异构数据有效识别系统异常的端到端半监督方法。我们的方法采用分层架构，通过融合日志语义和度量模式来学习系统状态的全局表示。它通过以半监督方式训练的跨模式注意力模块从异构数据中捕获区分特征和有意义的交互。我们在大规模模拟数据和华为云数据集上对 Hades 进行了广泛的评估。实验结果表明了我们的模型在检测系统异常方面的有效性。我们还发布了代码和带注释的数据集，以供复制和未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异构数据（日志和指标）的半监督跨模态注意力方法Hades，用于提高软件系统异常检测的准确性和全面性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常仅利用单一类型监控数据（如日志或指标），或未能有效融合多类型数据，导致异常检测出现大量误判。
AI.method: 设计分层架构学习系统状态的全局表示，通过跨模态注意力模块融合日志语义与指标模式，以半监督方式训练模型捕捉异构数据的判别特征与交互关系。
AI.result: 在大规模模拟数据和华为云真实数据集上验证了Hades的有效性，并开源代码与标注数据集以支持复现与后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 异构数据联合分析能更全面反映系统健康状态，跨模态注意力机制有效提升了异常检测性能。

authors_text: Roman Belaire,Pradeep Varakantham,Thanh Nguyen,David Lo
title: Regret-Based Defense in Adversarial Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 对抗性强化学习中基于遗憾的防御
comment: Accepted at AAMAS 2024
comments: Accepted at AAMAS 2024
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) policies have been shown to be vulnerable to small adversarial noise in observations. Such adversarial noise can have disastrous consequences in safety-critical environments. For instance, a self-driving car receiving adversarially perturbed sensory observations about nearby signs (e.g., a stop sign physically altered to be perceived as a speed limit sign) or objects (e.g., cars altered to be recognized as trees) can be fatal. Existing approaches for making RL algorithms robust to an observation-perturbing adversary have focused on reactive approaches that iteratively improve against adversarial examples generated at each iteration. While such approaches have been shown to provide improvements over regular RL methods, they are reactive and can fare significantly worse if certain categories of adversarial examples are not generated during training. To that end, we pursue a more proactive approach that relies on directly optimizing a well-studied robustness measure, regret instead of expected value. We provide a principled approach that minimizes maximum regret over a "neighborhood" of observations to the received "observation". Our regret criterion can be used to modify existing value- and policy-based Deep RL methods. We demonstrate that our approaches provide a significant improvement in performance across a wide variety of benchmarks against leading approaches for robust Deep RL.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) policies have been shown to be vulnerable to small adversarial noise in observations. Such adversarial noise can have disastrous consequences in safety-critical environments. For instance, a self-driving car receiving adversarially perturbed sensory observations about nearby signs (e.g., a stop sign physically altered to be perceived as a speed limit sign) or objects (e.g., cars altered to be recognized as trees) can be fatal. Existing approaches for making RL algorithms robust to an observation-perturbing adversary have focused on reactive approaches that iteratively improve against adversarial examples generated at each iteration. While such approaches have been shown to provide improvements over regular RL methods, they are reactive and can fare significantly worse if certain categories of adversarial examples are not generated during training. To that end, we pursue a more proactive approach that relies on directly optimizing a well-studied robustness measure, regret instead of expected value. We provide a principled approach that minimizes maximum regret over a "neighborhood" of observations to the received "observation". Our regret criterion can be used to modify existing value- and policy-based Deep RL methods. We demonstrate that our approaches provide a significant improvement in performance across a wide variety of benchmarks against leading approaches for robust Deep RL.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）策略已被证明容易受到观察中的小对抗性噪音的影响。这种对抗性噪音可能会在安全关键的环境中产生灾难性的后果。例如，一辆自动驾驶汽车收到对附近标志（例如，停车标志被物理改变为限速标志）或物体（例如，汽车被改变为被识别为树木）的敌对干扰感官观察可能是致命的。使强化学习算法对干扰观察的对手具有鲁棒性的现有方法主要集中在反应式方法上，这些方法针对每次迭代生成的对抗性示例进行迭代改进。虽然这些方法已被证明可以比常规强化学习方法有所改进，但它们是被动的，如果在训练期间未生成某些类别的对抗性示例，它们的表现可能会更差。为此，我们追求一种更主动的方法，依赖于直接优化经过充分研究的稳健性指标，遗憾而不是预期值。我们提供了一种原则性的方法，可以最大限度地减少对收到的“观察”的“邻近”观察的遗憾。我们的遗憾标准可用于修改现有的基于价值和策略的深度强化学习方法。我们证明，与强大的深度强化学习的领先方法相比，我们的方法在各种基准测试中显着提高了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于遗憾（Regret）的防御方法，用于增强深度强化学习（DRL）在对抗性环境中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗性强化学习方法依赖于训练时生成的对抗样本来提高鲁棒性，但若训练中未涵盖某些对抗类别，可能导致安全关键场景（如自动驾驶）中的严重失效。
AI.method: 通过直接优化‘遗憾’这一稳健性指标，而非传统期望值，在观测的‘邻域’内最小化最大遗憾，从而改进现有值函数和策略梯度方法。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试中，该方法显著优于当前领先的对抗性深度强化学习防御方案。
AI.conclusion: 基于遗憾的防御框架为对抗性强化学习提供了更主动的稳健性优化策略，有效提升了模型在对抗噪声下的性能。

authors_text: Yichen Peng,Chunqi Zhao,Haoran Xie,Tsukasa Fukusato,Kazunori Miyata
title: DiffFaceSketch: High-Fidelity Face Image Synthesis with Sketch-Guided Latent Diffusion Model
title_zh: DiffFaceSketch：使用草图引导的潜在扩散模型进行高保真人脸图像合成
comment: 10 pages, 12 figures, and 2 tables, project page: https://puckikk1202.github.io/difffacesketch2023/
comments: 10 pages, 12 figures, and 2 tables, project page: https://puckikk1202.github.io/difffacesketch2023/
abstract: Synthesizing face images from monochrome sketches is one of the most fundamental tasks in the field of image-to-image translation. However, it is still challenging to (1)~make models learn the high-dimensional face features such as geometry and color, and (2)~take into account the characteristics of input sketches. Existing methods often use sketches as indirect inputs (or as auxiliary inputs) to guide the models, resulting in the loss of sketch features or the alteration of geometry information. In this paper, we introduce a Sketch-Guided Latent Diffusion Model (SGLDM), an LDM-based network architect trained on the paired sketch-face dataset. We apply a Multi-Auto-Encoder (AE) to encode the different input sketches from different regions of a face from pixel space to a feature map in latent space, which enables us to reduce the dimension of the sketch input while preserving the geometry-related information of local face details. We build a sketch-face paired dataset based on the existing method that extracts the edge map from an image. We then introduce a Stochastic Region Abstraction (SRA), an approach to augment our dataset to improve the robustness of SGLDM to handle sketch input with arbitrary abstraction. The evaluation study shows that SGLDM can synthesize high-quality face images with different expressions, facial accessories, and hairstyles from various sketches with different abstraction levels.
summary: Synthesizing face images from monochrome sketches is one of the most fundamental tasks in the field of image-to-image translation. However, it is still challenging to (1)~make models learn the high-dimensional face features such as geometry and color, and (2)~take into account the characteristics of input sketches. Existing methods often use sketches as indirect inputs (or as auxiliary inputs) to guide the models, resulting in the loss of sketch features or the alteration of geometry information. In this paper, we introduce a Sketch-Guided Latent Diffusion Model (SGLDM), an LDM-based network architect trained on the paired sketch-face dataset. We apply a Multi-Auto-Encoder (AE) to encode the different input sketches from different regions of a face from pixel space to a feature map in latent space, which enables us to reduce the dimension of the sketch input while preserving the geometry-related information of local face details. We build a sketch-face paired dataset based on the existing method that extracts the edge map from an image. We then introduce a Stochastic Region Abstraction (SRA), an approach to augment our dataset to improve the robustness of SGLDM to handle sketch input with arbitrary abstraction. The evaluation study shows that SGLDM can synthesize high-quality face images with different expressions, facial accessories, and hairstyles from various sketches with different abstraction levels.
abstract_zh: 从单色草图合成人脸图像是图像到图像转换领域中最基本的任务之一。然而，（1）~让模型学习几何和颜色等高维面部特征，以及（2）~考虑输入草图的特征仍然具有挑战性。现有的方法经常使用草图作为间接输入（或辅助输入）来指导模型，从而导致草图特征的丢失或几何信息的改变。在本文中，我们介绍了草图引导的潜在扩散模型（SGLDM），这是一种基于 LDM 的网络架构，在成对的草图脸部数据集上进行训练。我们应用多重自动编码器（AE）将来自脸部不同区域的不同输入草图从像素空间编码到潜在空间中的特征图，这使我们能够减少草图输入的维度，同时保留局部脸部细节的几何相关信息。我们基于现有的从图像中提取边缘图的方法构建了草图脸部配对数据集。然后，我们引入随机区域抽象（SRA），这是一种增强数据集的方法，以提高 SGLDM 的鲁棒性，以处理具有任意抽象的草图输入。评估研究表明，SGLDM可以从不同抽象级别的各种草图合成具有不同表情、面部配件和发型的高质量人脸图像。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于草图引导的潜在扩散模型（SGLDM），用于从单色素描合成高保真度的人脸图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在保留素描特征和几何信息方面存在不足，难以生成高质量且符合输入草图特征的人脸图像。
AI.method: 设计多自动编码器（AE）将素描编码至潜在空间以保留局部几何信息，并引入随机区域抽象（SRA）增强数据集鲁棒性。
AI.result: SGLDM能从不同抽象级别的草图生成高质量人脸图像，包含多样化的表情、配饰和发型。
AI.conclusion: SGLDM有效解决了草图引导人脸合成中的高维特征学习与输入适应性问题，为该领域提供新方法。

search_text: DiffFaceSketch: High-Fidelity Face Image Synthesis with Sketch-Guided Latent Diffusion Model DiffFaceSketch：使用草图引导的潜在扩散模型进行高保真人脸图像合成 Synthesizing face images from monochrome sketches is one of the most fundamental tasks in the field of image-to-image translation. However, it is still challenging to (1)~make models learn the high-dimensional face features such as geometry and color, and (2)~take into account the characteristics of input sketches. Existing methods often use sketches as indirect inputs (or as auxiliary inputs) to guide the models, resulting in the loss of sketch features or the alteration of geometry information. In this paper, we introduce a Sketch-Guided Latent Diffusion Model (SGLDM), an LDM-based network architect trained on the paired sketch-face dataset. We apply a Multi-Auto-Encoder (AE) to encode the different input sketches from different regions of a face from pixel space to a feature map in latent space, which enables us to reduce the dimension of the sketch input while preserving the geometry-related information of local face details. We build a sketch-face paired dataset based on the existing method that extracts the edge map from an image. We then introduce a Stochastic Region Abstraction (SRA), an approach to augment our dataset to improve the robustness of SGLDM to handle sketch input with arbitrary abstraction. The evaluation study shows that SGLDM can synthesize high-quality face images with different expressions, facial accessories, and hairstyles from various sketches with different abstraction levels. 从单色草图合成人脸图像是图像到图像转换领域中最基本的任务之一。然而，（1）~让模型学习几何和颜色等高维面部特征，以及（2）~考虑输入草图的特征仍然具有挑战性。现有的方法经常使用草图作为间接输入（或辅助输入）来指导模型，从而导致草图特征的丢失或几何信息的改变。在本文中，我们介绍了草图引导的潜在扩散模型（SGLDM），这是一种基于 LDM 的网络架构，在成对的草图脸部数据集上进行训练。我们应用多重自动编码器（AE）将来自脸部不同区域的不同输入草图从像素空间编码到潜在空间中的特征图，这使我们能够减少草图输入的维度，同时保留局部脸部细节的几何相关信息。我们基于现有的从图像中提取边缘图的方法构建了草图脸部配对数据集。然后，我们引入随机区域抽象（SRA），这是一种增强数据集的方法，以提高 SGLDM 的鲁棒性，以处理具有任意抽象的草图输入。评估研究表明，SGLDM可以从不同抽象级别的各种草图合成具有不同表情、面部配件和发型的高质量人脸图像。 提出一种基于草图引导的潜在扩散模型（SGLDM），用于从单色素描合成高保真度的人脸图像。 Yichen Peng,Chunqi Zhao,Haoran Xie,Tsukasa Fukusato,Kazunori Miyata cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Shuhao Shi,Kai Qiao,Jie Yang,Baojie Song,Jian Chen,Bin Yan
title: Over-Sampling Strategy in Feature Space for Graphs based Class-imbalanced Bot Detection
title_zh: 基于图的类不平衡机器人检测的特征空间过采样策略
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures
abstract: The presence of a large number of bots in Online Social Networks (OSN) leads to undesirable social effects. Graph neural networks (GNNs) are effective in detecting bots as they utilize user interactions. However, class-imbalanced issues can affect bot detection performance. To address this, we propose an over-sampling strategy for GNNs (OS-GNN) that generates samples for the minority class without edge synthesis. First, node features are mapped to a feature space through neighborhood aggregation. Then, we generate samples for the minority class in the feature space. Finally, the augmented features are used to train the classifiers. This framework is general and can be easily extended into different GNN architectures. The proposed framework is evaluated using three real-world bot detection benchmark datasets, and it consistently exhibits superiority over the baselines.
summary: The presence of a large number of bots in Online Social Networks (OSN) leads to undesirable social effects. Graph neural networks (GNNs) are effective in detecting bots as they utilize user interactions. However, class-imbalanced issues can affect bot detection performance. To address this, we propose an over-sampling strategy for GNNs (OS-GNN) that generates samples for the minority class without edge synthesis. First, node features are mapped to a feature space through neighborhood aggregation. Then, we generate samples for the minority class in the feature space. Finally, the augmented features are used to train the classifiers. This framework is general and can be easily extended into different GNN architectures. The proposed framework is evaluated using three real-world bot detection benchmark datasets, and it consistently exhibits superiority over the baselines.
abstract_zh: 在线社交网络 (OSN) 中存在大量机器人会导致不良的社会影响。图神经网络 (GNN) 可以有效地检测利用用户交互的机器人。然而，类不平衡问题可能会影响机器人检测性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种 GNN 的过采样策略（OS-GNN），该策略可以为少数类生成样本，而无需进行边缘合成。首先，通过邻域聚合将节点特征映射到特征空间。然后，我们为特征空间中的少数类生成样本。最后，增强的特征用于训练分类器。这个框架是通用的，可以很容易地扩展到不同的 GNN 架构中。所提出的框架使用三个真实世界的机器人检测基准数据集进行评估，并且它始终表现出优于基线的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征空间的过采样策略（OS-GNN），用于解决图神经网络在类别不平衡的社交网络机器人检测中的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 社交网络中机器人检测面临类别不平衡挑战，传统方法依赖边合成的过采样策略存在局限性，需更高效的特征级解决方案。
AI.method: 通过邻域聚合将节点特征映射到特征空间，在特征空间中生成少数类样本，无需边合成，最终利用增强特征训练分类器。
AI.result: 在三个真实世界数据集上验证，OS-GNN框架在机器人检测任务中优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该特征空间过采样框架有效缓解类别不平衡问题，提升GNN检测性能，且具有良好的架构扩展性。

authors_text: Pei Wang,Danna Xue,Yu Zhu,Jinqiu Sun,Qingsen Yan,Sung-eui Yoon,Yanning Zhang
title: Take a Prior from Other Tasks for Severe Blur Removal
title_zh: 优先于其他任务进行严重模糊消除
comment: ef:Computer Vision and Image Understanding2023
comments: ef:Computer Vision and Image Understanding2023
abstract: Recovering clear structures from severely blurry inputs is a challenging problem due to the large movements between the camera and the scene. Although some works apply segmentation maps on human face images for deblurring, they cannot handle natural scenes because objects and degradation are more complex, and inaccurate segmentation maps lead to a loss of details. For general scene deblurring, the feature space of the blurry image and corresponding sharp image under the high-level vision task is closer, which inspires us to rely on other tasks (e.g. classification) to learn a comprehensive prior in severe blur removal cases. We propose a cross-level feature learning strategy based on knowledge distillation to learn the priors, which include global contexts and sharp local structures for recovering potential details. In addition, we propose a semantic prior embedding layer with multi-level aggregation and semantic attention transformation to integrate the priors effectively. We introduce the proposed priors to various models, including the UNet and other mainstream deblurring baselines, leading to better performance on severe blur removal. Extensive experiments on natural image deblurring benchmarks and real-world images, such as GoPro and RealBlur datasets, demonstrate our method's effectiveness and generalization ability.
summary: Recovering clear structures from severely blurry inputs is a challenging problem due to the large movements between the camera and the scene. Although some works apply segmentation maps on human face images for deblurring, they cannot handle natural scenes because objects and degradation are more complex, and inaccurate segmentation maps lead to a loss of details. For general scene deblurring, the feature space of the blurry image and corresponding sharp image under the high-level vision task is closer, which inspires us to rely on other tasks (e.g. classification) to learn a comprehensive prior in severe blur removal cases. We propose a cross-level feature learning strategy based on knowledge distillation to learn the priors, which include global contexts and sharp local structures for recovering potential details. In addition, we propose a semantic prior embedding layer with multi-level aggregation and semantic attention transformation to integrate the priors effectively. We introduce the proposed priors to various models, including the UNet and other mainstream deblurring baselines, leading to better performance on severe blur removal. Extensive experiments on natural image deblurring benchmarks and real-world images, such as GoPro and RealBlur datasets, demonstrate our method's effectiveness and generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 由于相机和场景之间存在较大的移动，从严重模糊的输入中恢复清晰的结构是一个具有挑战性的问题。尽管有些作品在人脸图像上应用分割图进行去模糊，但它们无法处理自然场景，因为对象和退化更加复杂，并且不准确的分割图会导致细节丢失。对于一般场景去模糊，高级视觉任务下的模糊图像和相应的清晰图像的特征空间更接近，这启发我们依靠其他任务（例如分类）来学习严重模糊去除情况下的综合先验。我们提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的跨级特征学习策略来学习先验，其中包括全局上下文和用于恢复潜在细节的清晰局部结构。此外，我们提出了一种具有多级聚合和语义注意转换的语义先验嵌入层，以有效地整合先验。我们将所提出的先验引入各种模型，包括 UNet 和其他主流去模糊基线，从而在严重模糊去除方面获得更好的性能。对自然图像去模糊基准和真实图像（例如 GoPro 和 RealBlur 数据集）的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于跨任务先验学习的严重模糊图像恢复方法
AI.motivation: 现有分割引导的去模糊方法在自然场景中因分割不准确导致细节丢失，需从其他任务中学习更鲁棒的先验知识
AI.method: 设计跨层级特征学习策略与知识蒸馏框架，结合语义先验嵌入层实现多级特征聚合与注意力转换
AI.result: 在GoPro/RealBlur等数据集上显著优于现有方法，展现良好的泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 跨任务先验学习能有效提升严重模糊图像的细节恢复能力

search_text: Take a Prior from Other Tasks for Severe Blur Removal 优先于其他任务进行严重模糊消除 Recovering clear structures from severely blurry inputs is a challenging problem due to the large movements between the camera and the scene. Although some works apply segmentation maps on human face images for deblurring, they cannot handle natural scenes because objects and degradation are more complex, and inaccurate segmentation maps lead to a loss of details. For general scene deblurring, the feature space of the blurry image and corresponding sharp image under the high-level vision task is closer, which inspires us to rely on other tasks (e.g. classification) to learn a comprehensive prior in severe blur removal cases. We propose a cross-level feature learning strategy based on knowledge distillation to learn the priors, which include global contexts and sharp local structures for recovering potential details. In addition, we propose a semantic prior embedding layer with multi-level aggregation and semantic attention transformation to integrate the priors effectively. We introduce the proposed priors to various models, including the UNet and other mainstream deblurring baselines, leading to better performance on severe blur removal. Extensive experiments on natural image deblurring benchmarks and real-world images, such as GoPro and RealBlur datasets, demonstrate our method's effectiveness and generalization ability. 由于相机和场景之间存在较大的移动，从严重模糊的输入中恢复清晰的结构是一个具有挑战性的问题。尽管有些作品在人脸图像上应用分割图进行去模糊，但它们无法处理自然场景，因为对象和退化更加复杂，并且不准确的分割图会导致细节丢失。对于一般场景去模糊，高级视觉任务下的模糊图像和相应的清晰图像的特征空间更接近，这启发我们依靠其他任务（例如分类）来学习严重模糊去除情况下的综合先验。我们提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的跨级特征学习策略来学习先验，其中包括全局上下文和用于恢复潜在细节的清晰局部结构。此外，我们提出了一种具有多级聚合和语义注意转换的语义先验嵌入层，以有效地整合先验。我们将所提出的先验引入各种模型，包括 UNet 和其他主流去模糊基线，从而在严重模糊去除方面获得更好的性能。对自然图像去模糊基准和真实图像（例如 GoPro 和 RealBlur 数据集）的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性和泛化能力。 提出一种基于跨任务先验学习的严重模糊图像恢复方法 Pei Wang,Danna Xue,Yu Zhu,Jinqiu Sun,Qingsen Yan,Sung-eui Yoon,Yanning Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Biao Gong,Shuai Tan,Yutong Feng,Xiaoying Xie,Yuyuan Li,Chaochao Chen,Kecheng Zheng,Yujun Shen,Deli Zhao
title: UKnow: A Unified Knowledge Protocol with Multimodal Knowledge Graph Datasets for Reasoning and Vision-Language Pre-Training
title_zh: UKnow：具有多模态知识图数据集的统一知识协议，用于推理和视觉语言预训练
abstract: This work presents a unified knowledge protocol, called UKnow, which facilitates knowledge-based studies from the perspective of data. Particularly focusing on visual and linguistic modalities, we categorize data knowledge into five unit types, namely, in-image, in-text, cross-image, cross-text, and image-text, and set up an efficient pipeline to help construct the multimodal knowledge graph from any data collection. Thanks to the logical information naturally contained in knowledge graph, organizing datasets under UKnow format opens up more possibilities of data usage compared to the commonly used image-text pairs. Following UKnow protocol, we collect, from public international news, a large-scale multimodal knowledge graph dataset that consists of 1,388,568 nodes (with 571,791 vision-related ones) and 3,673,817 triplets. The dataset is also annotated with rich event tags, including 11 coarse labels and 9,185 fine labels. Experiments on 4 benchmarks demonstrate the potential of UKnow in supporting common-sense reasoning and boosting vision-language pre-training with a single dataset, benefiting from its unified form of knowledge organization. See Appendix to download the dataset.
summary: This work presents a unified knowledge protocol, called UKnow, which facilitates knowledge-based studies from the perspective of data. Particularly focusing on visual and linguistic modalities, we categorize data knowledge into five unit types, namely, in-image, in-text, cross-image, cross-text, and image-text, and set up an efficient pipeline to help construct the multimodal knowledge graph from any data collection. Thanks to the logical information naturally contained in knowledge graph, organizing datasets under UKnow format opens up more possibilities of data usage compared to the commonly used image-text pairs. Following UKnow protocol, we collect, from public international news, a large-scale multimodal knowledge graph dataset that consists of 1,388,568 nodes (with 571,791 vision-related ones) and 3,673,817 triplets. The dataset is also annotated with rich event tags, including 11 coarse labels and 9,185 fine labels. Experiments on 4 benchmarks demonstrate the potential of UKnow in supporting common-sense reasoning and boosting vision-language pre-training with a single dataset, benefiting from its unified form of knowledge organization. See Appendix to download the dataset.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一个统一的知识协议，称为 UKnow，它有助于从数据的角度进行基于知识的研究。我们特别关注视觉和语言模态，将数据知识分为五种单元类型，即图像内、文本内、跨图像、跨文本和图像文本，并建立有效的管道来帮助从任何数据集合构建多模态知识图谱。由于知识图谱中自然包含的逻辑信息，与常用的图文对相比，以 UKnow 格式组织数据集开辟了更多数据使用的可能性。根据UKnow协议，我们从国际公共新闻中收集了一个大规模多模态知识图谱数据集，该数据集由1,388,568个节点（其中571,791个视觉相关节点）和3,673,817个三元组组成。该数据集还标注了丰富的事件标签，包括 11 个粗标签和 9,185 个精细标签。 4 个基准测试的实验证明了 UKnow 在支持常识推理和使用单个数据集促进视觉语言预训练方面的潜力，受益于其统一的知识组织形式。请参阅附录下载数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的知识协议UKnow，用于构建多模态知识图谱数据集，以支持常识推理和视觉-语言预训练。
AI.motivation: 为了更好地利用视觉和语言模态的数据知识，本文提出了一种统一的知识协议，以提升数据的使用效率和灵活性。
AI.method: UKnow协议将数据知识分为五种单元类型，并提供了一种高效的流程来构建多模态知识图谱。从公共国际新闻中收集数据，并标注丰富的事件标签。
AI.result: 构建了一个包含1388568个节点和3673817个三元组的多模态知识图谱数据集，并在4个基准测试中验证了UKnow在常识推理和视觉-语言预训练中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: UKnow协议为多模态知识图谱的构建提供了统一的数据组织形式，有助于提升常识推理和视觉-语言预训练的效果。

authors_text: Savvas Sampaziotis,Sotiris Antonakoudis,Marios Kiatos,Fotios Dimeas,Zoe Dougleri
title: A lightweight method for detecting dynamic target occlusions by the robot body
title_zh: 一种轻量级的机器人本体动态目标遮挡检测方法
comment: Submitted to RAAD 2023
comments: Submitted to RAAD 2023
abstract: Robot vision is greatly affected by occlusions, which poses challenges to autonomous systems. The robot itself may hide targets of interest from the camera, while it moves within the field of view, leading to failures in task execution. For example, if a target of interest is partially occluded by the robot, detecting and grasping it correctly, becomes very challenging. To solve this problem, we propose a computationally lightweight method to determine the areas that the robot occludes. For this purpose, we use the Unified Robot Description Format (URDF) to generate a virtual depth image of the 3D robot model. Using the virtual depth image, we can effectively determine the partially occluded areas to improve the robustness of the information given by the perception system. Due to the real-time capabilities of the method, it can successfully detect occlusions of moving targets by the moving robot. We validate the effectiveness of the method in an experimental setup using a 6-DoF robot arm and an RGB-D camera by detecting and handling occlusions for two tasks: Pose estimation of a moving object for pickup and human tracking for robot handover. The code is available in \url{https://github.com/auth-arl/virtual\_depth\_image}.
summary: Robot vision is greatly affected by occlusions, which poses challenges to autonomous systems. The robot itself may hide targets of interest from the camera, while it moves within the field of view, leading to failures in task execution. For example, if a target of interest is partially occluded by the robot, detecting and grasping it correctly, becomes very challenging. To solve this problem, we propose a computationally lightweight method to determine the areas that the robot occludes. For this purpose, we use the Unified Robot Description Format (URDF) to generate a virtual depth image of the 3D robot model. Using the virtual depth image, we can effectively determine the partially occluded areas to improve the robustness of the information given by the perception system. Due to the real-time capabilities of the method, it can successfully detect occlusions of moving targets by the moving robot. We validate the effectiveness of the method in an experimental setup using a 6-DoF robot arm and an RGB-D camera by detecting and handling occlusions for two tasks: Pose estimation of a moving object for pickup and human tracking for robot handover. The code is available in \url{https://github.com/auth-arl/virtual\_depth\_image}.
abstract_zh: 机器人视觉受遮挡的影响很大，这给自主系统带来了挑战。当机器人在视野内移动时，机器人本身可能会隐藏摄像头感兴趣的目标，从而导致任务执行失败。例如，如果感兴趣的目标被机器人部分遮挡，正确检测和抓取它就变得非常具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种计算轻量级的方法来确定机器人遮挡的区域。为此，我们使用统一机器人描述格式 (URDF) 生成 3D 机器人模型的虚拟深度图像。利用虚拟深度图像，我们可以有效地确定部分被遮挡的区域，以提高感知系统给出的信息的鲁棒性。由于该方法的实时能力，它可以成功检测运动机器人对运动目标的遮挡。我们在使用 6-DoF 机器人手臂和 RGB-D 相机的实验设置中验证了该方法的有效性，通过检测和处理两个任务的遮挡来验证该方法的有效性：用于拾取的移动物体的姿态估计和用于机器人切换的人体跟踪。该代码可在 \url{https://github.com/auth-arl/virtual\_depth\_image} 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级方法，通过生成机器人的虚拟深度图像来检测动态目标被机器人本体遮挡的区域，以提升机器人视觉系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 机器人视觉系统在自主任务中常因机器人本体遮挡目标而失效，尤其在动态场景中难以实时检测和处理遮挡问题。
AI.method: 基于URDF生成机器人的3D虚拟深度图像，利用该图像计算机器人本体遮挡区域，并结合RGB-D相机实现实时遮挡检测。
AI.result: 在6-DoF机械臂和RGB-D相机的实验中，方法成功应用于移动物体抓取和人机协作跟踪任务，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过轻量化的虚拟深度图像生成技术，实现了对动态目标遮挡的实时检测，为机器人自主系统提供了可靠的感知增强方案。

authors_text: Matthias Englert,Heiko Röglin,Berthold Vöcking
title: Worst Case and Probabilistic Analysis of the 2-Opt Algorithm for the TSP
title_zh: TSP 2-Opt 算法的最坏情况和概率分析
comment: An extended abstract of this work has appeared in the Proc. of the 18th ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms. The results of this extended abstract have been split into two articles (Algorithmica 2014) and (ACM Transactions on Algorithms 2016). This report is an updated version of the first journal article, in which two minor errors in the proofs of Lemma 8 and Lemma 9 have been corrected
comments: An extended abstract of this work has appeared in the Proc. of the 18th ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms. The results of this extended abstract have been split into two articles (Algorithmica 2014) and (ACM Transactions on Algorithms 2016). This report is an updated version of the first journal article, in which two minor errors in the proofs of Lemma 8 and Lemma 9 have been corrected
abstract: 2-Opt is probably the most basic local search heuristic for the TSP. This heuristic achieves amazingly good results on real world Euclidean instances both with respect to running time and approximation ratio. There are numerous experimental studies on the performance of 2-Opt. However, the theoretical knowledge about this heuristic is still very limited. Not even its worst case running time on 2-dimensional Euclidean instances was known so far. We clarify this issue by presenting, for every $p\in\mathbb{N}$, a family of $L_p$ instances on which 2-Opt can take an exponential number of steps. Previous probabilistic analyses were restricted to instances in which $n$ points are placed uniformly at random in the unit square $[0,1]^2$. We consider a more advanced model in which the points can be placed independently according to general distributions on $[0,1]^d$, for an arbitrary $d\ge 2$. In particular, we allow different distributions for different points. We study the expected number of local improvements in terms of the number $n$ of points and the maximal density $φ$ of the probability distributions. We show an upper bound on the expected length of any 2-Opt improvement path of $\tilde{O}(n^{4+1/3}\cdotφ^{8/3})$. When starting with an initial tour computed by an insertion heuristic, the upper bound on the expected number of steps improves even to $\tilde{O}(n^{4+1/3-1/d}\cdotφ^{8/3})$. If the distances are measured according to the Manhattan metric, then the expected number of steps is bounded by $\tilde{O}(n^{4-1/d}\cdotφ)$. In addition, we prove an upper bound of $O(\sqrt[d]φ)$ on the expected approximation factor with respect to all $L_p$ metrics. Let us remark that our probabilistic analysis covers as special cases the uniform input model with $φ=1$ and a smoothed analysis with Gaussian perturbations of standard deviation $σ$ with $φ\sim1/σ^d$.

abstract_zh: 2-Opt 可能是 TSP 最基本的本地搜索启发式。这种启发式方法在现实世界的欧几里得实例上在运行时间和近似率方面都取得了令人惊讶的良好结果。关于 2-Opt 的性能有大量的实验研究。然而，关于这种启发式的理论知识仍然非常有限。迄今为止，甚至还不知道其在二维欧几里得实例上最坏情况的运行时间。我们通过为每个 $p\in\mathbb{N}$ 提供一系列 $L_p$ 实例来澄清这个问题，在这些实例上 2-Opt 可以采取指数数量的步骤。以前的概率分析仅限于 $n$ 个点均匀随机放置在单位正方形 $[0,1]^2$ 中的情况。我们考虑一个更高级的模型，其中可以根据 $[0,1]^d$ 上的一般分布独立放置点，对于任意 $d\ge 2$。特别是，我们允许不同的点有不同的分布。我们根据点的数量 $n$ 和概率分布的最大密度 $φ$ 来研究局部改进的预期数量。我们展示了任何 2-Opt 改进路径 $\tilde{O}(n^{4+1/3}\cdotφ^{8/3})$ 的预期长度的上限。当从通过插入启发式计算的初始游览开始时，预期步数的上限甚至会提高到 $\tilde{O}(n^{4+1/3-1/d}\cdotφ^{8/3})$。如果距离是根据曼哈顿度量来测量的，则预期步数的范围为 $\tilde{O}(n^{4-1/d}\cdotφ)$。此外，我们证明了所有 $L_p$ 指标的预期近似因子 $O(\sqrt[d]φ)$ 的上限。让我们注意一下，我们的概率分析涵盖了特殊情况，即 $φ=1$ 的均匀输入模型，以及 $φ\sim1/σ^d$ 的标准差 $σ$ 的高斯扰动的平滑分析。

AI.tldr: 分析2-Opt算法在旅行商问题（TSP）中的最坏情况和概率性能，特别是在高维空间和一般分布下的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管2-Opt在实际中表现优异，但其理论分析（如最坏情况运行时间和概率性能）仍不明确，需填补理论空白。
AI.method: 构造L_p实例证明最坏情况下的指数级步骤；通过高维空间中一般分布的点集进行概率分析，结合插入启发式初始解和不同距离度量。
AI.result: 最坏情况下2-Opt需指数级步骤；概率分析给出期望步骤上界（如~O(n^{4+1/3}·φ^{8/3}}）及近似比上界O(φ^{1/d}），覆盖均匀分布和高斯扰动模型。
AI.conclusion: 明确了2-Opt的理论局限性，扩展了概率分析模型，证明其在一般分布下仍具效率，且结果兼容传统均匀模型和光滑分析。

search_text: Worst Case and Probabilistic Analysis of the 2-Opt Algorithm for the TSP TSP 2-Opt 算法的最坏情况和概率分析 2-Opt is probably the most basic local search heuristic for the TSP. This heuristic achieves amazingly good results on real world Euclidean instances both with respect to running time and approximation ratio. Not even its worst case running time on 2-dimensional Euclidean instances was known so far. authors_text: Jiahao Chen,Zitao Liu,Shuyan Huang,Qiongqiong Liu,Weiqi Luo
title: Improving Interpretability of Deep Sequential Knowledge Tracing Models with Question-centric Cognitive Representations
title_zh: 通过以问题为中心的认知表示提高深度序列知识追踪模型的可解释性
comment: Accepted at AAAI'23: The 37th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2023
comments: Accepted at AAAI'23: The 37th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2023
abstract: Knowledge tracing (KT) is a crucial technique to predict students' future performance by observing their historical learning processes. Due to the powerful representation ability of deep neural networks, remarkable progress has been made by using deep learning techniques to solve the KT problem. The majority of existing approaches rely on the \emph{homogeneous question} assumption that questions have equivalent contributions if they share the same set of knowledge components. Unfortunately, this assumption is inaccurate in real-world educational scenarios. Furthermore, it is very challenging to interpret the prediction results from the existing deep learning based KT models. Therefore, in this paper, we present QIKT, a question-centric interpretable KT model to address the above challenges. The proposed QIKT approach explicitly models students' knowledge state variations at a fine-grained level with question-sensitive cognitive representations that are jointly learned from a question-centric knowledge acquisition module and a question-centric problem solving module. Meanwhile, the QIKT utilizes an item response theory based prediction layer to generate interpretable prediction results. The proposed QIKT model is evaluated on three public real-world educational datasets. The results demonstrate that our approach is superior on the KT prediction task, and it outperforms a wide range of deep learning based KT models in terms of prediction accuracy with better model interpretability. To encourage reproducible results, we have provided all the datasets and code at \url{https://pykt.org/}.
summary: Knowledge tracing (KT) is a crucial technique to predict students' future performance by observing their historical learning processes. Due to the powerful representation ability of deep neural networks, remarkable progress has been made by using deep learning techniques to solve the KT problem. The majority of existing approaches rely on the \emph{homogeneous question} assumption that questions have equivalent contributions if they share the same set of knowledge components. Unfortunately, this assumption is inaccurate in real-world educational scenarios. Furthermore, it is very challenging to interpret the prediction results from the existing deep learning based KT models. Therefore, in this paper, we present QIKT, a question-centric interpretable KT model to address the above challenges. The proposed QIKT approach explicitly models students' knowledge state variations at a fine-grained level with question-sensitive cognitive representations that are jointly learned from a question-centric knowledge acquisition module and a question-centric problem solving module. Meanwhile, the QIKT utilizes an item response theory based prediction layer to generate interpretable prediction results. The proposed QIKT model is evaluated on three public real-world educational datasets. The results demonstrate that our approach is superior on the KT prediction task, and it outperforms a wide range of deep learning based KT models in terms of prediction accuracy with better model interpretability. To encourage reproducible results, we have provided all the datasets and code at \url{https://pykt.org/}.
abstract_zh: 知识追踪（KT）是通过观察学生的历史学习过程来预测学生未来表现的关键技术。由于深度神经网络强大的表示能力，利用深度学习技术解决KT问题已经取得了显着的进展。大多数现有方法依赖于 \emph{同质问题} 假设，即如果问题共享相同的知识组件集，则它们具有相同的贡献。不幸的是，这种假设在现实世界的教育场景中是不准确的。此外，解释现有基于深度学习的 KT 模型的预测结果非常具有挑战性。因此，在本文中，我们提出了 QIKT，一种以问题为中心的可解释 KT 模型来解决上述挑战。所提出的 QIKT 方法通过从以问题为中心的知识获取模块和以问题为中心的问题解决模块共同学习的问题敏感认知表征，在细粒度水平上明确地建模学生的知识状态变化。同时，QIKT 利用基于项目响应理论的预测层来生成可解释的预测结果。所提出的 QIKT 模型在三个公共现实世界教育数据集上进行了评估。结果表明，我们的方法在 KT 预测任务上表现出色，并且在预测准确性和更好的模型可解释性方面优于各种基于深度学习的 KT 模型。为了鼓励可重现的结果，我们在 \url{https://pykt.org/} 提供了所有数据集和代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QIKT模型，通过问题中心的认知表征提升深度序列知识追踪模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有知识追踪模型假设相同知识点的问题贡献相同，但实际教育场景中该假设不成立，且深度模型预测结果难以解释。
AI.method: 设计QIKT模型，包含问题中心的知识获取模块和问题中心的问题解决模块，联合学习细粒度知识状态表征，并采用项目反应理论生成可解释预测结果。
AI.result: 在三个真实教育数据集上验证，QIKT在预测准确性上优于现有深度模型，同时具有更优的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: QIKT有效解决了知识追踪中的同质化问题和可解释性挑战，开源代码和数据促进研究复现。

The proposed QIKT model is evaluated on three public real-world educational datasets. The results demonstrate that our approach is superior on the KT prediction task, and it outperforms a wide range of deep learning based KT models in terms of prediction accuracy with better model interpretability. To encourage reproducible results, we have provided all the datasets and code at \url{https://pykt.org/}. 知识追踪（KT）是通过观察学生的历史学习过程来预测学生未来表现的关键技术。由于深度神经网络强大的表示能力，利用深度学习技术解决KT问题已经取得了显着的进展。大多数现有方法依赖于 \emph{同质问题} 假设，即如果问题共享相同的知识组件集，则它们具有相同的贡献。不幸的是，这种假设在现实世界的教育场景中是不准确的。此外，解释现有基于深度学习的 KT 模型的预测结果非常具有挑战性。因此，在本文中，我们提出了 QIKT，一种以问题为中心的可解释 KT 模型来解决上述挑战。所提出的 QIKT 方法通过从以问题为中心的知识获取模块和以问题为中心的问题解决模块共同学习的问题敏感认知表征，在细粒度水平上明确地建模学生的知识状态变化。同时，QIKT 利用基于项目响应理论的预测层来生成可解释的预测结果。所提出的 QIKT 模型在三个公共现实世界教育数据集上进行了评估。结果表明，我们的方法在 KT 预测任务上表现出色，并且在预测准确性和更好的模型可解释性方面优于各种基于深度学习的 KT 模型。为了鼓励可重现的结果，我们在 \url{https://pykt.org/} 提供了所有数据集和代码。 本文提出QIKT模型，通过问题中心的认知表征提升深度序列知识追踪模型的可解释性。 Jiahao Chen,Zitao Liu,Shuyan Huang,Qiongqiong Liu,Weiqi Luo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Liting Chen,Jie Yan,Zhengdao Shao,Lu Wang,Qingwei Lin,Saravan Rajmohan,Thomas Moscibroda,Dongmei Zhang
title: Conservative State Value Estimation for Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 离线强化学习的保守状态值估计
comment: Accepted in NeurIPS 2023
comments: Accepted in NeurIPS 2023
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning faces a significant challenge of value over-estimation due to the distributional drift between the dataset and the current learned policy, leading to learning failure in practice. The common approach is to incorporate a penalty term to reward or value estimation in the Bellman iterations. Meanwhile, to avoid extrapolation on out-of-distribution (OOD) states and actions, existing methods focus on conservative Q-function estimation. In this paper, we propose Conservative State Value Estimation (CSVE), a new approach that learns conservative V-function via directly imposing penalty on OOD states. Compared to prior work, CSVE allows more effective state value estimation with conservative guarantees and further better policy optimization. Further, we apply CSVE and develop a practical actor-critic algorithm in which the critic does the conservative value estimation by additionally sampling and penalizing the states \emph{around} the dataset, and the actor applies advantage weighted updates extended with state exploration to improve the policy. We evaluate in classic continual control tasks of D4RL, showing that our method performs better than the conservative Q-function learning methods and is strongly competitive among recent SOTA methods.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning faces a significant challenge of value over-estimation due to the distributional drift between the dataset and the current learned policy, leading to learning failure in practice. The common approach is to incorporate a penalty term to reward or value estimation in the Bellman iterations. Meanwhile, to avoid extrapolation on out-of-distribution (OOD) states and actions, existing methods focus on conservative Q-function estimation. In this paper, we propose Conservative State Value Estimation (CSVE), a new approach that learns conservative V-function via directly imposing penalty on OOD states. Compared to prior work, CSVE allows more effective state value estimation with conservative guarantees and further better policy optimization. Further, we apply CSVE and develop a practical actor-critic algorithm in which the critic does the conservative value estimation by additionally sampling and penalizing the states \emph{around} the dataset, and the actor applies advantage weighted updates extended with state exploration to improve the policy. We evaluate in classic continual control tasks of D4RL, showing that our method performs better than the conservative Q-function learning methods and is strongly competitive among recent SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 由于数据集和当前学习策略之间的分布漂移，离线强化学习面临着价值高估的重大挑战，导致实践中的学习失败。常见的方法是在贝尔曼迭代中将惩罚项合并到奖励或价值估计中。同时，为了避免对分布外（OOD）状态和动作进行外推，现有方法侧重于保守的 Q 函数估计。在本文中，我们提出了保守状态值估计（CSVE），这是一种通过直接对 OOD 状态施加惩罚来学习保守 V 函数的新方法。与之前的工作相比，CSVE 可以通过保守的保证和进一步更好的策略优化来实现更有效的状态值估计。此外，我们应用 CSVE 并开发了一种实用的行动者批评者算法，其中批评者通过额外采样和惩罚数据集周围的状态 \emph{} 来进行保守的价值估计，而行动者应用通过状态探索扩展的优势加权更新来改进策略。我们在 D4RL 的经典连续控制任务中进行了评估，表明我们的方法比保守的 Q 函数学习方法表现更好，并且在最近的 SOTA 方法中具有很强的竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CSVE的保守状态价值估计方法，用于解决离线强化学习中的价值高估问题，并开发了相应的actor-critic算法。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习中因数据集与策略分布漂移导致价值高估，现有方法通过惩罚奖励或Q函数难以有效避免分布外状态的泛化问题。
AI.method: 直接对分布外状态施加惩罚以学习保守V函数，设计actor-critic算法中critic进行保守价值估计，actor通过优势加权更新和状态探索优化策略。
AI.result: 在D4RL经典任务中，CSVE优于保守Q函数方法，且与最新SOTA方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: CSVE通过保守状态价值估计有效缓解分布漂移问题，提升了离线强化学习的策略优化效果。

authors_text: AprilPyone MaungMaung,Makoto Shing,Kentaro Mitsui,Kei Sawada,Fumio Okura
title: Text-Guided Scene Sketch-to-Photo Synthesis
title_zh: 文本引导的场景草图到照片合成
abstract: We propose a method for scene-level sketch-to-photo synthesis with text guidance. Although object-level sketch-to-photo synthesis has been widely studied, whole-scene synthesis is still challenging without reference photos that adequately reflect the target style. To this end, we leverage knowledge from recent large-scale pre-trained generative models, resulting in text-guided sketch-to-photo synthesis without the need for reference images. To train our model, we use self-supervised learning from a set of photographs. Specifically, we use a pre-trained edge detector that maps both color and sketch images into a standardized edge domain, which reduces the gap between photograph-based edge images (during training) and hand-drawn sketch images (during inference). We implement our method by fine-tuning a latent diffusion model (i.e., Stable Diffusion) with sketch and text conditions. Experiments show that the proposed method translates original sketch images that are not extracted from color images into photos with compelling visual quality.
summary: We propose a method for scene-level sketch-to-photo synthesis with text guidance. Although object-level sketch-to-photo synthesis has been widely studied, whole-scene synthesis is still challenging without reference photos that adequately reflect the target style. To this end, we leverage knowledge from recent large-scale pre-trained generative models, resulting in text-guided sketch-to-photo synthesis without the need for reference images. To train our model, we use self-supervised learning from a set of photographs. Specifically, we use a pre-trained edge detector that maps both color and sketch images into a standardized edge domain, which reduces the gap between photograph-based edge images (during training) and hand-drawn sketch images (during inference). We implement our method by fine-tuning a latent diffusion model (i.e., Stable Diffusion) with sketch and text conditions. Experiments show that the proposed method translates original sketch images that are not extracted from color images into photos with compelling visual quality.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过文本引导进行场景级草图到照片合成的方法。尽管对象级草图到照片合成已被广泛研究，但如果没有充分反映目标风格的参考照片，全场景合成仍然具有挑战性。为此，我们利用最近大规模预训练生成模型的知识，无需参考图像即可进行文本引导的草图到照片的合成。为了训练我们的模型，我们使用一组照片进行自我监督学习。具体来说，我们使用预先训练的边缘检测器，将彩色和草图图像映射到标准化边缘域，这减少了基于照片的边缘图像（在训练期间）和手绘草图图像（在推理期间）之间的差距。我们通过使用草图和文本条件微调潜在扩散模型（即稳定扩散）来实现我们的方法。实验表明，所提出的方法将未从彩色图像中提取的原始草图图像转换为具有引人注目的视觉质量的照片。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需参考图像的文本引导场景草图到照片合成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于物体级草图生成，而场景级合成因缺乏目标风格参考图像仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过自监督学习训练模型，利用预训练边缘检测器对齐训练图像与手绘草图的边缘域，并微调Stable Diffusion模型实现文本-草图联合条件生成。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能将非提取自颜色图像的原始草图转化为视觉质量优异的照片。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了基于预训练生成模型与边缘域对齐的场景级草图到照片合成方法的有效性。

authors_text: Zitao Liu,Qiongqiong Liu,Jiahao Chen,Shuyan Huang,Weiqi Luo
title: simpleKT: A Simple But Tough-to-Beat Baseline for Knowledge Tracing
title_zh: simpleKT：一个简单但难以超越的知识追踪基线
comment: Accepted at ICLR'23: The 11th International Conference on Learning Representations, 2023
comments: Accepted at ICLR'23: The 11th International Conference on Learning Representations, 2023
abstract: Knowledge tracing (KT) is the problem of predicting students' future performance based on their historical interactions with intelligent tutoring systems. Recently, many works present lots of special methods for applying deep neural networks to KT from different perspectives like model architecture, adversarial augmentation and etc., which make the overall algorithm and system become more and more complex. Furthermore, due to the lack of standardized evaluation protocol \citep{liu2022pykt}, there is no widely agreed KT baselines and published experimental comparisons become inconsistent and self-contradictory, i.e., the reported AUC scores of DKT on ASSISTments2009 range from 0.721 to 0.821 \citep{minn2018deep,yeung2018addressing}. Therefore, in this paper, we provide a strong but simple baseline method to deal with the KT task named \textsc{simpleKT}. Inspired by the Rasch model in psychometrics, we explicitly model question-specific variations to capture the individual differences among questions covering the same set of knowledge components that are a generalization of terms of concepts or skills needed for learners to accomplish steps in a task or a problem. Furthermore, instead of using sophisticated representations to capture student forgetting behaviors, we use the ordinary dot-product attention function to extract the time-aware information embedded in the student learning interactions. Extensive experiments show that such a simple baseline is able to always rank top 3 in terms of AUC scores and achieve 57 wins, 3 ties and 16 loss against 12 DLKT baseline methods on 7 public datasets of different domains. We believe this work serves as a strong baseline for future KT research. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/pykt-team/pykt-toolkit}\footnote{We merged our model to the \textsc{pyKT} benchmark at \url{https://pykt.org/}.}.

We believe this work serves as a strong baseline for future KT research. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/pykt-team/pykt-toolkit}\footnote{We merged our model to the \textsc{pyKT} benchmark at \url{https://pykt.org/}.}.
abstract_zh: 知识追踪（KT）是根据学生与智能辅导系统的历史交互来预测学生未来表现的问题。最近，许多工作从模型架构、对抗性增强等不同角度提出了许多将深度神经网络应用于 KT 的特殊方法，这使得整体算法和系统变得越来越复杂。此外，由于缺乏标准化的评估协议\citep{liu2022pykt}，没有广泛认可的KT基线，并且已发表的实验比较变得不一致和自相矛盾，即ASSISTments2009上报告的DKT AUC分数范围从0.721到0.821\citep{minn2018deep,yeung2018addressing}。因此，在本文中，我们提供了一种强大但简单的基线方法来处理名为 \textsc{simpleKT} 的 KT 任务。受心理测量学中的 Rasch 模型的启发，我们明确地对特定问题的变化进行建模，以捕获涵盖同一组知识组件的问题之间的个体差异，这些知识组件是学习者完成任务或问题中的步骤所需的概念或技能术语的概括。此外，我们没有使用复杂的表示来捕获学生的遗忘行为，而是使用普通的点积注意力函数来提取嵌入在学生学习交互中的时间感知信息。大量实验表明，这样一个简单的基线能够在 AUC 分数方面始终排名前 3，并在 7 个不同领域的公共数据集上相对于 12 种 DLKT 基线方法取得 57 胜、3 平和 16 负。我们相信这项工作可以为未来 KT 研究奠定坚实的基础。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/pykt-team/pykt-toolkit}\footnote{我们将我们的模型合并到 \url{https://pykt.org/} 的 \textsc{pyKT} 基准测试中。}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为simpleKT的简单但强大的知识追踪（KT）基线方法，用于预测学生在智能辅导系统中的未来表现。
AI.motivation: 现有KT方法过于复杂且缺乏标准化评估协议，导致实验结果不一致。作者旨在提供一个简单、可复现的基线方法以推动KT研究。
AI.method: 受心理测量学中Rasch模型启发，通过建模题目特异性差异捕捉知识组件间的个体差异，并采用普通点积注意力机制提取时间感知信息。
AI.result: 在7个公开数据集上，simpleKT在AUC指标上始终排名前三，与12种DLKT基线方法对比获得57胜3平16负。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为未来KT研究提供了可靠基线，代码已开源并集成至pyKT基准平台。

search_text: simpleKT: A Simple But Tough-to-Beat Baseline for Knowledge Tracing simpleKT：一个简单但难以超越的知识追踪基线 Knowledge tracing (KT) is the problem of predicting students' future performance based on their historical interactions with intelligent tutoring systems. Recently, many works present lots of special methods for applying deep neural networks to KT from different perspectives like model architecture, adversarial augmentation and etc., which make the overall algorithm and system become more and more complex. Furthermore, due to the lack of standardized evaluation protocol \citep{liu2022pykt}, there is no widely agreed KT baselines and published experimental comparisons become inconsistent and self-contradictory, i.e., the reported AUC scores of DKT on ASSISTments2009 range from 0.721 to 0.821 \citep{minn2018deep,yeung2018addressing}. Therefore, in this paper, we provide a strong but simple baseline method to deal with the KT task named \textsc{simpleKT}. Inspired by the Rasch model in psychometrics, we explicitly model question-specific variations to capture the individual differences among questions covering the same set of knowledge components that are a generalization of terms of concepts or skills needed for learners to accomplish steps in a task or a problem. Furthermore, instead of using sophisticated representations to capture student forgetting behaviors, we use the ordinary dot-product attention function to extract the time-aware information embedded in the student learning interactions. Extensive experiments show that such a simple baseline is able to always rank top 3 in terms of AUC scores and achieve 57 wins, 3 ties and 16 loss against 12 DLKT baseline methods on 7 public datasets of different domains. We believe this work serves as a strong baseline for future KT research. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/pykt-team/pykt-toolkit}\footnote{We merged our model to the \textsc{pyKT} benchmark at \url{https://pykt.org/}.}. 知识追踪（KT）是根据学生与智能辅导系统的历史交互来预测学生未来表现的问题。最近，许多工作从模型架构、对抗性增强等不同角度提出了许多将深度神经网络应用于 KT 的特殊方法，这使得整体算法和系统变得越来越复杂。此外，由于缺乏标准化的评估协议\citep{liu2022pykt}，没有广泛认可的KT基线，并且已发表的实验比较变得不一致和自相矛盾，即ASSISTments2009上报告的DKT AUC分数范围从0.721到0.821\citep{minn2018deep,yeung2018addressing}。因此，在本文中，我们提供了一种强大但简单的基线方法来处理名为 \textsc{simpleKT} 的 KT 任务。受心理测量学中的 Rasch 模型的启发，我们明确地对特定问题的变化进行建模，以捕获涵盖同一组知识组件的问题之间的个体差异，这些知识组件是学习者完成任务或问题中的步骤所需的概念或技能术语的概括。此外，我们没有使用复杂的表示来捕获学生的遗忘行为，而是使用普通的点积注意力函数来提取嵌入在学生学习交互中的时间感知信息。大量实验表明，这样一个简单的基线能够在 AUC 分数方面始终排名前 3，并在 7 个不同领域的公共数据集上相对于 12 种 DLKT 基线方法取得 57 胜、3 平和 16 负。我们相信这项工作可以为未来 KT 研究奠定坚实的基础。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/pykt-team/pykt-toolkit}\footnote{我们将我们的模型合并到 \url{https://pykt.org/} 的 \textsc{pyKT} 基准测试中。}。 本文提出了一种名为simpleKT的简单但强大的知识追踪（KT）基线方法，用于预测学生在智能辅导系统中的未来表现。 Zitao Liu,Qiongqiong Liu,Jiahao Chen,Shuyan Huang,Weiqi Luo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yannic Maus,Saku Peltonen,Jara Uitto
title: Distributed Symmetry Breaking on Power Graphs via Sparsification
title_zh: 通过稀疏化破坏功率图上的分布式对称性
abstract: In this paper, we present efficient distributed algorithms for classical symmetry breaking problems, maximal independent sets (MIS) and ruling sets, in power graphs. We work in the standard CONGEST model of distributed message passing, where the communication network is abstracted as a graph $G$. Typically, the problem instance in CONGEST is identical to the communication network $G$, that is, we perform the symmetry breaking in $G$. In this work, we consider a setting where the problem instance corresponds to a power graph $G^k$, where each node of the communication network $G$ is connected to all of its $k$-hop neighbors. Our main contribution is a deterministic polylogarithmic time algorithm for computing $k$-ruling sets of $G^k$, which (for $k>1$) improves exponentially on the current state-of-the-art runtimes. The main technical ingredient for this result is a deterministic sparsification procedure which may be of independent interest. On top of being a natural family of problems, ruling sets (in power graphs) are well-motivated through their applications in the powerful shattering framework [BEPS JACM'16, Ghaffari SODA'19] (and others). We present randomized algorithms for computing maximal independent sets and ruling sets of $G^k$ in essentially the same time as they can be computed in $G$. We also revisit the shattering algorithm for MIS [BEPS JACM'16] and present different approaches for the post-shattering phase. Our solutions are algorithmically and analytically simpler (also in the LOCAL model) than existing solutions and obtain the same runtime as [Ghaffari SODA'16].
summary: In this paper, we present efficient distributed algorithms for classical symmetry breaking problems, maximal independent sets (MIS) and ruling sets, in power graphs. We work in the standard CONGEST model of distributed message passing, where the communication network is abstracted as a graph $G$. Typically, the problem instance in CONGEST is identical to the communication network $G$, that is, we perform the symmetry breaking in $G$. In this work, we consider a setting where the problem instance corresponds to a power graph $G^k$, where each node of the communication network $G$ is connected to all of its $k$-hop neighbors. Our main contribution is a deterministic polylogarithmic time algorithm for computing $k$-ruling sets of $G^k$, which (for $k>1$) improves exponentially on the current state-of-the-art runtimes. The main technical ingredient for this result is a deterministic sparsification procedure which may be of independent interest. On top of being a natural family of problems, ruling sets (in power graphs) are well-motivated through their applications in the powerful shattering framework [BEPS JACM'16, Ghaffari SODA'19] (and others). We present randomized algorithms for computing maximal independent sets and ruling sets of $G^k$ in essentially the same time as they can be computed in $G$. We also revisit the shattering algorithm for MIS [BEPS JACM'16] and present different approaches for the post-shattering phase. Our solutions are algorithmically and analytically simpler (also in the LOCAL model) than existing solutions and obtain the same runtime as [Ghaffari SODA'16].
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了针对幂图中经典对称破缺问题、最大独立集（MIS）和规则集的高效分布式算法。我们在分布式消息传递的标准 CONGEST 模型中工作，其中通信网络被抽象为图 $G$。通常，CONGEST 中的问题实例与通信网络 $G$ 相同，即我们在 $G$ 中执行对称性破缺。在这项工作中，我们考虑一个设置，其中问题实例对应于功率图 $G^k$，其中通信网络 $G$ 的每个节点都连接到其所有 $k$ 跳邻居。我们的主要贡献是用于计算 $G^k$ 的 $k$ 规则集的确定性多对数时间算法，该算法（对于 $k>1$）在当前最先进的运行时上呈指数级改进。该结果的主要技术成分是可能具有独立意义的确定性稀疏程序。除了作为一系列自然问题之外，规则集（在功率图中）通过其在强大的粉碎框架中的应用得到了很好的激励[BEPS JACM'16，Ghaffari SODA'19]（以及其他）。我们提出了计算 $G^k$ 的最大独立集和规则集的随机算法，其时间与在 $G$ 中计算它们的时间基本相同。我们还重新审视了 MIS [BEPS JACM'16] 的破碎算法，并为破碎后阶段提出了不同的方法。我们的解决方案在算法和分析上比现有解决方案更简单（也在本地模型中），并且获得与 [Ghaffari SODA'16] 相同的运行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的分布式算法，在幂图上解决最大独立集（MIS）和统治集问题，通过稀疏化技术实现多项式时间复杂度的突破。
AI.motivation: 传统分布式对称性打破算法在幂图上的效率不足，而统治集在破碎框架等应用中具有重要价值，亟需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 设计确定性稀疏化过程将幂图转化为稀疏图，结合随机算法与改进的破碎框架后处理阶段，简化算法复杂度分析。
AI.result: 实现首个确定性多项式时间算法计算幂图k-统治集，相比现有方法指数级加速；随机算法时间复杂度与原图计算相当，且算法更简洁。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为幂图对称性打破提供了理论突破，稀疏化技术具有独立价值，简化后的算法在LOCAL模型中达到最优时间复杂度。

authors_text: Ankur Singh,Senthilnath Jayavelu
title: Robust Representation Learning with Self-Distillation for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 通过自蒸馏进行领域泛化的鲁棒表示学习
comment: 6 pages
comments: 6 pages
abstract: Despite the recent success of deep neural networks, there remains a need for effective methods to enhance domain generalization using vision transformers. In this paper, we propose a novel domain generalization technique called Robust Representation Learning with Self-Distillation (RRLD) comprising i) intermediate-block self-distillation and ii) augmentation-guided self-distillation to improve the generalization capabilities of transformer-based models on unseen domains. This approach enables the network to learn robust and general features that are invariant to different augmentations and domain shifts while effectively mitigating overfitting to source domains. To evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed method, we perform extensive experiments on PACS and OfficeHome benchmark datasets, as well as an industrial wafer semiconductor defect dataset. The results demonstrate that RRLD achieves robust and accurate generalization performance. We observe an average accuracy improvement in the range of 1.2% to 2.3% over the state-of-the-art on the three datasets.
summary: Despite the recent success of deep neural networks, there remains a need for effective methods to enhance domain generalization using vision transformers. In this paper, we propose a novel domain generalization technique called Robust Representation Learning with Self-Distillation (RRLD) comprising i) intermediate-block self-distillation and ii) augmentation-guided self-distillation to improve the generalization capabilities of transformer-based models on unseen domains. This approach enables the network to learn robust and general features that are invariant to different augmentations and domain shifts while effectively mitigating overfitting to source domains. To evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed method, we perform extensive experiments on PACS and OfficeHome benchmark datasets, as well as an industrial wafer semiconductor defect dataset. The results demonstrate that RRLD achieves robust and accurate generalization performance. We observe an average accuracy improvement in the range of 1.2% to 2.3% over the state-of-the-art on the three datasets.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络最近取得了成功，但仍然需要有效的方法来使用视觉转换器来增强领域泛化。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为自蒸馏鲁棒表示学习（RRLD）的新型域泛化技术，包括 i）中间块自蒸馏和 ii）增强引导自蒸馏，以提高基于 Transformer 的模型在未见域上的泛化能力。这种方法使网络能够学习鲁棒且通用的特征，这些特征对于不同的增强和域转移是不变的，同时有效地减轻对源域的过度拟合。为了评估我们提出的方法的有效性，我们对 PACS 和 OfficeHome 基准数据集以及工业晶圆半导体缺陷数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果表明 RRLD 实现了稳健且准确的泛化性能。我们观察到三个数据集的平均准确度比最先进的水平提高了 1.2% 到 2.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自蒸馏的鲁棒表征学习方法RRLD，用于提升视觉Transformer模型在领域泛化任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络取得进展，但现有方法在跨领域场景下仍易过拟合源领域数据，难以适应未知领域分布变化。
AI.method: RRLD包含两个自蒸馏机制：中间块自蒸馏（学习模型内部表征一致性）和增强引导自蒸馏（通过数据增强策略提升领域不变性）。
AI.result: 在PACS、OfficeHome及工业晶圆缺陷数据集上，RRLD相比最先进方法平均提升1.2%-2.3%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 自蒸馏策略有效增强了视觉Transformer的领域泛化能力，使其在不同领域分布下保持鲁棒性。
