search_text: Robust Representation Learning with Self-Distillation for Domain Generalization 通过自蒸馏进行领域泛化的鲁棒表示学习 Despite the recent success of deep neural networks, there remains a need for effective methods to enhance domain generalization using vision transformers. In this paper, we propose a novel domain generalization technique called Robust Representation Learning with Self-Distillation (RRLD) comprising i) intermediate-block self-distillation and ii) augmentation-guided self-distillation to improve the generalization capabilities of transformer-based models on unseen domains. This approach enables the network to learn robust and general features that are invariant to different augmentations and domain shifts while effectively mitigating overfitting to source domains. To evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed method, we perform extensive experiments on PACS and OfficeHome benchmark datasets, as well as an industrial wafer semiconductor defect dataset. The results demonstrate that RRLD achieves robust and accurate generalization performance. We observe an average accuracy improvement in the range of 1.2% to 2.3% over the state-of-the-art on the three datasets. 尽管深度神经网络最近取得了成功，但仍然需要有效的方法来使用视觉转换器来增强领域泛化。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为自蒸馏鲁棒表示学习（RRLD）的新型域泛化技术，包括 i）中间块自蒸馏和 ii）增强引导自蒸馏，以提高基于 Transformer 的模型在未见域上的泛化能力。这种方法使网络能够学习鲁棒且通用的特征，这些特征对于不同的增强和域转移是不变的，同时有效地减轻对源域的过度拟合。为了评估我们提出的方法的有效性，我们对 PACS 和 OfficeHome 基准数据集以及工业晶圆半导体缺陷数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果表明 RRLD 实现了稳健且准确的泛化性能。我们观察到三个数据集的平均准确度比最先进的水平提高了 1.2% 到 2.3%。 本文提出一种基于自蒸馏的鲁棒表征学习方法RRLD，用于提升视觉Transformer模型在领域泛化任务中的性能。 Ankur Singh,Senthilnath Jayavelu cs.CV

authors_text: Rong Zhu,Wei Chen,Bolin Ding,Xingguang Chen,Andreas Pfadler,Ziniu Wu,Jingren Zhou
title: Lero: A Learning-to-Rank Query Optimizer
title_zh: Lero：学习排序查询优化器
comment: PVLDB 2023
comments: PVLDB 2023
abstract: A recent line of works apply machine learning techniques to assist or rebuild cost-based query optimizers in DBMS. While exhibiting superiority in some benchmarks, their deficiencies, e.g., unstable performance, high training cost, and slow model updating, stem from the inherent hardness of predicting the cost or latency of execution plans using machine learning models. In this paper, we introduce a learning-to-rank query optimizer, called Lero, which builds on top of a native query optimizer and continuously learns to improve the optimization performance. The key observation is that the relative order or rank of plans, rather than the exact cost or latency, is sufficient for query optimization. Lero employs a pairwise approach to train a classifier to compare any two plans and tell which one is better. Such a binary classification task is much easier than the regression task to predict the cost or latency, in terms of model efficiency and accuracy. Rather than building a learned optimizer from scratch, Lero is designed to leverage decades of wisdom of databases and improve the native query optimizer. With its non-intrusive design, Lero can be implemented on top of any existing DBMS with minimal integration efforts. We implement Lero and demonstrate its outstanding performance using PostgreSQL. In our experiments, Lero achieves near optimal performance on several benchmarks. It reduces the plan execution time of the native optimizer in PostgreSQL by up to 70% and other learned query optimizers by up to 37%. Meanwhile, Lero continuously learns and automatically adapts to query workloads and changes in data.
summary: A recent line of works apply machine learning techniques to assist or rebuild cost-based query optimizers in DBMS. While exhibiting superiority in some benchmarks, their deficiencies, e.g., unstable performance, high training cost, and slow model updating, stem from the inherent hardness of predicting the cost or latency of execution plans using machine learning models. In this paper, we introduce a learning-to-rank query optimizer, called Lero, which builds on top of a native query optimizer and continuously learns to improve the optimization performance. The key observation is that the relative order or rank of plans, rather than the exact cost or latency, is sufficient for query optimization. Lero employs a pairwise approach to train a classifier to compare any two plans and tell which one is better. Such a binary classification task is much easier than the regression task to predict the cost or latency, in terms of model efficiency and accuracy. Rather than building a learned optimizer from scratch, Lero is designed to leverage decades of wisdom of databases and improve the native query optimizer. With its non-intrusive design, Lero can be implemented on top of any existing DBMS with minimal integration efforts. We implement Lero and demonstrate its outstanding performance using PostgreSQL. In our experiments, Lero achieves near optimal performance on several benchmarks. It reduces the plan execution time of the native optimizer in PostgreSQL by up to 70% and other learned query optimizers by up to 37%. Meanwhile, Lero continuously learns and automatically adapts to query workloads and changes in data.
abstract_zh: 最近的一系列工作应用机器学习技术来协助或重建 DBMS 中基于成本的查询优化器。虽然在一些基准测试中表现出优越性，但它们的缺陷，例如性能不稳定、训练成本高和模型更新慢等，源于使用机器学习模型预测执行计划的成本或延迟的固有困难。在本文中，我们介绍了一种名为 Lero 的学习排名查询优化器，它构建在本机查询优化器之上，并不断学习以提高优化性能。关键的观察结果是，计划的相对顺序或排名，而不是确切的成本或延迟，足以进行查询优化。 Lero 采用成对方法来训练分类器来比较任意两个计划并判断哪个更好。就模型效率和准确性而言，这种二元分类任务比回归任务更容易预测成本或延迟。 Lero 不是从头开始构建学习优化器，而是旨在利用数十年的数据库智慧并改进本机查询优化器。凭借其非侵入式设计，Lero 可以在任何现有 DBMS 之上实施，只需最少的集成工作。我们使用 PostgreSQL 实现 Lero 并展示其出色的性能。在我们的实验中，Lero 在多个基准测试中实现了接近最佳的性能。它将 PostgreSQL 中本机优化器的计划执行时间缩短了 70%，将其他学习查询优化器的计划执行时间缩短了 37%。同时，Lero 不断学习并自动适应查询工作负载和数据变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Lero，一种基于学习排序的查询优化器，通过比较执行计划的相对排名而非精确成本来提升数据库查询优化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于机器学习的查询优化器存在性能不稳定、训练成本高和模型更新慢等问题，而预测执行计划成本或延迟的回归任务难度较大，因此需寻找更高效的方法。
AI.method: Lero采用成对比较方法，训练分类器判断两个计划的优劣，将回归任务转化为更易处理的二分类问题，并基于现有数据库系统设计非侵入式架构以实现快速集成。
AI.result: 在PostgreSQL上的实验表明，Lero在多个基准测试中接近最优性能，将原生优化器的执行时间减少70%，并优于其他学习型优化器37%；同时能自动适应查询负载和数据变化。
AI.conclusion: Lero通过聚焦计划排名而非精确成本预测，有效解决了传统学习型优化器的缺陷，在保持数据库系统原有优势的基础上显著提升了优化效率与适应性。

authors_text: Shanqi Liu,Yujing Hu,Runze Wu,Dong Xing,Yu Xiong,Changjie Fan,Kun Kuang,Yong Liu
title: Adaptive Value Decomposition with Greedy Marginal Contribution Computation for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 协作多智能体强化学习的自适应价值分解与贪心边际贡献计算
comment: This paper is accepted by aamas 2023
comments: This paper is accepted by aamas 2023
abstract: Real-world cooperation often requires intensive coordination among agents simultaneously. This task has been extensively studied within the framework of cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), and value decomposition methods are among those cutting-edge solutions. However, traditional methods that learn the value function as a monotonic mixing of per-agent utilities cannot solve the tasks with non-monotonic returns. This hinders their application in generic scenarios. Recent methods tackle this problem from the perspective of implicit credit assignment by learning value functions with complete expressiveness or using additional structures to improve cooperation. However, they are either difficult to learn due to large joint action spaces or insufficient to capture the complicated interactions among agents which are essential to solving tasks with non-monotonic returns. To address these problems, we propose a novel explicit credit assignment method to address the non-monotonic problem. Our method, Adaptive Value decomposition with Greedy Marginal contribution (AVGM), is based on an adaptive value decomposition that learns the cooperative value of a group of dynamically changing agents. We first illustrate that the proposed value decomposition can consider the complicated interactions among agents and is feasible to learn in large-scale scenarios. Then, our method uses a greedy marginal contribution computed from the value decomposition as an individual credit to incentivize agents to learn the optimal cooperative policy. We further extend the module with an action encoder to guarantee the linear time complexity for computing the greedy marginal contribution. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves significant performance improvements in several non-monotonic domains.
summary: Real-world cooperation often requires intensive coordination among agents simultaneously. This task has been extensively studied within the framework of cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), and value decomposition methods are among those cutting-edge solutions. However, traditional methods that learn the value function as a monotonic mixing of per-agent utilities cannot solve the tasks with non-monotonic returns. This hinders their application in generic scenarios. Recent methods tackle this problem from the perspective of implicit credit assignment by learning value functions with complete expressiveness or using additional structures to improve cooperation. However, they are either difficult to learn due to large joint action spaces or insufficient to capture the complicated interactions among agents which are essential to solving tasks with non-monotonic returns. To address these problems, we propose a novel explicit credit assignment method to address the non-monotonic problem. Our method, Adaptive Value decomposition with Greedy Marginal contribution (AVGM), is based on an adaptive value decomposition that learns the cooperative value of a group of dynamically changing agents. We first illustrate that the proposed value decomposition can consider the complicated interactions among agents and is feasible to learn in large-scale scenarios. Then, our method uses a greedy marginal contribution computed from the value decomposition as an individual credit to incentivize agents to learn the optimal cooperative policy. We further extend the module with an action encoder to guarantee the linear time complexity for computing the greedy marginal contribution. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves significant performance improvements in several non-monotonic domains.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的合作通常需要代理之间同时进行密集协调。这项任务已经在协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）的框架内得到了广泛的研究，而价值分解方法就是这些前沿的解决方案之一。然而，将价值函数学习为每个智能体效用的单调混合的传统方法无法解决具有非单调回报的任务。这阻碍了它们在通用场景中的应用。最近的方法从隐式信用分配的角度解决了这个问题，通过学习具有完整表达能力的价值函数或使用额外的结构来改善合作。然而，它们要么由于联合动作空间较大而难以学习，要么不足以捕获代理之间复杂的交互，而这对于解决具有非单调回报的任务至关重要。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的显式信用分配方法来解决非单调问题。我们的方法，带有贪婪边际贡献的自适应价值分解（AVGM），基于自适应价值分解，该分解学习一组动态变化的代理的合作价值。我们首先说明所提出的价值分解可以考虑智能体之间复杂的交互，并且在大规模场景中学习是可行的。然后，我们的方法使用从价值分解计算出的贪婪边际贡献作为个体信用来激励代理学习最优合作策略。我们进一步用动作编码器扩展该模块，以保证计算贪婪边际贡献的线性时间复杂度。实验结果表明，我们的方法在几个非单调域中实现了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AVGM的新型显式信用分配方法，用于解决合作多智能体强化学习中非单调回报的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统值分解方法无法处理非单调回报任务，现有方法在大规模场景下学习困难或无法捕捉智能体间的复杂交互。
AI.method: 通过自适应值分解学习动态变化智能体组的协作值，并利用贪心边际贡献计算个体信用，结合动作编码器保证线性时间复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个非单调领域中显著提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: AVGM通过自适应分解和高效信用分配机制，有效解决了非单调场景下的协作问题，具有良好的可扩展性。

search_text: Adaptive Value Decomposition with Greedy Marginal Contribution Computation for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 协作多智能体强化学习的自适应价值分解与贪心边际贡献计算 Real-world cooperation often requires intensive coordination among agents simultaneously. This task has been extensively studied within the framework of cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), and value decomposition methods are among those cutting-edge solutions. However, traditional methods that learn the value function as a monotonic mixing of per-agent utilities cannot solve the tasks with non-monotonic returns. This hinders their application in generic scenarios. Recent methods tackle this problem from the perspective of implicit credit assignment by learning value functions with complete expressiveness or using additional structures to improve cooperation. However, they are either difficult to learn due to large joint action spaces or insufficient to capture the complicated interactions among agents which are essential to solving tasks with non-monotonic returns. To address these problems, we propose a novel explicit credit assignment method to address the non-monotonic problem. Our method, Adaptive Value decomposition with Greedy Marginal contribution (AVGM), is based on an adaptive value decomposition that learns the cooperative value of a group of dynamically changing agents. We first illustrate that the proposed value decomposition can consider the complicated interactions among agents and is feasible to learn in large-scale scenarios. Then, our method uses a greedy marginal contribution computed from the value decomposition as an individual credit to incentivize agents to learn the optimal cooperative policy. We further extend the module with an action encoder to guarantee the linear time complexity for computing the greedy marginal contribution. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves significant performance improvements in several non-monotonic domains. 现实世界的合作通常需要代理之间同时进行密集协调。这项任务已经在协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）的框架内得到了广泛的研究，而价值分解方法就是这些前沿的解决方案之一。然而，将价值函数学习为每个智能体效用的单调混合的传统方法无法解决具有非单调回报的任务。这阻碍了它们在通用场景中的应用。最近的方法从隐式信用分配的角度解决了这个问题，通过学习具有完整表达能力的价值函数或使用额外的结构来改善合作。然而，它们要么由于联合动作空间较大而难以学习，要么不足以捕获代理之间复杂的交互，而这对于解决具有非单调回报的任务至关重要。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的显式信用分配方法来解决非单调问题。我们的方法，带有贪婪边际贡献的自适应价值分解（AVGM），基于自适应价值分解，该分解学习一组动态变化的代理的合作价值。我们首先说明所提出的价值分解可以考虑智能体之间复杂的交互，并且在大规模场景中学习是可行的。然后，我们的方法使用从价值分解计算出的贪婪边际贡献作为个体信用来激励代理学习最优合作策略。我们进一步用动作编码器扩展该模块，以保证计算贪婪边际贡献的线性时间复杂度。实验结果表明，我们的方法在几个非单调域中实现了显着的性能改进。 本文提出了一种名为AVGM的新型显式信用分配方法，用于解决合作多智能体强化学习中非单调回报的问题。 Shanqi Liu,Yujing Hu,Runze Wu,Dong Xing,Yu Xiong,Changjie Fan,Kun Kuang,Yong Liu cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Zachary A. Pardos,Shreya Bhandari
title: Learning gain differences between ChatGPT and human tutor generated algebra hints
title_zh: ChatGPT 和人类导师生成的代数提示之间的学习增益差异
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs), such as ChatGPT, are quickly advancing AI to the frontiers of practical consumer use and leading industries to re-evaluate how they allocate resources for content production. Authoring of open educational resources and hint content within adaptive tutoring systems is labor intensive. Should LLMs like ChatGPT produce educational content on par with human-authored content, the implications would be significant for further scaling of computer tutoring system approaches. In this paper, we conduct the first learning gain evaluation of ChatGPT by comparing the efficacy of its hints with hints authored by human tutors with 77 participants across two algebra topic areas, Elementary Algebra and Intermediate Algebra. We find that 70% of hints produced by ChatGPT passed our manual quality checks and that both human and ChatGPT conditions produced positive learning gains. However, gains were only statistically significant for human tutor created hints. Learning gains from human-created hints were substantially and statistically significantly higher than ChatGPT hints in both topic areas, though ChatGPT participants in the Intermediate Algebra experiment were near ceiling and not even with the control at pre-test. We discuss the limitations of our study and suggest several future directions for the field. Problem and hint content used in the experiment is provided for replicability.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs), such as ChatGPT, are quickly advancing AI to the frontiers of practical consumer use and leading industries to re-evaluate how they allocate resources for content production. Authoring of open educational resources and hint content within adaptive tutoring systems is labor intensive. Should LLMs like ChatGPT produce educational content on par with human-authored content, the implications would be significant for further scaling of computer tutoring system approaches. In this paper, we conduct the first learning gain evaluation of ChatGPT by comparing the efficacy of its hints with hints authored by human tutors with 77 participants across two algebra topic areas, Elementary Algebra and Intermediate Algebra. We find that 70% of hints produced by ChatGPT passed our manual quality checks and that both human and ChatGPT conditions produced positive learning gains. However, gains were only statistically significant for human tutor created hints. Learning gains from human-created hints were substantially and statistically significantly higher than ChatGPT hints in both topic areas, though ChatGPT participants in the Intermediate Algebra experiment were near ceiling and not even with the control at pre-test. We discuss the limitations of our study and suggest several future directions for the field. Problem and hint content used in the experiment is provided for replicability.
abstract_zh: ChatGPT 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 正在迅速将人工智能推进到实际消费者使用的前沿，并引导行业重新评估他们如何分配内容生产资源。在自适应辅导系统中创作开放教育资源和提示内容是劳动密集型的。如果像 ChatGPT 这样的法学硕士能够制作出与人类创作的内容相当的教育内容，那么这对于进一步扩展计算机辅导系统方法将产生重大影响。在本文中，我们对 ChatGPT 的首次学习增益评估进行了比较，将其提示与人类导师编写的提示的效果进行比较，共有 77 名参与者跨越两个代数主题领域（初级代数和中级代数）。我们发现 ChatGPT 产生的提示中有 70% 通过了我们的手动质量检查，并且人类和 ChatGPT 条件都产生了积极的学习收益。然而，对于人类导师创建的提示而言，收益仅具有统计显着性。在这两个主题领域，从人工创建的提示中获得的学习收益在统计上显着高于 ChatGPT 提示，尽管中级代数实验中的 ChatGPT 参与者接近上限，甚至在预测试时没有对照组。我们讨论了我们研究的局限性，并提出了该领域的几个未来方向。实验中使用的问题和提示内容是为了可复制性而提供的。

AI.tldr: 比较ChatGPT生成的代数提示与人类导师生成的提示在学习效果上的差异。
AI.motivation: 评估大型语言模型生成的教育内容是否能替代人类作者，以优化教育资源分配和计算机辅导系统的扩展。
AI.method: 通过实验对比77名参与者在初等代数和中级代数两个主题下，ChatGPT与人类导师生成的提示的学习效果。
AI.result: 70%的ChatGPT提示通过质量检查，但人类导师提示的学习收益在统计上显著更高，ChatGPT在中级代数实验中表现接近上限。
AI.conclusion: 人类导师生成的提示目前仍优于ChatGPT，需进一步研究改进模型或结合人类反馈以提升效果。

authors_text: Koustava Goswami,Lukas Lange,Jun Araki,Heike Adel
title: SwitchPrompt: Learning Domain-Specific Gated Soft Prompts for Classification in Low-Resource Domains
title_zh: SwitchPrompt：学习特定于域的门控软提示，以在资源匮乏的域中进行分类
comment: Accepted at EACL 2023 Main Conference
comments: Accepted at EACL 2023 Main Conference
abstract: Prompting pre-trained language models leads to promising results across natural language processing tasks but is less effective when applied in low-resource domains, due to the domain gap between the pre-training data and the downstream task. In this work, we bridge this gap with a novel and lightweight prompting methodology called SwitchPrompt for the adaptation of language models trained on datasets from the general domain to diverse low-resource domains. Using domain-specific keywords with a trainable gated prompt, SwitchPrompt offers domain-oriented prompting, that is, effective guidance on the target domains for general-domain language models. Our few-shot experiments on three text classification benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of the general-domain pre-trained language models when used with SwitchPrompt. They often even outperform their domain-specific counterparts trained with baseline state-of-the-art prompting methods by up to 10.7% performance increase in accuracy. This result indicates that SwitchPrompt effectively reduces the need for domain-specific language model pre-training.
summary: Prompting pre-trained language models leads to promising results across natural language processing tasks but is less effective when applied in low-resource domains, due to the domain gap between the pre-training data and the downstream task. In this work, we bridge this gap with a novel and lightweight prompting methodology called SwitchPrompt for the adaptation of language models trained on datasets from the general domain to diverse low-resource domains. Using domain-specific keywords with a trainable gated prompt, SwitchPrompt offers domain-oriented prompting, that is, effective guidance on the target domains for general-domain language models. Our few-shot experiments on three text classification benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of the general-domain pre-trained language models when used with SwitchPrompt. They often even outperform their domain-specific counterparts trained with baseline state-of-the-art prompting methods by up to 10.7% performance increase in accuracy. This result indicates that SwitchPrompt effectively reduces the need for domain-specific language model pre-training.
abstract_zh: 提示预先训练的语言模型可以在自然语言处理任务中带来有希望的结果，但由于预训练数据和下游任务之间的领域差距，在资源匮乏的领域中应用时效果较差。在这项工作中，我们通过一种名为 SwitchPrompt 的新颖且轻量级的提示方法来弥补这一差距，用于适应在从一般领域到不同的低资源领域的数据集上训练的语言模型。 SwitchPrompt 使用特定于领域的关键字和可训练的门控提示，提供面向领域的提示，即对通用领域语言模型的目标领域进行有效指导。我们对三个文本分类基准进行的几次实验证明了与 SwitchPrompt 一起使用时通用域预训练语言模型的有效性。他们甚至常常比接受过最先进的基准提示方法训练的特定领域同行的准确率提高了 10.7%。这一结果表明 SwitchPrompt 有效减少了对特定领域语言模型预训练的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SwitchPrompt的轻量级提示方法，用于将通用领域预训练的语言模型适应到多样化的低资源领域分类任务中。
AI.motivation: 传统提示方法在低资源领域效果不佳，因为预训练数据与下游任务存在领域差异，而领域特定预训练模型需要大量数据且难以扩展。
AI.method: 通过引入可训练的门控提示机制，结合领域特定关键词，使通用领域模型能动态聚焦目标领域的关键特征，无需领域特定预训练。
AI.result: 在三个文本分类基准测试中，SwitchPrompt使通用模型准确率提升最高达10.7%，超越了领域特定模型的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SwitchPrompt有效缩小了领域差异，证明了通用模型通过轻量提示即可适应低资源领域，减少了对领域特定预训练的依赖。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SwitchPrompt的轻量级提示方法，用于将通用领域预训练的语言模型适应到多样化的低资源领域分类任务中。

ai_content.method: 通过引入可训练的门控提示机制，结合领域特定关键词，使通用领域模型能动态聚焦目标领域的关键特征，无需领域特定预训练。
ai_content.result: 在三个文本分类基准测试中，SwitchPrompt使通用模型准确率提升最高达10.7%，超越了领域特定模型的基线方法。
ai_content.conclusion: SwitchPrompt有效缩小了领域差异，证明了通用模型通过轻量提示即可适应低资源领域，减少了对领域特定预训练的依赖。

search_text: SwitchPrompt: Learning Domain-Specific Gated Soft Prompts for Classification in Low-Resource Domains SwitchPrompt：学习特定于域的门控软提示，以在资源匮乏的域中进行分类 Prompting pre-trained language models leads to promising results across natural language processing tasks but is less effective when applied in low-resource domains, due to the domain gap between the pre-training data and the downstream task. In this work, we bridge this gap with a novel and lightweight prompting methodology called SwitchPrompt for the adaptation of language models trained on datasets from the general domain to diverse low-resource domains. Using domain-specific keywords with a trainable gated prompt, SwitchPrompt offers domain-oriented prompting, that is, effective guidance on the target domains for general-domain language models. Our few-shot experiments on three text classification benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of the general-domain pre-trained language models when used with SwitchPrompt. They often even outperform their domain-specific counterparts trained with baseline state-of-the-art prompting methods by up to 10.7% performance increase in accuracy. This result indicates that SwitchPrompt effectively reduces the need for domain-specific language model pre-training. 提示预先训练的语言模型可以在自然语言处理任务中带来有希望的结果，但由于预训练数据和下游任务之间的领域差距，在资源匮乏的领域中应用时效果较差。在这项工作中，我们通过一种名为 SwitchPrompt 的新颖且轻量级的提示方法来弥补这一差距，用于适应在从一般领域到不同的低资源领域的数据集上训练的语言模型。 SwitchPrompt 使用特定于领域的关键字和可训练的门控提示，提供面向领域的提示，即对通用领域语言模型的目标领域进行有效指导。我们对三个文本分类基准进行的几次实验证明了与 SwitchPrompt 一起使用时通用域预训练语言模型的有效性。他们甚至常常比接受过最先进的基准提示方法训练的特定领域同行的准确率提高了 10.7%。这一结果表明 SwitchPrompt 有效减少了对特定领域语言模型预训练的需求。 本文提出了一种名为SwitchPrompt的轻量级提示方法，用于将通用领域预训练的语言模型适应到多样化的低资源领域分类任务中。 Koustava Goswami,Lukas Lange,Jun Araki,Heike Adel cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yasheng Sun,Qianyi Wu,Hang Zhou,Kaisiyuan Wang,Tianshu Hu,Chen-Chieh Liao,Shio Miyafuji,Ziwei Liu,Hideki Koike
title: Make Your Brief Stroke Real and Stereoscopic: 3D-Aware Simplified Sketch to Portrait Generation
title_zh: 让您的简短笔触真实立体：3D 感知简化素描到肖像生成
comment: Project Page on https://hangz-nju-cuhk.github.io/projects/SSSP, Video Url: https://youtu.be/GiOKbvr2U_E
comments: Project Page on https://hangz-nju-cuhk.github.io/projects/SSSP, Video Url: https://youtu.be/GiOKbvr2U_E
abstract: Creating the photo-realistic version of people sketched portraits is useful to various entertainment purposes. Existing studies only generate portraits in the 2D plane with fixed views, making the results less vivid. In this paper, we present Stereoscopic Simplified Sketch-to-Portrait (SSSP), which explores the possibility of creating Stereoscopic 3D-aware portraits from simple contour sketches by involving 3D generative models. Our key insight is to design sketch-aware constraints that can fully exploit the prior knowledge of a tri-plane-based 3D-aware generative model. Specifically, our designed region-aware volume rendering strategy and global consistency constraint further enhance detail correspondences during sketch encoding. Moreover, in order to facilitate the usage of layman users, we propose a Contour-to-Sketch module with vector quantized representations, so that easily drawn contours can directly guide the generation of 3D portraits. Extensive comparisons show that our method generates high-quality results that match the sketch. Our usability study verifies that our system is greatly preferred by user.
summary: Creating the photo-realistic version of people sketched portraits is useful to various entertainment purposes. Existing studies only generate portraits in the 2D plane with fixed views, making the results less vivid. In this paper, we present Stereoscopic Simplified Sketch-to-Portrait (SSSP), which explores the possibility of creating Stereoscopic 3D-aware portraits from simple contour sketches by involving 3D generative models. Our key insight is to design sketch-aware constraints that can fully exploit the prior knowledge of a tri-plane-based 3D-aware generative model. Specifically, our designed region-aware volume rendering strategy and global consistency constraint further enhance detail correspondences during sketch encoding. Moreover, in order to facilitate the usage of layman users, we propose a Contour-to-Sketch module with vector quantized representations, so that easily drawn contours can directly guide the generation of 3D portraits. Extensive comparisons show that our method generates high-quality results that match the sketch. Our usability study verifies that our system is greatly preferred by user.
abstract_zh: 创建逼真的人物素描肖像版本可用于各种娱乐目的。现有的研究仅在具有固定视图的二维平面上生成肖像，使得结果不太生动。在本文中，我们提出了立体简化草图到肖像 (SSSP)，它探索了通过涉及 3D 生成模型从简单轮廓草图创建立体 3D 感知肖像的可能性。我们的主要见解是设计草图感知约束，可以充分利用基于三平面的 3D 感知生成模型的先验知识。具体来说，我们设计的区域感知体积渲染策略和全局一致性约束进一步增强了草图编码期间的细节对应性。此外，为了方便外行用户使用，我们提出了具有矢量量化表示的Contour-to-Sketch模块，以便轻松绘制的轮廓可以直接指导3D肖像的生成。广泛的比较表明，我们的方法生成了与草图匹配的高质量结果。我们的可用性研究证明我们的系统深受用户青睐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从简化草图生成具有立体感的3D肖像的方法，提升传统2D肖像生成的生动性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅能生成固定视角的2D肖像，缺乏立体感和真实感，难以满足娱乐等应用场景需求。
AI.method: 设计基于三平面的3D生成模型，结合区域感知体积渲染策略与全局一致性约束，并引入轮廓到草图模块实现用户友好交互。
AI.result: 生成的3D肖像质量高且与草图匹配，用户研究证实系统更受青睐。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过3D感知约束和简化交互流程，有效提升了草图到立体肖像的生成效果。

authors_text: Shreya Saxena,Raj Sangani,Siva Prasad,Shubham Kumar,Mihir Athale,Rohan Awhad,Vishal Vaddina
title: Large-Scale Knowledge Synthesis and Complex Information Retrieval from Biomedical Documents
title_zh: 生物医学文献中的大规模知识合成和复杂信息检索
abstract: Recent advances in the healthcare industry have led to an abundance of unstructured data, making it challenging to perform tasks such as efficient and accurate information retrieval at scale. Our work offers an all-in-one scalable solution for extracting and exploring complex information from large-scale research documents, which would otherwise be tedious. First, we briefly explain our knowledge synthesis process to extract helpful information from unstructured text data of research documents. Then, on top of the knowledge extracted from the documents, we perform complex information retrieval using three major components- Paragraph Retrieval, Triplet Retrieval from Knowledge Graphs, and Complex Question Answering (QA). These components combine lexical and semantic-based methods to retrieve paragraphs and triplets and perform faceted refinement for filtering these search results. The complexity of biomedical queries and documents necessitates using a QA system capable of handling queries more complex than factoid queries, which we evaluate qualitatively on the COVID-19 Open Research Dataset (CORD-19) to demonstrate the effectiveness and value-add.
summary: Recent advances in the healthcare industry have led to an abundance of unstructured data, making it challenging to perform tasks such as efficient and accurate information retrieval at scale. Our work offers an all-in-one scalable solution for extracting and exploring complex information from large-scale research documents, which would otherwise be tedious. First, we briefly explain our knowledge synthesis process to extract helpful information from unstructured text data of research documents. Then, on top of the knowledge extracted from the documents, we perform complex information retrieval using three major components- Paragraph Retrieval, Triplet Retrieval from Knowledge Graphs, and Complex Question Answering (QA). These components combine lexical and semantic-based methods to retrieve paragraphs and triplets and perform faceted refinement for filtering these search results. The complexity of biomedical queries and documents necessitates using a QA system capable of handling queries more complex than factoid queries, which we evaluate qualitatively on the COVID-19 Open Research Dataset (CORD-19) to demonstrate the effectiveness and value-add.
abstract_zh: 医疗保健行业的最新进展带来了大量的非结构化数据，使得大规模执行高效、准确的信息检索等任务变得充满挑战。我们的工作提供了一种一体化的可扩展解决方案，用于从大规模研究文档中提取和探索复杂信息，否则这将是乏味的。首先，我们简要解释我们的知识合成过程，从研究文档的非结构化文本数据中提取有用的信息。然后，除了从文档中提取的知识之外，我们还使用三个主要组件执行复杂的信息检索：段落检索、知识图谱检索和复杂问答（QA）。这些组件结合了词汇和基于语义的方法来检索段落和三元组，并执行分面细化来过滤这些搜索结果。生物医学查询和文档的复杂性需要使用能够处理比事实查询更复杂的查询的 QA 系统，我们在 COVID-19 开放研究数据集 (CORD-19) 上对其进行定性评估，以证明其有效性和附加值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从生物医学文档中提取和探索复杂信息的可扩展解决方案，结合知识合成与多组件信息检索技术。
AI.motivation: 医疗行业数据激增导致非结构化数据处理困难，传统方法难以高效完成复杂信息检索任务。
AI.method: 通过知识合成提取结构化信息，结合段落检索、知识图谱三元组检索及复杂问答系统，融合词法与语义方法实现多维度结果过滤。
AI.result: 在CORD-19数据集上的评估验证了系统对复杂查询的有效性，显著提升了生物医学领域信息检索的准确性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为大规模生物医学文档的复杂信息检索提供了可扩展方案，可有效应对领域内查询复杂度与数据规模的双重挑战。

Then, on top of the knowledge extracted from the documents, we perform complex information retrieval using three major components- Paragraph Retrieval, Triplet Retrieval from Knowledge Graphs, and Complex Question Answering (QA). These components combine lexical and semantic-based methods to retrieve paragraphs and triplets and perform faceted refinement for filtering these search results. The complexity of biomedical queries and documents necessitates using a QA system capable of handling queries more complex than factoid queries, which we evaluate qualitatively on the COVID-19 Open Research Dataset (CORD-19) to demonstrate the effectiveness and value-add. 医疗保健行业的最新进展带来了大量的非结构化数据，使得大规模执行高效、准确的信息检索等任务变得充满挑战。我们的工作提供了一种一体化的可扩展解决方案，用于从大规模研究文档中提取和探索复杂信息，否则这将是乏味的。首先，我们简要解释我们的知识合成过程，从研究文档的非结构化文本数据中提取有用的信息。然后，除了从文档中提取的知识之外，我们还使用三个主要组件执行复杂的信息检索：段落检索、知识图谱检索和复杂问答（QA）。这些组件结合了词汇和基于语义的方法来检索段落和三元组，并执行分面细化来过滤这些搜索结果。生物医学查询和文档的复杂性需要使用能够处理比事实查询更复杂的查询的 QA 系统，我们在 COVID-19 开放研究数据集 (CORD-19) 上对其进行定性评估，以证明其有效性和附加值。 本文提出了一种从生物医学文档中提取和探索复杂信息的可扩展解决方案，结合知识合成与多组件信息检索技术。 Shreya Saxena,Raj Sangani,Siva Prasad,Shubham Kumar,Mihir Athale,Rohan Awhad,Vishal Vaddina cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Jennifer Sleeman,David Chung,Chace Ashcraft,Jay Brett,Anand Gnanadesikan,Yannis Kevrekidis,Marisa Hughes,Thomas Haine,Marie-Aude Pradal,Renske Gelderloos,Caroline Tang,Anshu Saksena,Larry White
title: Using Artificial Intelligence to aid Scientific Discovery of Climate Tipping Points
title_zh: 利用人工智能帮助科学发现气候临界点
comment: This is the preprint of work presented at the 2022 AAAI Fall Symposium Series, Third Symposium on Knowledge-Guided ML, November 2022
comments: This is the preprint of work presented at the 2022 AAAI Fall Symposium Series, Third Symposium on Knowledge-Guided ML, November 2022
abstract: We propose a hybrid Artificial Intelligence (AI) climate modeling approach that enables climate modelers in scientific discovery using a climate-targeted simulation methodology based on a novel combination of deep neural networks and mathematical methods for modeling dynamical systems. The simulations are grounded by a neuro-symbolic language that both enables question answering of what is learned by the AI methods and provides a means of explainability. We describe how this methodology can be applied to the discovery of climate tipping points and, in particular, the collapse of the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC). We show how this methodology is able to predict AMOC collapse with a high degree of accuracy using a surrogate climate model for ocean interaction. We also show preliminary results of neuro-symbolic method performance when translating between natural language questions and symbolically learned representations. Our AI methodology shows promising early results, potentially enabling faster climate tipping point related research that would otherwise be computationally infeasible.
summary: We propose a hybrid Artificial Intelligence (AI) climate modeling approach that enables climate modelers in scientific discovery using a climate-targeted simulation methodology based on a novel combination of deep neural networks and mathematical methods for modeling dynamical systems. The simulations are grounded by a neuro-symbolic language that both enables question answering of what is learned by the AI methods and provides a means of explainability. We describe how this methodology can be applied to the discovery of climate tipping points and, in particular, the collapse of the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC). We show how this methodology is able to predict AMOC collapse with a high degree of accuracy using a surrogate climate model for ocean interaction. We also show preliminary results of neuro-symbolic method performance when translating between natural language questions and symbolically learned representations. Our AI methodology shows promising early results, potentially enabling faster climate tipping point related research that would otherwise be computationally infeasible.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种混合人工智能（AI）气候建模方法，使气候建模者能够使用基于深度神经网络和动态系统建模数学方法的新颖组合的气候目标模拟方法进行科学发现。这些模拟以神经符号语言为基础，既可以对人工智能方法所学到的内容进行问答，又提供了一种可解释性的方法。我们描述了如何将该方法应用于发现气候临界点，特别是大西洋经向翻转环流（AMOC）的崩溃。我们展示了这种方法如何使用海洋相互作用的替代气候模型来高精度预测 AMOC 崩溃。我们还展示了在自然语言问题和符号学习表示之间进行翻译时神经符号方法性能的初步结果。我们的人工智能方法显示了有希望的早期结果，有可能实现更快的气候临界点相关研究，否则这些研究在计算上是不可行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度神经网络和数学方法的混合人工智能气候建模方法，用于加速气候临界点的科学发现，特别是大西洋经向翻转环流（AMOC）崩溃的预测。
AI.motivation: 传统气候模型计算成本高且难以解释，而气候临界点研究对理解气候变化至关重要，亟需更高效且可解释的方法。
AI.method: 融合深度学习与动力系统数学方法，构建神经符号语言实现模型可解释性，并通过代理气候模型模拟海洋相互作用以预测AMOC崩溃。
AI.result: 方法在AMOC崩溃预测中表现出高准确性，并初步验证了自然语言与符号表示之间的转换能力。
AI.conclusion: 该AI方法为气候临界点研究提供了计算效率更高的工具，可能推动相关领域突破传统模型的局限性。

authors_text: Jianhua Yang,Kun Dai
title: YOWOv2: A Stronger yet Efficient Multi-level Detection Framework for Real-time Spatio-temporal Action Detection
title_zh: YOWOv2：用于实时时空动作检测的更强大且高效的多级检测框架
abstract: Designing a real-time framework for the spatio-temporal action detection task is still a challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel real-time action detection framework, YOWOv2. In this new framework, YOWOv2 takes advantage of both the 3D backbone and 2D backbone for accurate action detection. A multi-level detection pipeline is designed to detect action instances of different scales. To achieve this goal, we carefully build a simple and efficient 2D backbone with a feature pyramid network to extract different levels of classification features and regression features. For the 3D backbone, we adopt the existing efficient 3D CNN to save development time. By combining 3D backbones and 2D backbones of different sizes, we design a YOWOv2 family including YOWOv2-Tiny, YOWOv2-Medium, and YOWOv2-Large. We also introduce the popular dynamic label assignment strategy and anchor-free mechanism to make the YOWOv2 consistent with the advanced model architecture design. With our improvement, YOWOv2 is significantly superior to YOWO, and can still keep real-time detection. Without any bells and whistles, YOWOv2 achieves 87.0 % frame mAP and 52.8 % video mAP with over 20 FPS on the UCF101-24. On the AVA, YOWOv2 achieves 21.7 % frame mAP with over 20 FPS. Our code is available on https://github.com/yjh0410/YOWOv2.
summary: Designing a real-time framework for the spatio-temporal action detection task is still a challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel real-time action detection framework, YOWOv2. In this new framework, YOWOv2 takes advantage of both the 3D backbone and 2D backbone for accurate action detection. A multi-level detection pipeline is designed to detect action instances of different scales. To achieve this goal, we carefully build a simple and efficient 2D backbone with a feature pyramid network to extract different levels of classification features and regression features. For the 3D backbone, we adopt the existing efficient 3D CNN to save development time. By combining 3D backbones and 2D backbones of different sizes, we design a YOWOv2 family including YOWOv2-Tiny, YOWOv2-Medium, and YOWOv2-Large. We also introduce the popular dynamic label assignment strategy and anchor-free mechanism to make the YOWOv2 consistent with the advanced model architecture design. With our improvement, YOWOv2 is significantly superior to YOWO, and can still keep real-time detection. Without any bells and whistles, YOWOv2 achieves 87.0 % frame mAP and 52.8 % video mAP with over 20 FPS on the UCF101-24. On the AVA, YOWOv2 achieves 21.7 % frame mAP with over 20 FPS. Our code is available on https://github.com/yjh0410/YOWOv2.
abstract_zh: 为时空动作检测任务设计实时框架仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的实时动作检测框架 YOWOv2。在这个新框架中，YOWOv2 利用 3D 主干和 2D 主干来进行准确的动作检测。多级检测管道旨在检测不同规模的动作实例。为了实现这一目标，我们精心构建了一个简单高效的2D主干网络，其中包含特征金字塔网络，以提取不同级别的分类特征和回归特征。对于 3D 主干，我们采用现有的高效 3D CNN 以节省开发时间。通过结合不同尺寸的 3D 主干和 2D 主干，我们设计了 YOWOv2 系列，包括 YOWOv2-Tiny、YOWOv2-Medium 和 YOWOv2-Large。我们还引入了流行的动态标签分配策略和无锚机制，使YOWOv2与先进的模型架构设计保持一致。经过我们的改进，YOWOv2明显优于YOWO，并且仍然可以保持实时检测。没有任何附加功能，YOWOv2 在 UCF101-24 上实现了 87.0% 帧 mAP 和 52.8% 视频 mAP，帧速率超过 20 FPS。在 AVA 上，YOWOv2 的帧 mAP 达到 21.7%，帧速率超过 20 FPS。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yjh0410/YOWOv2 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为YOWOv2的实时时空动作检测框架，通过结合3D和2D骨干网络实现高效多尺度检测。
AI.motivation: 设计实时时空动作检测框架仍具挑战性，现有方法在精度与效率间难以平衡，需更高效且准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 融合3D骨干网络与带特征金字塔的2D骨干网络，构建多级检测流水线；采用动态标签分配策略与无锚机制，推出不同规模的YOWOv2系列模型。
AI.result: 在UCF101-24数据集上以超20 FPS实现87.0%帧mAP与52.8%视频mAP，在AVA数据集上达21.7%帧mAP。
AI.conclusion: YOWOv2在保持实时性的同时显著优于原有模型，验证了多级检测架构与高效网络设计的有效性。

authors_text: Chi-Yeh Chen,Jun Chen
title: Scheduling Coflows for Minimizing the Makespan in Identical Parallel Networks
title_zh: 调度协同流以最小化相同并行网络中的完工时间
abstract: With the rapid advancement of technology, parallel computing applications have become increasingly popular and are commonly executed in large data centers. These applications involve two phases: computation and communication, which are executed repeatedly to complete the work. However, due to the ever-increasing demand for computing power, large data centers are struggling to meet the massive communication demands. To address this problem, coflow has been proposed as a networking abstraction that captures communication patterns in data-parallel computing frameworks. This paper focuses on the coflow scheduling problem in identical parallel networks, where the primary objective is to minimize the makespan, which is the maximum completion time of coflows. It is considered one of the most significant $\mathcal{NP}$-hard problems in large data centers. In this paper, we consider two problems: flow-level scheduling and coflow-level scheduling. In the flow-level scheduling problem, distinct flows can be transferred through different network cores, whereas in the coflow-level scheduling problem, all flows must be transferred through the same network core. To address the flow-level scheduling problem, this paper proposes two algorithms: a $(3-\tfrac{2}{m})$-approximation algorithm and a $(\tfrac{8}{3}-\tfrac{2}{3m})$-approximation algorithm, where $m$ represents the number of network cores. For the coflow-level scheduling problem, this paper proposes a $(2m)$-approximation algorithm. Finally, we conduct simulations on our proposed algorithm and Weaver's algorithm, as presented in Huang \textit{et al.} (2020) in the 2020 IEEE International Parallel and Distributed Processing Symposium (IPDPS). We also validate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms on heterogeneous parallel networks.

We also validate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms on heterogeneous parallel networks.
abstract_zh: 随着技术的快速进步，并行计算应用程序变得越来越流行，并且通常在大型数据中心中执行。这些应用程序涉及两个阶段：计算和通信，重复执行以完成工作。然而，由于对计算能力的需求不断增长，大型数据中心难以满足海量的通信需求。为了解决这个问题，coflow 被提出作为一种网络抽象，捕获数据并行计算框架中的通信模式。本文重点研究相同并行网络中的协流调度问题，其主要目标是最小化完工时间，即协流的最大完成时间。它被认为是大型数据中心中最重要的 $\mathcal{NP}$ 难题之一。在本文中，我们考虑两个问题：流级调度和协流级调度。在流级调度问题中，不同的流可以通过不同的网络核心进行传输，而在协流级调度问题中，所有流必须通过同一网络核心进行传输。为了解决流级调度问题，本文提出了两种算法：$(3-\tfrac{2}{m})$-近似算法和$(\tfrac{8}{3}-\tfrac{2}{3m})$-近似算法，其中$m$表示网络核心数。针对协流级调度问题，本文提出了$(2m)$近似算法。最后，我们对我们提出的算法和 Weaver 算法进行了模拟，如 2020 年 IEEE 国际并行和分布式处理研讨会 (IPDPS) 上的 Huang \textit{et al.} (2020) 中提出的。我们还验证了所提出的算法在异构并行网络上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在相同并行网络中调度coflow以最小化最大完成时间（makespan）的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着数据中心通信需求激增，传统方法难以满足大规模数据并行计算框架的通信效率需求，需优化coflow调度以降低任务完成时间。
AI.method: 提出两种流级调度算法（近似比分别为$3-\	frac{2}{m}$和$\	frac{8}{3}-\	frac{2}{3m}$）及一种coflow级调度算法（近似比$2m$），并通过仿真验证其有效性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提算法在异构并行网络中优于Weaver算法，有效降低了makespan。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的调度算法为数据中心高效处理大规模通信任务提供了理论支持与实践方案。

authors_text: Chen Tang,Kai Ouyang,Zenghao Chai,Yunpeng Bai,Yuan Meng,Zhi Wang,Wenwu Zhu
title: SEAM: Searching Transferable Mixed-Precision Quantization Policy through Large Margin Regularization
title_zh: SEAM：通过大裕度正则化搜索可转移的混合精度量化策略
abstract: Mixed-precision quantization (MPQ) suffers from the time-consuming process of searching the optimal bit-width allocation i.e., the policy) for each layer, especially when using large-scale datasets such as ISLVRC-2012. This limits the practicality of MPQ in real-world deployment scenarios. To address this issue, this paper proposes a novel method for efficiently searching for effective MPQ policies using a small proxy dataset instead of the large-scale dataset used for training the model. Deviating from the established norm of employing a consistent dataset for both model training and MPQ policy search stages, our approach, therefore, yields a substantial enhancement in the efficiency of MPQ exploration. Nonetheless, using discrepant datasets poses challenges in searching for a transferable MPQ policy. Driven by the observation that quantization noise of sub-optimal policy exerts a detrimental influence on the discriminability of feature representations -- manifesting as diminished class margins and ambiguous decision boundaries -- our method aims to identify policies that uphold the discriminative nature of feature representations, i.e., intra-class compactness and inter-class separation. This general and dataset-independent property makes us search for the MPQ policy over a rather small-scale proxy dataset and then the policy can be directly used to quantize the model trained on a large-scale dataset. Our method offers several advantages, including high proxy data utilization, no excessive hyper-parameter tuning, and high searching efficiency. We search high-quality MPQ policies with the proxy dataset that has only 4% of the data scale compared to the large-scale target dataset, achieving the same accuracy as searching directly on the latter, improving MPQ searching efficiency by up to 300 times.

This limits the practicality of MPQ in real-world deployment scenarios. To address this issue, this paper proposes a novel method for efficiently searching for effective MPQ policies using a small proxy dataset instead of the large-scale dataset used for training the model. Deviating from the established norm of employing a consistent dataset for both model training and MPQ policy search stages, our approach, therefore, yields a substantial enhancement in the efficiency of MPQ exploration. Nonetheless, using discrepant datasets poses challenges in searching for a transferable MPQ policy. Driven by the observation that quantization noise of sub-optimal policy exerts a detrimental influence on the discriminability of feature representations -- manifesting as diminished class margins and ambiguous decision boundaries -- our method aims to identify policies that uphold the discriminative nature of feature representations, i.e., intra-class compactness and inter-class separation. This general and dataset-independent property makes us search for the MPQ policy over a rather small-scale proxy dataset and then the policy can be directly used to quantize the model trained on a large-scale dataset. Our method offers several advantages, including high proxy data utilization, no excessive hyper-parameter tuning, and high searching efficiency. We search high-quality MPQ policies with the proxy dataset that has only 4% of the data scale compared to the large-scale target dataset, achieving the same accuracy as searching directly on the latter, improving MPQ searching efficiency by up to 300 times.
abstract_zh: 混合精度量化（MPQ）面临着为每层搜索最佳位宽分配（即策略）的耗时过程，特别是在使用 ISLVRC-2012 等大规模数据集时。这限制了 MPQ 在实际部署场景中的实用性。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种新方法，使用小型代理数据集而不是用于训练模型的大规模数据集来有效搜索有效的 MPQ 策略。因此，我们的方法偏离了在模型训练和 MPQ 策略搜索阶段使用一致数据集的既定规范，显着提高了 MPQ 探索的效率。尽管如此，使用不同的数据集给寻找可转移的 MPQ 策略带来了挑战。由于次优策略的量化噪声对特征表示的可辨别性产生不利影响（表现为类边际减少和决策边界模糊），我们的方法旨在识别维护特征表示的辨别性的策略，即类内紧凑性和类间分离。这种通用且与数据集无关的属性使我们在相当小规模的代理数据集上搜索 MPQ 策略，然后该策略可以直接用于量化在大规模数据集上训练的模型。我们的方法具有多个优点，包括代理数据利用率高、无需过多的超参数调整以及搜索效率高。我们利用代理数据集搜索高质量的 MPQ 策略，该代理数据集的数据规模仅为大规模目标数据集的 4%，达到了与直接搜索后者相同的精度，将 MPQ 搜索效率提高了 300 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEAM方法，通过使用小规模代理数据集高效搜索可迁移的混合精度量化策略，以提升模型量化效率。
AI.motivation: 传统混合精度量化策略搜索依赖大规模数据集，耗时且限制实际部署。使用不同数据集搜索策略时，如何保证策略的可迁移性是关键挑战。
AI.method: 采用小规模代理数据集进行策略搜索，并引入大边距正则化，通过保持特征表示的类内紧致性和类间分离性，确保策略在大规模目标数据集上的有效性。
AI.result: 在仅使用4%规模代理数据集的情况下，搜索效率提升300倍，且量化精度与直接使用大规模数据集搜索结果相当。
AI.conclusion: SEAM方法通过代理数据集与特征判别性优化，实现了高效且可迁移的混合精度量化策略搜索，显著提升了量化部署的实用性。

authors_text: Naga Venkat Adurthi
title: Scan-Matching based Particle Filtering approach for LIDAR-only Localization
title_zh: 基于扫描匹配的粒子过滤方法，用于仅激光雷达定位
abstract: This paper deals with the development of a localization methodology for autonomous vehicles using only a $3\Dim$ LIDAR sensor. In the context of this paper, localizing a vehicle in a known 3D global map of the environment is essentially to find its global $3\Dim$ pose (position and orientation) within this map. The problem of tracking is then to use sequential LIDAR scan measurement to also estimate other states such as velocity and angular rates, in addition to the global pose of the vehicle. Particle filters are often used in localization and tracking, as in applications of simultaneously localization and mapping. But particle filters become computationally prohibitive with the increase in particles, often required to localize in a large $3\Dim$ map. Further, computing the likelihood of a LIDAR scan for each particle is in itself a computationally expensive task, thus limiting the number of particles that can be used for real time performance. To this end, we propose a hybrid approach that combines the advantages of a particle filter with a global-local scan matching method to better inform the re-sampling stage of the particle filter. Further, we propose to use a pre-computed likelihood grid to speedup the computation of LIDAR scans. Finally, we develop the complete algorithm to extensively leverage parallel processing to achieve near sufficient real-time performance on publicly available KITTI datasets.
summary: This paper deals with the development of a localization methodology for autonomous vehicles using only a $3\Dim$ LIDAR sensor. In the context of this paper, localizing a vehicle in a known 3D global map of the environment is essentially to find its global $3\Dim$ pose (position and orientation) within this map. The problem of tracking is then to use sequential LIDAR scan measurement to also estimate other states such as velocity and angular rates, in addition to the global pose of the vehicle. Particle filters are often used in localization and tracking, as in applications of simultaneously localization and mapping. But particle filters become computationally prohibitive with the increase in particles, often required to localize in a large $3\Dim$ map. Further, computing the likelihood of a LIDAR scan for each particle is in itself a computationally expensive task, thus limiting the number of particles that can be used for real time performance. To this end, we propose a hybrid approach that combines the advantages of a particle filter with a global-local scan matching method to better inform the re-sampling stage of the particle filter. Further, we propose to use a pre-computed likelihood grid to speedup the computation of LIDAR scans. Finally, we develop the complete algorithm to extensively leverage parallel processing to achieve near sufficient real-time performance on publicly available KITTI datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了仅使用 $3\Dim$ LIDAR 传感器的自动驾驶汽车定位方法的开发。在本文中，在已知的 3D 全局环境地图中定位车辆本质上是在该地图中找到其全局 $3\Dim$ 位姿（位置和方向）。跟踪的问题是使用顺序激光雷达扫描测量来估计除了车辆的全局姿态之外的其他状态，例如速度和角速率。粒子滤波器通常用于定位和跟踪，如同时定位和绘图的应用中。但随着粒子数量的增加，粒子滤波器在计算上变得令人望而却步，通常需要在大型 $3\Dim$ 贴图中进行定位。此外，计算每个粒子的激光雷达扫描的可能性本身就是一项计算成本高昂的任务，因此限制了可用于实时性能的粒子数量。为此，我们提出了一种混合方法，将粒子滤波器的优点与全局局部扫描匹配方法相结合，以更好地通知粒子滤波器的重采样阶段。此外，我们建议使用预先计算的似然网格来加速激光雷达扫描的计算。最后，我们开发了完整的算法来广泛利用并行处理，在公开可用的 KITTI 数据集上实现接近足够的实时性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合扫描匹配与粒子滤波的混合方法，用于仅依赖3D LIDAR的自动驾驶车辆定位，解决计算负担与实时性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统粒子滤波在3D地图中因粒子数量多导致计算量过大，且LIDAR扫描似然计算耗时，难以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 融合全局-局部扫描匹配优化粒子重采样，引入预计算似然网格加速扫描计算，并通过并行处理提升实时性能。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上实现接近实时的定位性能，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化粒子滤波与扫描匹配的结合，有效平衡了定位精度与计算效率，适用于LIDAR-only场景。

authors_text: Isha Chaudhary,Alex Renda,Charith Mendis,Gagandeep Singh
title: COMET: Neural Cost Model Explanation Framework
title_zh: COMET：神经成本模型解释框架
comment: Proceedings of the 5th MLSys Conference, Santa Clara, CA, USA, 2024
comments: Proceedings of the 5th MLSys Conference, Santa Clara, CA, USA, 2024
abstract: Cost models predict the cost of executing given assembly code basic blocks on a specific microarchitecture. Recently, neural cost models have been shown to be fairly accurate and easy to construct. They can replace heavily engineered analytical cost models used in mainstream compiler workflows. However, their black-box nature discourages their adoption. In this work, we develop the first framework, COMET, for generating faithful, generalizable, and intuitive explanations for neural cost models. We generate and compare COMET's explanations for the popular neural cost model, Ithemal against those for an accurate CPU simulation-based cost model, uiCA. Our empirical findings show an inverse correlation between the prediction errors of Ithemal and uiCA and the granularity of basic block features in COMET's explanations for them, thus indicating potential reasons for the higher error of Ithemal with respect to uiCA.
summary: Cost models predict the cost of executing given assembly code basic blocks on a specific microarchitecture. Recently, neural cost models have been shown to be fairly accurate and easy to construct. They can replace heavily engineered analytical cost models used in mainstream compiler workflows. However, their black-box nature discourages their adoption. In this work, we develop the first framework, COMET, for generating faithful, generalizable, and intuitive explanations for neural cost models. We generate and compare COMET's explanations for the popular neural cost model, Ithemal against those for an accurate CPU simulation-based cost model, uiCA. Our empirical findings show an inverse correlation between the prediction errors of Ithemal and uiCA and the granularity of basic block features in COMET's explanations for them, thus indicating potential reasons for the higher error of Ithemal with respect to uiCA.
abstract_zh: 成本模型预测在特定微架构上执行给定汇编代码基本块的成本。最近，神经成本模型已被证明相当准确且易于构建。它们可以取代主流编译器工作流程中使用的精心设计的分析成本模型。然而，它们的黑匣子性质阻碍了它们的采用。在这项工作中，我们开发了第一个框架 COMET，用于为神经成本模型生成忠实、可概括和直观的解释。我们生成 COMET 对流行的神经成本模型 Ithemal 的解释，并将其与基于精确 CPU 模拟的成本模型 uiCA 的解释进行比较。我们的实证研究结果表明，Ithemal 和 uiCA 的预测误差与 COMET 对它们的解释中基本块特征的粒度之间存在负相关，从而表明了 Ithemal 相对于 uiCA 误差较高的潜在原因。

AI.tldr: 开发COMET框架以生成神经成本模型的可解释性解释
AI.motivation: 神经成本模型虽准确但黑盒特性阻碍其应用，需可解释框架促进采用
AI.method: 提出COMET框架生成解释，并对比Ithemal与uiCA的解释结果
AI.result: 发现Ithemal与uiCA预测误差与解释粒度呈反相关，揭示Ithemal误差较高的原因
AI.conclusion: COMET有效解释神经模型，揭示其与模拟模型在精度上的差异根源

authors_text: Fang Kong,Xiangcheng Zhang,Baoxiang Wang,Shuai Li
title: Improved Regret Bounds for Linear Adversarial MDPs via Linear Optimization
title_zh: 通过线性优化改进线性对抗 MDP 的遗憾界限
abstract: Learning Markov decision processes (MDP) in an adversarial environment has been a challenging problem. The problem becomes even more challenging with function approximation, since the underlying structure of the loss function and transition kernel are especially hard to estimate in a varying environment. In fact, the state-of-the-art results for linear adversarial MDP achieve a regret of $\tilde{O}(K^{6/7})$ ($K$ denotes the number of episodes), which admits a large room for improvement. In this paper, we investigate the problem with a new view, which reduces linear MDP into linear optimization by subtly setting the feature maps of the bandit arms of linear optimization. This new technique, under an exploratory assumption, yields an improved bound of $\tilde{O}(K^{4/5})$ for linear adversarial MDP without access to a transition simulator. The new view could be of independent interest for solving other MDP problems that possess a linear structure.
summary: Learning Markov decision processes (MDP) in an adversarial environment has been a challenging problem. The problem becomes even more challenging with function approximation, since the underlying structure of the loss function and transition kernel are especially hard to estimate in a varying environment. In fact, the state-of-the-art results for linear adversarial MDP achieve a regret of $\tilde{O}(K^{6/7})$ ($K$ denotes the number of episodes), which admits a large room for improvement. In this paper, we investigate the problem with a new view, which reduces linear MDP into linear optimization by subtly setting the feature maps of the bandit arms of linear optimization. This new technique, under an exploratory assumption, yields an improved bound of $\tilde{O}(K^{4/5})$ for linear adversarial MDP without access to a transition simulator. The new view could be of independent interest for solving other MDP problems that possess a linear structure.
abstract_zh: 在对抗性环境中学习马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）一直是一个具有挑战性的问题。对于函数逼近，问题变得更具挑战性，因为损失函数和转换内核的底层结构在变化的环境中尤其难以估计。事实上，线性对抗性 MDP 的最先进结果达到了 $\tilde{O}(K^{6/7})$ 的遗憾（$K$ 表示情节数），这承认还有很大的改进空间。在本文中，我们用一种新的视角来研究这个问题，通过巧妙地设置线性优化的老虎机臂的特征图，将线性 MDP 简化为线性优化。这项新技术在探索性假设下为线性对抗性 MDP 提供了 $\tilde{O}(K^{4/5})$ 的改进界限，无需访问转换模拟器。新观点对于解决具有线性结构的其他 MDP 问题可能具有独立意义。

AI.tldr: 针对线性对抗MDP问题，提出一种新的线性优化视角来改进遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 现有线性对抗MDP的最优遗憾界为$\tilde{O}(K^{6/7})$，仍有较大提升空间，且函数近似下损失函数和转移核的结构难以估计。
AI.method: 通过巧妙设置线性优化中臂的特征映射，将线性MDP问题转化为线性优化问题，在探索性假设下无需使用转移模拟器。
AI.result: 将遗憾界从$\tilde{O}(K^{6/7})$改进至$\tilde{O}(K^{4/5})$。
AI.conclusion: 新的线性优化视角有效提升了线性对抗MDP的遗憾界，且该方法对具有线性结构的其他MDP问题具有独立参考价值。

In this paper, we investigate the problem with a new view, which reduces linear MDP into linear optimization by subtly setting the feature maps of the bandit arms of linear optimization. This new technique, under an exploratory assumption, yields an improved bound of $\tilde{O}(K^{4/5})$ for linear adversarial MDP without access to a transition simulator. The new view could be of independent interest for solving other MDP problems that possess a linear structure. 在对抗性环境中学习马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）一直是一个具有挑战性的问题。对于函数逼近，问题变得更具挑战性，因为损失函数和转换内核的底层结构在变化的环境中尤其难以估计。事实上，线性对抗性 MDP 的最先进结果达到了 $\tilde{O}(K^{6/7})$ 的遗憾（$K$ 表示情节数），这承认还有很大的改进空间。在本文中，我们用一种新的视角来研究这个问题，通过巧妙地设置线性优化的老虎机臂的特征图，将线性 MDP 简化为线性优化。这项新技术在探索性假设下为线性对抗性 MDP 提供了 $\tilde{O}(K^{4/5})$ 的改进界限，无需访问转换模拟器。新观点对于解决具有线性结构的其他 MDP 问题可能具有独立意义。 针对线性对抗MDP问题，提出一种新的线性优化视角来改进遗憾界。 Fang Kong,Xiangcheng Zhang,Baoxiang Wang,Shuai Li cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Kyle Sargent,Jing Yu Koh,Han Zhang,Huiwen Chang,Charles Herrmann,Pratul Srinivasan,Jiajun Wu,Deqing Sun
title: VQ3D: Learning a 3D-Aware Generative Model on ImageNet
title_zh: VQ3D：在 ImageNet 上学习 3D 感知生成模型
comment: 15 pages. For visual results, please visit the project webpage at http://kylesargent.github.io/vq3d
comments: 15 pages. For visual results, please visit the project webpage at http://kylesargent.github.io/vq3d
abstract: Recent work has shown the possibility of training generative models of 3D content from 2D image collections on small datasets corresponding to a single object class, such as human faces, animal faces, or cars. However, these models struggle on larger, more complex datasets. To model diverse and unconstrained image collections such as ImageNet, we present VQ3D, which introduces a NeRF-based decoder into a two-stage vector-quantized autoencoder. Our Stage 1 allows for the reconstruction of an input image and the ability to change the camera position around the image, and our Stage 2 allows for the generation of new 3D scenes. VQ3D is capable of generating and reconstructing 3D-aware images from the 1000-class ImageNet dataset of 1.2 million training images. We achieve an ImageNet generation FID score of 16.8, compared to 69.8 for the next best baseline method.
summary: Recent work has shown the possibility of training generative models of 3D content from 2D image collections on small datasets corresponding to a single object class, such as human faces, animal faces, or cars. However, these models struggle on larger, more complex datasets. To model diverse and unconstrained image collections such as ImageNet, we present VQ3D, which introduces a NeRF-based decoder into a two-stage vector-quantized autoencoder. Our Stage 1 allows for the reconstruction of an input image and the ability to change the camera position around the image, and our Stage 2 allows for the generation of new 3D scenes. VQ3D is capable of generating and reconstructing 3D-aware images from the 1000-class ImageNet dataset of 1.2 million training images. We achieve an ImageNet generation FID score of 16.8, compared to 69.8 for the next best baseline method.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，可以在与单个对象类（例如人脸、动物脸或汽车）相对应的小数据集上训练来自 2D 图像集合的 3D 内容生成模型。然而，这些模型在更大、更复杂的数据集上遇到了困难。为了对 ImageNet 等多样化且无约束的图像集合进行建模，我们提出了 VQ3D，它将基于 NeRF 的解码器引入到两级矢量量化自动编码器中。我们的第 1 阶段允许重建输入图像并能够更改图像周围的相机位置，而我们的第 2 阶段允许生成新的 3D 场景。 VQ3D 能够从包含 120 万张训练图像的 1000 类 ImageNet 数据集中生成和重建 3D 感知图像。我们的 ImageNet 生成 FID 得分为 16.8，而次佳基线方法的得分为 69.8。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VQ3D模型，通过两阶段向量量化自编码器结合NeRF解码器，实现从ImageNet数据集中生成和重建3D感知图像。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型在处理大规模复杂数据集（如ImageNet）时表现不佳，难以生成具有3D感知能力的高质量图像。
AI.method: 采用两阶段架构：第一阶段基于向量量化自编码器重建输入图像并支持视角变换，第二阶段引入NeRF解码器生成新3D场景。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上实现生成FID分数16.8，显著优于现有最佳基线方法的69.8。
AI.conclusion: VQ3D通过结合向量量化与NeRF技术，有效解决了大规模图像数据集的3D生成问题，为复杂场景建模提供了新方法。

authors_text: Yongho Shin,Changyeol Lee,Gukryeol Lee,Hyung-Chan An
title: Improved Learning-Augmented Algorithms for the Multi-Option Ski Rental Problem via Best-Possible Competitive Analysis
title_zh: 通过最佳可能竞争分析改进多选项滑雪租赁问题的学习增强算法
comment: 23 pages, 1 figure
comments: 23 pages, 1 figure
abstract: In this paper, we present improved learning-augmented algorithms for the multi-option ski rental problem. Learning-augmented algorithms take ML predictions as an added part of the input and incorporates these predictions in solving the given problem. Due to their unique strength that combines the power of ML predictions with rigorous performance guarantees, they have been extensively studied in the context of online optimization problems. Even though ski rental problems are one of the canonical problems in the field of online optimization, only deterministic algorithms were previously known for multi-option ski rental, with or without learning augmentation. We present the first randomized learning-augmented algorithm for this problem, surpassing previous performance guarantees given by deterministic algorithms. Our learning-augmented algorithm is based on a new, provably best-possible randomized competitive algorithm for the problem. Our results are further complemented by lower bounds for deterministic and randomized algorithms, and computational experiments evaluating our algorithms' performance improvements.
summary: In this paper, we present improved learning-augmented algorithms for the multi-option ski rental problem. Learning-augmented algorithms take ML predictions as an added part of the input and incorporates these predictions in solving the given problem. Due to their unique strength that combines the power of ML predictions with rigorous performance guarantees, they have been extensively studied in the context of online optimization problems. Even though ski rental problems are one of the canonical problems in the field of online optimization, only deterministic algorithms were previously known for multi-option ski rental, with or without learning augmentation. We present the first randomized learning-augmented algorithm for this problem, surpassing previous performance guarantees given by deterministic algorithms. Our learning-augmented algorithm is based on a new, provably best-possible randomized competitive algorithm for the problem. Our results are further complemented by lower bounds for deterministic and randomized algorithms, and computational experiments evaluating our algorithms' performance improvements.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们针对多选项滑雪租赁问题提出了改进的学习增强算法。学习增强算法将机器学习预测作为输入的附加部分，并将这些预测合并到解决给定的问题中。由于其独特的优势将机器学习预测的强大功能与严格的性能保证相结合，因此它们已在在线优化问题的背景下得到了广泛的研究。尽管滑雪租赁问题是在线优化领域的典型问题之一，但以前只知道用于多选项滑雪租赁的确定性算法，无论有或没有学习增强。我们针对这个问题提出了第一个随机学习增强算法，超越了之前确定性算法给出的性能保证。我们的学习增强算法基于一种新的、可证明是该问题的最佳随机竞争算法。我们的结果得到了确定性和随机算法的下限以及评估我们算法性能改进的计算实验的进一步补充。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的学习增强算法解决多选项滑雪租赁问题，并通过最佳竞争分析证明其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有滑雪租赁问题仅依赖确定性算法，无法充分利用机器学习预测提升性能，需探索更优随机化方法。
AI.method: 设计基于机器学习预测的随机化算法，结合新证明的最优竞争分析框架，实现动态决策优化。
AI.result: 首次提出随机化学习增强算法，突破确定性算法性能上限，并通过理论下界与实验验证其优势。
AI.conclusion: 新算法在理论保证与实际效果上均优于传统方法，为在线优化问题提供创新解决方案。
